title: Sharing economy in the era of full automation: Evidence from autonomous vehicle on-demand mobility services
abstract: The digital age has facilitated the sharing of underutilized assets. This paper focuses on privately owned autonomous vehicles (AVs), a unique class of robots that can move independently and provide transportation services. When not in personal use, private AV owners can lease their vehicles to a platform that operates an on-demand mobility service (MoD). We refer to this service as AV crowdsourcing, and develop a time-expanded network flow model that captures temporal and spatial heterogeneity in AV usage of both owners and passengers while preserving analytical tractability. We analyze the conditions under which AV crowdsourcing reduces MoD operating costs and identify their key factors, namely, the complementarity of the mobility pattern between AV owners and MoD passengers, the slack time reserved by vehicle owners, and the vehicle repositioning distance. A case study of Chicago further reveals substantial spatiotemporal heterogeneity in optimal prices and service quality. The results demonstrate how centralized dispatching can simultaneously fulfill the high demand in downtown areas while maintaining relatively high service quality in peripheral regions. Our findings provide insights into how supply heterogeneity and market conditions jointly shape the performance of AV crowdsourcing systems that leverage the underutilized private robotic assets.
tldr: 该论文研究私人拥有的自动驾驶汽车通过平台提供按需出行服务的共享模式，并开发模型分析其降低运营成本的条件和空间异质性。
abstract_cn: 数字时代促进了未充分利用资产的共享。本文聚焦于私有的自主车辆（AVs），这是一类能够独立移动并提供运输服务的独特机器人。当私人所有者不使用车辆时，他们可以将车辆租赁给运营按需出行服务（MoD）的平台。我们将这种服务称为AV众包，并开发了一个时间扩展的网络流模型，该模型在保持分析可处理性的同时，捕捉了车主与乘客在AV使用中的时空异质性。我们分析了AV众包降低MoD运营成本的条件，并识别了其关键因素，即AV车主与MoD乘客出行模式的互补性、车主预留的松弛时间以及车辆重新定位的距离。芝加哥案例研究进一步揭示了最优价格与服务质量中显著的时空异质性。结果表明，集中调度如何在满足市中心区域高需求的同时，维持外围地区相对较高的服务质量。我们的研究为理解供给异质性与市场条件如何共同塑造利用未充分利用的私有机器人资产的AV众包系统性能提供了洞见。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究共享经济中的自动驾驶车辆按需出行服务，属于交通经济学和运营管理领域，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。

title: SolarChain-Eval: A Physics-Constrained Benchmark for Trustworthy Economic Agents in Decentralized Energy Markets
abstract: As agentic AI systems are increasingly applied to cyber-physical environments, their evaluation requires assessment of both task performance and trustworthiness. In decentralized energy markets, autonomous agents may improve market utility, but may also exploit invalid physical data, create artificial liquidity, and produce unstable governance decisions. Therefore, we propose SolarChain-Eval, a physics-constrained benchmark for evaluating trustworthy economic agents. It formulates market governance as a Gymnasium-compatible Markov Decision Process, where agents make hourly decisions. SolarChain-Eval evaluates each policy across multiple dimensions, including market utility, physical safety, slippage, action smoothness, spatial fairness, and auditability. To support agentic evaluation, SolarChain-Eval incorporates an LLM-based Planner/Auditor layer. The Planner defines episode-level action bounds and audit rules, while the Auditor reviews and revises high-risk actions. All interventions are recorded through structured logs, including trigger signals, proposed actions, revised actions, and audit rationales. Experiments with static, random, myopic, RL, and RL+LLM policies reveal a clear utility-safety trade-off. RL agents improve market utility but can still produce unsafe behavior. When the physics penalty is removed, reward-maximizing agents exploit invalid generation and increase artificial liquidity. The LLM Planner/Auditor improves auditability and mitigates selected risks, but it cannot fully compensate for a misspecified reward function. These results indicate that trustworthy agentic AI evaluation requires both physical constraints and transparent intervention traces. We release data and code as open access on GitHub for replicability.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个物理约束的基准SolarChain-Eval，用于评估去中心化能源市场中智能体的可信度，发现RL智能体在提高市场效用的同时可能产生不安全行为，而LLM规划器/审计器可缓解部分风险但无法完全弥补奖励函数错误。
abstract_cn: 随着自主型人工智能系统越来越多地应用于信息物理环境，对其评估需要兼顾任务性能与可信赖性。在去中心化能源市场中，自主智能体可能提升市场效用，但也可能利用无效物理数据、制造人为流动性，并产生不稳定的治理决策。为此，我们提出SolarChain-Eval——一个用于评估可信经济智能体的物理约束基准。该基准将市场治理建模为兼容Gymnasium的马尔可夫决策过程，其中智能体按小时做出决策。SolarChain-Eval从多个维度评估每种策略，包括市场效用、物理安全性、滑点、动作平滑性、空间公平性以及可审计性。为支持自主评估，SolarChain-Eval集成了基于大语言模型的规划器/审计器层。规划器定义回合级动作边界与审计规则，审计器则负责审查并修正高风险动作。所有干预措施均通过结构化日志记录，包括触发信号、提议动作、修正动作及审计理由。基于静态策略、随机策略、短视策略、强化学习策略以及强化学习+大语言模型策略的实验揭示了效用与安全性之间的明确权衡。强化学习智能体提升了市场效用，但仍可能产生不安全行为。当移除物理惩罚时，追求奖励最大化的智能体会利用无效发电并增加人为流动性。大语言模型规划器/审计器提升了可审计性并缓解了特定风险，但无法完全弥补错误设定的奖励函数。这些结果表明，可信赖的自主型人工智能评估既需要物理约束，也需要透明的干预轨迹。我们已在GitHub上以开放获取方式发布数据和代码，以确保可复现性。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究的是去中心化能源市场中基于AI的代理评估，涉及物理约束和信任机制，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。未提及银行、信贷、中央银行政策、政府收支等核心主题。

title: A Comparative Review of Methods to Create a Composite Index for Sustainable and Inclusive Wellbeing
abstract: Societal goals need to shift from over-reliance on gross domestic product (GDP) to broader aspects of sustainable and inclusive wellbeing (SIW). However, defining SIW and eventually measuring it with a single number is problematic because it involves many subjective and objective contributors that combine in complex, non-linear ways. Conventional approaches either use linear weighted averages or reduce SIW to subjective wellbeing alone. Neither is sufficient. This paper reviews aggregation methods for SIW against nine conditions derived from needs theory and strong sustainability: limited substitutability, penalisation of imbalances, non-linear transformations, respect for environmental ceilings, respect for lower limits, a formative measurement model, no correlation requirement, distributional sensitivity, cross-border spillovers, and intertemporal aggregation. We compare 13 methods, from simple arithmetic means to penalty-based indices, outranking multicriteria, data envelopment analysis, and insights from ecology, neuroscience, and machine learning. Our illustrative example shows that aggregation choices change significantly country rankings. Compensatory methods create similar rankings. No single method satisfies all nine conditions. We conclude that a future SIW composite indicator will require combining methods across levels: non-linear normalisation, non-compensatory aggregation, and measurement-level choices for inclusiveness and spillovers. This paper provides a step towards the headline aggregated indicator advocated by the UN High-Level Expert Group on Beyond GDP.
tldr: 该论文比较了13种构建可持续和包容性福祉综合指标的方法，发现没有一种方法满足所有条件，建议未来结合非线性归一化、非补偿性聚合等方法。
abstract_cn: 社会目标需要从过度依赖国内生产总值（GDP）转向更广泛的可持续与包容性福祉（SIW）维度。然而，界定SIW并最终以单一数值对其进行衡量存在困难，因为这涉及诸多主观与客观贡献因素，且这些因素以复杂的非线性方式相互结合。传统方法要么采用线性加权平均，要么将SIW简化为仅包含主观福祉。这两种方式均不充分。本文基于需求理论与强可持续性推导出的九项条件，对SIW的聚合方法进行了评述：有限替代性、对失衡的惩罚、非线性转换、尊重环境上限、尊重下限、形成性测量模型、无相关性要求、分配敏感性、跨境溢出效应以及跨期聚合。我们比较了13种方法，涵盖从简单算术平均到基于惩罚的指数、排序多准则、数据包络分析，以及来自生态学、神经科学和机器学习的见解。我们的示例表明，聚合选择会显著改变国家排名。补偿性方法会产生相似的排名。没有任何单一方法能满足全部九项条件。我们得出结论：未来的SIW综合指标需要跨层级结合多种方法——非线性标准化、非补偿性聚合，以及针对包容性与溢出效应的测量层级选择。本文为联合国超越GDP高级别专家组所倡导的总体聚合指标提供了推进步骤。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究可持续与包容性福祉的综合指数构建方法，涉及GDP替代指标，但未讨论商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的核心问题。商业银行领域无银行信贷、金融中介等内容；货币政策领域无利率、通胀、央行工具等；财政政策领域无政府支出、税收、债务等。因此三个领域均为0分。

title: The Impact of Publicly Funded Small Business Advisory Services: Firm Take-up and Performance in the United States
abstract: This paper studies the impact of geographic proximity to and utilization of publicly funded advisory services offered to US small businesses on firm take-up and performance. We leverage a novel administrative dataset from the Northern California Small Business Development Center (SBDC) Network covering all firm-center interactions from 2006-23. To address endogeneity in firm engagement with centers, we exploit exogenous variation in center-firm geographic proximity generated by center closures and openings. We instrument for paired center-firm consulting time with changes in distance resulting from these organizational shifts. A one standard deviation reduction in distance between a firm and corresponding center (20 miles) increases expected annual consulting time by 0.15 hours (7.5%); each additional consulting hour raises average firm annual revenue and employment by 3.6-5.2% and 1.6-2.9%, respectively. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest advisory services are cost-effective. This study provides novel causal evidence on take-up and effectiveness of small business advisory services in the US using quasi-experimental variation in geographic proximity. Our findings highlight the importance of both physical distance and localized expertise in shaping small business outcomes.
tldr: 该论文利用美国北加州小企业发展中心的数据，通过中心开闭造成的地理距离变化作为工具变量，发现距离缩短增加咨询时间，进而提高企业收入和就业，证明咨询服务具有成本效益。
abstract_cn: 本文研究了美国小企业获取公共资助咨询服务的地理邻近性及实际利用情况对企业采纳行为与经营绩效的影响。我们利用来自北加州小企业发展中心（SBDC）网络2006-23年间覆盖所有企业-中心互动的全新行政数据集。为应对企业参与中心服务的内生性问题，我们利用中心关闭与开设所造成的外生性企业-中心地理邻近度变化。以这些组织变动导致的企业与对应中心间距离变化作为工具变量，衡量配对咨询时长。企业与对应中心距离每减少一个标准差（20英里），预期年咨询时长增加0.15小时（7.5%）；每增加一小时的咨询时长，企业年均营收与就业人数分别提升3.6-5.2%与1.6-2.9%。粗略估算表明咨询服务具有成本效益。本研究利用地理邻近性的准实验变异，为美国小企业咨询服务的采纳率与有效性提供了新颖的因果证据。研究结果凸显了物理距离与本地化专业知识在塑造小企业经营成果中的重要作用。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Robustness to Model Uncertainties Drives More Rapid CO2 Emissions Reductions
abstract: Evaluating the economic impacts of climate policies is important for designing a response to climate change. One typical approach to assessing mitigation policy options uses integrated climate-economy models to analyze tradeoffs between the costs of reducing greenhouse gas emissions and the benefits of reducing climate damages. However, the uncertainty characterizing these models poses significant challenges for policymakers. We address this difficulty using a robust decision-making framework to evaluate mitigation policy. We show that a shift from a decision framework that maximizes expected outcomes to one that is averse to regret suggests more aggressive emissions reductions. Uncertainties about socioeconomic trajectories and the magnitude and functional form of climate damages create the asymmetric consequences of weak mitigation policy that encourage aggressive emissions reductions and precaution in the face of uncertainty.
tldr: 该论文研究气候变化减缓政策的经济影响，发现采用规避遗憾的稳健决策框架比期望效用最大化框架要求更激进的减排，以应对模型不确定性。
abstract_cn: 评估气候政策的经济影响对于制定气候变化应对方案至关重要。评估减缓政策选项的典型方法之一是使用气候-经济综合模型，分析减少温室气体排放的成本与降低气候损害收益之间的权衡关系。然而，这些模型所固有的不确定性给政策制定者带来了重大挑战。我们采用稳健决策框架来评估减缓政策，以应对这一难题。研究表明，从追求预期结果最大化的决策框架转向规避遗憾的决策框架，将要求更积极的减排行动。社会经济轨迹的不确定性、气候损害的程度及其函数形式的不确定性，共同导致了弱减缓政策的不对称后果，从而促使在不确定性面前采取积极的减排行动与预防性措施。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究气候变化政策中的减排决策，使用气候-经济模型和稳健决策框架，分析模型不确定性对最优减排路径的影响。不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的核心主题。商业银行为0分，货币政策为0分，财政政策为0分。

title: Answering Without Referring: How AI Search Rewrites the Web's Economic Bargain
abstract: Search engines have long allocated attention on the web by routing users from queries to websites. AI search changes this arrangement because information needs can be resolved inside the intermediary. Using URL-level Comscore U.S. desktop clickstream, we compare ChatGPT and Google information-seeking occasions and exploit ChatGPT Search access expansions to estimate traditional search displacement. ChatGPT produces outbound clicks in only 5.2% of conversation sessions, far below Google's referral ratio. The remaining clicks are not a scaled-down Google stream: they skew toward specialized destinations and away from ad-supported sites. Wider access cuts search use by 9.4%, with search-referral losses largest for informational categories. Our findings identify a central economic shift in digital intermediation: AI search might satisfy information needs inside the intermediary while weakening the referral bargain that has linked search, traffic, and content production on the open web.
tldr: 该论文发现AI搜索引擎（如ChatGPT）仅在5.2%的对话中产生外链点击，远低于传统搜索引擎，且点击偏向专业网站而非广告支持网站，从而削弱了传统搜索的推荐经济模式。
abstract_cn: 长期以来，搜索引擎通过将用户从查询引导至网站来分配网络上的注意力。AI搜索改变了这一格局，因为信息需求可以在中介平台内部得到满足。利用基于URL级别的Comscore美国桌面端点击流数据，我们比较了ChatGPT与Google的信息搜索场景，并借助ChatGPT搜索访问权限的扩展来估算其对传统搜索的替代效应。ChatGPT仅有5.2%的对话会话产生外链点击，远低于Google的推荐比例。剩余点击并非Google流量的缩减版：它们更倾向于专业类网站，而远离广告支持的站点。更广泛的访问权限使搜索使用量下降9.4%，其中信息类内容因搜索推荐造成的流量损失最为显著。我们的研究结果揭示了数字中介领域的一个核心经济转变：AI搜索可能在满足中介内部信息需求的同时，削弱了连接开放网络上搜索、流量与内容生产的推荐机制。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究AI搜索引擎（ChatGPT）对传统搜索引擎（Google）的替代效应及其对网站流量和广告收入的影响，属于数字平台经济学和互联网中介领域。不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的任何核心主题，如银行信贷、利率、通胀、政府支出或债务等。因此三个领域均为0分。

title: Helping Hands, Healthier Infants: The Effect of Medicaid Doula Coverage Mandates on Birth Outcomes
abstract: Over the last decade a wave of U.S. states began reimbursing doula services through Medicaid, hoping to improve infant health and narrow stark racial gaps in birth outcomes. I evaluate these mandates using the staggered 2021-2024 rollout, a panel of 32.1 million births from CDC WONDER (2016-2024), and a newly assembled measure of the state doula workforce drawn from the national provider registry. Identification comes from the policy's timing rather than from comparing doula users to non-users, addressing the selection problem that limits the existing observational literature. On average I find no detectable effect on low birth weight (LBW). Consistent with the heterogeneity emphasized by Peet (2022) and the maternal-health-disparities literature, however, the effect concentrates among the group at greatest risk: Black mothers, for whom LBW falls by roughly half a percentage point (about 5% of the baseline) in the states with the longest exposure, with flat pre-trends and a coherent upward shift in the birth-weight distribution. The estimate is marginal once I use inference valid for few treated clusters, and the binding constraint is statistical power: most mandates took effect in 2024-2025, at or beyond the end of the data. A two-stage least squares analysis shows that coverage roughly doubles the doula workforce (first-stage F approximately 21-35), and that the induced increase in doula supply is associated with lower Black LBW, though imprecisely. I read the results as credible early evidence that doula mandates work where they have had time to operate and where the need is greatest, rather than as a finished causal claim.
tldr: 该论文评估美国各州Medicaid导乐服务覆盖指令对婴儿出生结果的影响，发现总体上对低出生体重无显著影响，但黑人母亲在长期暴露的州中低出生体重下降约0.5个百分点。
abstract_cn: 过去十年间，美国多州陆续开始通过医疗补助计划（Medicaid）报销导乐服务，以期改善婴儿健康状况并缩小出生结局中显著的种族差异。我利用2021-2024年分阶段推行的政策、来自CDC WONDER数据库（2016-2024年）涵盖3210万出生人口的的面板数据，以及从国家医疗服务提供者注册中心新汇编的州级导乐劳动力指标，对这些政策指令进行了评估。识别策略基于政策实施的时间节点，而非比较导乐服务使用者与非使用者，从而解决了限制现有观察性文献的选择性问题。平均而言，未发现这些政策对低出生体重（LBW）产生可检测的影响。然而，与Peet（2022）及孕产妇健康差异文献所强调的异质性一致，该效应集中于风险最高的群体：在政策实施时间最长的州，黑人母亲的LBW下降了约0.5个百分点（约为基线的5%），且事前趋势平稳，出生体重分布呈现连贯的右移。一旦采用适用于少量处理组的推断方法，该估计值便不再显著，而关键制约因素在于统计效力：多数政策指令于2024-2025年生效，恰逢或超出数据覆盖的终点。两阶段最小二乘分析表明，政策覆盖使导乐劳动力规模大致翻倍（第一阶段F值约为21-35），且由此引发的导乐供给增加与黑人LBW降低相关，尽管估计精度不足。我将这些结果解读为可信的初步证据，表明导乐政策在已有时间发挥作用且需求最为迫切的领域确实有效，而非一项定论的因果主张。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：财政政策 2.0/10。commercial_banking: 论文研究Medicaid对导乐服务的报销政策，与商业银行、信贷、银行监管等完全无关。monetary_policy: 不涉及中央银行政策、利率、通胀等货币政策内容。fiscal_policy: 虽然Medicaid是政府支出项目，但论文聚焦于健康结果而非财政工具本身，仅间接涉及公共支出，未研究预算、税收、债务等核心财政问题，因此评分较低。最高匹配领域为fiscal_policy，但仅为背景关联。

title: Cascading Effects of the COVID-19 Pandemic on Barangays in the Philippines
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic disrupted socio-economic and healthcare systems in the Philippines, significantly affecting barangays. This study analyzes the cascading effects of the COVID-19 pandemic on key aspects of a barangay, namely mobility, accessibility of public services, economic and financial health, food security, educational engagement, and physical health. It focuses on data from 2,122 Filipino households collected during May to June 2021 as part of the World Bank COVID-19 Households Survey. A Bayesian network model was constructed to programmatically map the conditional dependencies among these variables, utilizing Python libraries. Survey responses were grouped into common variables based on shared characteristics and standardized through z-score normalization to serve as nodes in the Bayesian network. By extending the Bayesian network into an influence diagram, the results will help identify interventions to guide local government units (LGUs) and policymakers in crafting tailored recovery programs and strategies that address impacts on physical health, economic and financial health, food security, public service access, mobility, and educational engagement. These efforts ultimately aim to enhance barangay resilience and preparedness for future public health crises. The results indicate that interventions aimed at boosting food production, stabilizing market prices, and expanding income opportunities are the most effective in improving community outcomes. This highlights the vital role of targeted economic and food security measures in mitigating the socio-economic impacts of the pandemic and offers valuable insights for shaping future response and recovery efforts.
tldr: 该研究利用贝叶斯网络分析COVID-19疫情对菲律宾社区的多方面影响，发现提升食品生产、稳定市场价格和扩大收入机会是最有效的干预措施。
abstract_cn: COVID-19疫情扰乱了菲律宾的社会经济与医疗保健体系，对基层社区（barangay）产生了显著影响。本研究分析了COVID-19疫情对基层社区关键方面的级联效应，包括流动性、公共服务可及性、经济与财务健康、粮食安全、教育参与度以及身体健康。研究聚焦于2021年5月至6月期间收集的2,122户菲律宾家庭数据，这些数据是世界银行COVID-19家庭调查（World Bank COVID-19 Households Survey）的一部分。利用Python库构建了贝叶斯网络模型（Bayesian network model），以程序化方式映射这些变量之间的条件依赖关系。基于共同特征将调查响应分组为通用变量，并通过z-score标准化（z-score normalization）处理，作为贝叶斯网络中的节点。通过将贝叶斯网络扩展为影响图（influence diagram），研究结果将有助于识别干预措施，以指导地方政府单位（LGUs）和政策制定者制定针对性的恢复计划与策略，应对在身体健康、经济与财务健康、粮食安全、公共服务获取、流动性及教育参与度方面的影响。这些努力最终旨在增强基层社区对未来公共卫生危机的韧性与 preparedness。结果表明，旨在促进粮食生产、稳定市场价格及扩大收入机会的干预措施在改善社区成效方面最为有效。这凸显了有针对性的经济与粮食安全措施在缓解疫情社会经济影响中的关键作用，并为制定未来的应对与恢复工作提供了宝贵见解。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：财政政策 2.0/10。commercial_banking: 论文研究社区层面的社会经济影响，不涉及银行或信贷中介，得0分。monetary_policy: 未讨论货币政策工具、传导或政策含义，得0分。fiscal_policy: 论文提及政府干预和公共支出，但主要关注社区恢复而非财政政策核心议题（如预算、税收、债务），仅作为背景，得2分。最高匹配领域为fiscal_policy，但分数低。

title: The Joneses Visit an Economics Lab
abstract: Existing literature offers persuasive evidence that individuals care about how their consumption compares to that of peers, and proposes a large variety of explanatory models. The present paper proposes a common framework for many of those models, and compares their ability to predict behavior in a laboratory experiment. We find evidence of Keeping up with the Joneses motivations but also find that conspicuous consumption is enhanced by Veblen motivations arising from peers' ability to observe one's own choice. Among the seven quasi-linear preference models we compare, our data are best explained by a model that contrasts envy and pride (upward vs downward comparisons) using a value function borrowed from Prospect Theory.
tldr: 该论文通过实验室实验比较了多种关于消费比较的偏好模型，发现攀比效应和凡勃伦效应（炫耀性消费）共同影响行为，其中基于前景理论的价值函数模型最能解释数据。
abstract_cn: 现有文献提供了令人信服的证据，表明个体在意自身消费与同龄人消费的比较，并提出了多种解释模型。本文为其中许多模型构建了一个通用框架，并在实验室实验中比较了它们预测行为的能力。我们发现了“赶超琼斯”动机的证据，但也发现由同龄人观察自身选择的能力所引发的凡勃伦动机增强了炫耀性消费。在我们比较的七种拟线性偏好模型中，采用前景理论中的价值函数来对比嫉妒与自豪（向上比较与向下比较）的模型最能解释我们的数据。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究消费比较偏好（攀比效应和炫耀性消费），通过实验室实验检验多种偏好模型。完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。

title: Thermodynamic description of worldwide distribution of energy and carbon emission
abstract: Based on public data, we analyze the distributions of energy and carbon emission over world countries on a scale of the last 40-50 years using their presentation via Lorenz and Pareto curves. These curves in rescaled format remain remarkably stable on this time period being characterized by high values of the Gini coefficient indicating a strong inequality of energy distribution. To explain these distributions, we introduce the ENergy Thermalization Hypothesis (ENTH) according to which these distributions result from the Rayleigh-Jeans (RJ) thermalization and condensation of agents representing different countries. We show that this hypothesis provides an excellent description of Lorenz and Pareto curves obtained from data on the above time period. It also gives natural grounds for inequality relating it to the RJ condensation at low energy states. We additionally trace parallels with the wealth inequality in the world.
tldr: 该论文基于全球能源和碳排放数据，提出能量热化假说（ENTH）来解释分布的不平等性，与银行、货币或财政政策无关。
abstract_cn: 基于公开数据，我们利用洛伦兹曲线和帕累托曲线对过去40至50年间世界各国能源与碳排放的分布进行了分析。这些曲线在重新标度后在该时间段内保持高度稳定，其特征是基尼系数值较高，表明能源分布存在显著不平等。为解释这些分布，我们提出能量热化假说（ENergy Thermalization Hypothesis, ENTH），该假说认为这些分布源于代表不同国家的行为体的瑞利-金斯（Rayleigh-Jeans, RJ）热化与凝聚过程。我们证明，该假说能够极好地描述基于上述时间段数据所得的洛伦兹曲线与帕累托曲线，并为这种不平等提供了自然解释，将其与低能态下的瑞利-金斯凝聚相联系。此外，我们还将其与全球财富不平等进行了类比分析。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究全球能源和碳排放分布的统计物理描述，提出能量热化假说，使用洛伦兹曲线和帕累托曲线分析不平等。完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。因此三个领域均为0分。

title: Memory Scarcity, Open Models, and the Restructuring of the AI Industry, 2026-2030 -- A quantitative scenario analysis of inference economics, training-cost divergence, and infrastructure solvency
abstract: We analyze how four forces restructure the AI industry over 2026-2030: the DRAM/HBM price surge, frontier-capable open-weight models (GLM-5.2), rapid inference-efficiency gains (near-Shannon-limit KV-cache compression, lightweight local runtimes), and the entry of Meta and xAI into compute resale on fleets bought before the memory repricing. Formulating inference economics in dollars per petabyte of bandwidth delivered (\$/PB) -- model-agnostic for bandwidth-bound decode -- we show the entrant-incumbent cost gap never closes: a depreciation conveyor delivers newly amortized fleets to incumbents faster than hardware prices normalize (3.2x in 2026, 1.9x in 2027, re-widening to 3-4x by 2029-30). Training bifurcates into a luxury tier (\$18-38B per frontier run by 2030) and a mass tier (previous-frontier parity via RL/distillation falling toward \$5M). Solvency of the announced buildout is confined to a corridor requiring roughly 2x annual token-demand growth for four years with sticky premium pricing; a measurement critique shows public token trackers overstate monetizable demand, and all pre-Q2-2026 projections predate the industry's shift from token maximization to token minimization. A vintage-breakeven analysis finds 2026 and 2028-29 capacity each fatally exposed to one pricing regime, with only the 2027 vintage robust. A greenfield custom-silicon entrant removes the merchant margin but not the memory premium (central outcome: 25% success/34% mediocre/41% loss, improvable via staged go/no-go gates). China's LineShine LX2 -- domestic HBM on a standard ISA -- decouples its cost curve from the memory crisis. Scenario probabilities: Rotating Landlord Oligopoly 25%, Commoditization Crash 25%, Jevons Absorption 20%, System-Layer Re-differentiation 18%, Geopolitical Bifurcation 12%. Solvency now depends on monetized bandwidth demand, premium stickiness, and vintage ownership.
tldr: 该论文分析2026-2030年AI行业因内存价格飙升、开放模型、推理效率提升和计算转售四大力量导致的重组，指出新进入者与现有企业的成本差距无法弥合，训练成本分化，基础设施偿付能力受限。
abstract_cn: 我们分析了2026-2030年间重塑AI行业的四大力量：DRAM/HBM价格飙升、前沿级开放权重模型（GLM-5.2）、推理效率的快速提升（接近香农极限的KV缓存压缩、轻量级本地运行时），以及Meta和xAI在内存重新定价前购入的算力集群上进入计算转售市场。通过以每PB带宽交付的美元数（$/PB）来表述推理经济学——该指标与模型无关，适用于带宽受限的解码阶段——我们表明，新进入者与现有企业之间的成本差距从未弥合：一条折旧传送带使新摊销的算力集群更快地交付给现有企业，其速度超过了硬件价格正常化的速度（2026年为3.2倍，2027年为1.9倍，到2029-30年重新扩大至3-4倍）。训练分化为两个层级：奢侈层级（到2030年，每次前沿模型运行成本为180-380亿美元）和大众层级（通过强化学习/蒸馏技术，此前沿模型成本降至约500万美元）。已宣布的算力建设项目的偿付能力被限制在一个狭窄区间内，该区间要求代币需求在大约四年内保持约两倍的年增长率，并伴随粘性溢价定价；一项测量批评指出，公开的代币追踪器高估了可货币化的需求，且所有2026年第二季度之前的预测都早于行业从代币最大化向代币最小化的转变。一项年份盈亏平衡分析发现，2026年及2028-29年的算力产能各自致命地暴露于一种定价机制之下，唯有2027年的产能表现稳健。一家从零起步的自研芯片新进入者消除了商业中间商的利润，但未能消除内存溢价（核心结果：25%成功/34%平庸/41%亏损，可通过分阶段的门控决策机制加以改善）。中国的LineShine LX2——基于标准指令集架构的国产HBM——使其成本曲线与内存危机脱钩。情景概率：旋转房东寡头垄断25%，商品化崩盘25%，杰文斯吸收20%，系统层再差异化18%，地缘政治分化12%。偿付能力现在取决于货币化的带宽需求、溢价粘性以及年份算力所有权。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究AI行业的结构重组，聚焦于内存价格、开源模型、推理经济学和基础设施偿付能力，完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。没有银行、信贷、利率、通胀、政府支出等任何相关主题。

title: Identifying the MPC-Liquidity Gradient in High-Quality Data
abstract: We estimate the gradient of the Marginal Propensity to Consume (MPC) with respect to liquidity using a new estimator designed for administrative data with negligible measurement error in income. We derive a state-dependent consumption pass-through equation from the canonical buffer-stock model, and show that the pass-through coefficient of this equation can be used to construct tight bounds on the MPC conditional on the relevant state. We recover latent permanent and transitory income shocks with a Kalman smoother and use them as regressors in an empirical representation of the consumption equation. The Kalman-shock estimator identifies the theoretical pass-through coefficient under the assumption of negligible measurement error in income, and attains the minimum variance within the class of estimators that are linear in household income histories, including the canonical GMM estimator by Blundell et al (2008) and recent refinements thereof. Applying the method to Swedish administrative tax registers, we show that consumption responses to transitory shocks have a sharp negative and convex gradient with respect to cash-on-hand; the associated annual MPC falls from 0.7 in the lowest cash-on-hand decile to 0.3 in the top decile. The permanent-shock pass-through is close to one across the cash-on-hand distribution. These patterns are not visible when using traditional, less efficient, estimators.
tldr: 该论文利用瑞典行政数据估计了边际消费倾向（MPC）相对于流动性的梯度，发现消费对暂时性冲击的反应随现金持有量增加而急剧下降，而永久性冲击的传导系数接近1。
abstract_cn: 我们利用一种针对行政数据设计的新估计量，估算了边际消费倾向（MPC）关于流动性的梯度，该数据中收入的测量误差可忽略不计。我们从经典缓冲存货模型中推导出一个依赖于状态的消费传导方程，并证明该方程的传导系数可用于构建在相关状态条件下MPC的紧致边界。我们通过卡尔曼平滑法恢复了潜在的持久性和暂时性收入冲击，并将其作为消费方程实证表示中的回归变量。在收入测量误差可忽略的假设下，卡尔曼冲击估计量能够识别理论传导系数，并在基于家庭收入历史的线性估计量类别中达到最小方差，这包括Blundell等人（2008）提出的经典广义矩估计（GMM）方法及其近期改进。将该方法应用于瑞典行政税收登记数据后，我们发现，消费对暂时性冲击的反应随手持现金呈显著的负向凸性梯度；相应的年度MPC从手持现金最低十分位组的0.7下降至最高十分位组的0.3。持久性冲击的传导系数在手持现金分布中接近1。当使用传统且效率较低的估计量时，这些模式无法显现。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究边际消费倾向（MPC）与流动性的关系，使用瑞典行政数据估计消费对收入冲击的反应。研究问题属于家庭消费行为，不涉及商业银行、货币政策工具或财政政策。没有银行、央行或政府收支相关内容，因此三个领域均得0分。

title: Will AstroForge Collapse the PGM Market?
abstract: AstroForge seeks to mine platinum group metals (PGM) from asteroids. Asteroid reserves appear to be unlimited, and at current market price the gross margin of asteroid mining would be very high. It is natural to ask: when AstroForge successfully demonstrates economic space mining of PGM, will they cause the PGM market to collapse? We answer the question with a non-steady system dynamics model of the PGM market. We find that the market price for PGM will eventually drop towards the much lower cost of asteroid mining, but only after the entire supply has shifted off-world. In the meanwhile, huge fortunes will be made. And everybody on Earth will benefit from new applications of lower-price PGM.
tldr: 该论文通过系统动力学模型分析小行星采矿对铂族金属市场的影响，发现价格最终会降至采矿成本，但在此之前可获巨额利润。
abstract_cn: AstroForge 旨在从小行星中开采铂族金属（PGM）。小行星上的储量似乎是无限的，且按当前市场价格计算，小行星采矿的毛利率将非常高。一个自然的问题是：当AstroForge成功证明铂族金属的经济性太空采矿时，是否会导致铂族金属市场崩溃？我们通过一个铂族金属市场的非稳态系统动力学模型来回答这一问题。研究发现，铂族金属的市场价格最终将降至远低于小行星采矿成本的水平，但这只有在全部供应转向地外之后才会发生。与此同时，巨额财富将被创造出来。而地球上的每一个人都将从低价铂族金属的新应用中受益。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究小行星采矿对铂族金属市场的影响，使用系统动力学模型分析价格变化。不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策，与三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Does Financial Trading Smooth Non-Convex Markets?
abstract: In non-convex markets, a competitive equilibrium may fail to exist. This turns out to be an important issue in real-world non-convex auction markets, such as electricity markets, as it complicates pricing and requires the auctioneer to resort to out-of-market discriminatory side payments to sustain an equilibrium. We investigate whether the introduction of convex financial trading induces a smoothing effect, mitigating the issues arising from non-convexities. We develop a two-stage non-convex market model (a forward market followed by a spot market) in which convex financial traders participate in the forward market. Our model predicts that financial trading reduces the magnitude of side payments required to support the cleared allocation. To test the prediction of our model, we examine the introduction of a transaction fee on financial traders in 2020 by PJM, the US's largest electricity market. We show that the substantial decline in financial trading volume caused by this policy coincided with a significant increase in side payments, in line with our theoretical predictions.
tldr: 该论文研究金融交易是否能够平滑非凸市场中的问题，发现金融交易减少了对非凸性所需的额外支付，并通过PJM电力市场的交易费政策变化验证了这一预测。
abstract_cn: 在非凸市场中，竞争均衡可能不存在。这在现实世界的非凸拍卖市场（如电力市场）中成为一个重要问题，因为它使定价复杂化，并要求拍卖方诉诸市场外的歧视性附加支付（side payments）来维持均衡。我们研究引入凸性金融交易是否会产生平滑效应，从而缓解由非凸性引发的问题。我们构建了一个两阶段非凸市场模型（远期市场 followed by 现货市场），其中凸性金融交易者参与远期市场。我们的模型预测，金融交易会降低支撑已出清配置所需的附加支付规模。为检验模型预测，我们考察了美国最大电力市场PJM于2020年对金融交易者征收交易费的政策。研究表明，该政策导致的金融交易量大幅下降与附加支付显著增加同时发生，这与我们的理论预测一致。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究非凸市场中的金融交易平滑效应，以电力市场为例，涉及金融交易和拍卖设计，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。

title: The U.S. Mortality Crisis as a Preston Curve Reversal
abstract: U.S. life expectancy stagnated and declined in the 2010s despite continued growth in real per capita income. We use Preston curves to characterize this pattern as a change in the relationship between income and longevity. Using state-level data from 1980 to 2019 and county-level data from 2000 to 2019, we estimate population-weighted Preston curves relating life expectancy to logged real per capita income. From 1980 to 2010, U.S. states followed the classic Preston curve pattern: rising income was accompanied by rising life expectancy. Counties followed the same pattern from 2000 to 2010. From 2010 to 2019, however, states and continued to become richer while life expectancy stagnated or declined. The curves shifted right without shifting up and became steeper, indicating decoupling and divergence: increases in aggregate resources over time no longer produced broad longevity gains, and, in any given year, inequality in life expectancy by income grew. These patterns are robust to alternative temporal anchors around the Great Recession and to substituting education for income. They also appear across sex and racial groups. County-level decompositions are broadly consistent with arguments that longevity has fallen due to widely shared exposure to social deterioration, which may account for the Preston curve reversal. Collectively, we show that the recent U.S. mortality crisis reveals a weakening -- and growing inequality -- in the conversion of aggregate resources into longevity gains. We conclude that the recent U.S. mortality crisis should be understood not only as a story about particular causes of death, but also as a weakening of institutional and social translation.
tldr: 该论文发现2010年代美国预期寿命停滞或下降，而收入持续增长，表明收入与寿命的关系发生逆转，且不平等加剧。
abstract_cn: 美国预期寿命在2010年代停滞并下降，尽管实际人均收入持续增长。我们利用普雷斯顿曲线（Preston curves）将这一模式刻画为收入与寿命之间关系的变化。基于1980年至2019年的州级数据以及2000年至2019年的县级数据，我们估算了将预期寿命与对数实际人均收入相关联的人口加权普雷斯顿曲线。从1980年到2010年，美国各州遵循经典的普雷斯顿曲线模式：收入上升伴随预期寿命上升。各县在2000年至2010年间也遵循相同模式。然而，从2010年到2019年，各州及各县持续变得更加富裕，而预期寿命却停滞或下降。曲线向右平移但未向上移动，且变得更加陡峭，这表明脱钩与分化：随着时间的推移，总体资源的增加不再带来广泛的寿命增益，并且在任何给定年份，预期寿命随收入的不平等性加剧。这些模式在大衰退（Great Recession）前后替换时间锚点、以及以教育替代收入的情况下依然稳健。它们在不同性别和种族群体中也同样显现。县级分解结果与以下论点基本一致：寿命下降是由于广泛共同面临的社会恶化（social deterioration）所致，这或许可以解释普雷斯顿曲线的逆转。总体而言，我们表明，近期美国死亡率危机揭示了总体资源转化为寿命增益的能力正在减弱——且不平等性日益加剧。我们得出结论，近期美国死亡率危机不仅应被理解为特定死因的故事，更应被视为制度与社会转化能力的弱化。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究美国死亡率危机与收入-寿命关系（Preston曲线逆转），涉及收入、教育、社会恶化等，完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Failure Privacy and Safe Collective Expression
abstract: Widely held views can go unspoken when speaking out alone invites retaliation. I recast such silence as a problem of safe coalition formation. When safety comes in numbers, there is a largest group that could speak safely. Open organizing must stay safe every step the way, making for a cascade of speaking up that stops short of that largest group. Social assurance contracts need safety only at the destination, and get there by keeping commitments private until enough people have joined: a tunnel to the largest safe group. If no member may ever regret joining, such failure privacy is necessary, not merely sufficient.
tldr: 该论文研究当个人单独表达可能招致报复时，广泛持有的观点如何通过安全联盟形成和社会保证契约得以表达，并论证了失败隐私的必要性。
abstract_cn: 广泛持有的观点可能无人言说，因为单独发声会招致报复。我将这种沉默重新定义为安全联盟形成的问题。当安全取决于人数时，存在一个能够安全发声的最大群体。公开组织必须在每一步都确保安全，这导致了一种止步于该最大群体的逐级发声过程。社会保证契约（social assurance contracts）仅需在最终目的地实现安全，其实现方式是在足够多人加入之前保持承诺的私密性：这是一条通往最大安全群体的隧道。如果任何成员都不得对加入感到后悔，那么这种失败隐私（failure privacy）是必要的，而不仅仅是充分的。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究的是集体表达中的安全联盟形成问题，涉及隐私和协调机制，属于博弈论或社会选择理论范畴。与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无任何实质关联。

title: From Gravity to Confinement: Wealth Redistribution as Optimal Drift Design in the Fokker-Planck Framework
abstract:
A proportional wealth tax acts as a uniform gravitational field on the wealth distribution: it shifts the drift of the Fokker-Planck equation without altering the diffusion, preserving the Gini coefficient at all finite times. The same drift-shift symmetry that makes the tax non-distortionary also makes it non-redistributive through the market channel. Redistribution requires breaking this symmetry. A progressive tax (confining potential) replaces the Pareto steady state with a thinner-tailed distribution whose Gini is a closed-form function of the progressivity parameter; source-sink terms (tax-funded transfers) reshape the density directly.
  We formulate optimal redistribution as a control problem for the Fokker-Planck equation, penalising intervention costs including migration, evasion, and portfolio distortion. In general equilibrium the tax design feeds back through aggregate capital and the production function, yielding a self-consistent McKean-Vlasov equation with diminishing returns to progressivity. The spectral gap of the Fokker-Planck operator determines convergence speed: progressive taxes redistribute within policy-relevant timescales, whereas proportional taxes rely on slow demographic turnover.
tldr: 该论文通过Fokker-Planck框架研究财富税设计，发现比例税不改变不平等，而累进税和转移支付能有效再分配财富，并求解最优再分配问题。
abstract_cn:
比例财富税对财富分布的作用类似于均匀引力场：它改变了福克-普朗克方程的漂移项，但不影响扩散项，从而在任意有限时间内保持基尼系数不变。这种使税收无扭曲效应的漂移-对称性，也使其无法通过市场渠道实现再分配。再分配需要打破这一对称性。累进税（约束势）用尾部更薄的分布取代了帕累托稳态，其基尼系数是累进性参数的闭式函数；源-汇项（税收资助的转移支付）则直接重塑密度分布。

我们将最优再分配表述为福克-普朗克方程的控制问题，并对包括移民、避税和投资组合扭曲在内的干预成本施加惩罚。在一般均衡中，税收设计通过总资本和生产函数产生反馈，形成具有累进性边际收益递减的自洽麦克基恩-弗拉索夫方程。福克-普朗克算子的谱间隙决定了收敛速度：累进税能在政策相关的时间尺度内实现再分配，而比例税则依赖于缓慢的人口结构更替。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：财政政策 5.0/10。论文研究财富再分配的最优设计，使用Fokker-Planck框架分析比例税和累进税对财富分布的影响。虽然涉及税收（财政政策主题），但论文是数学经济学/物理经济学方法，不研究财政政策的宏观经济效应、政府预算、债务或财政乘数等核心问题。税收仅作为财富再分配的工具，而非财政政策本身。因此财政政策得5分（实质关联但不是主线）。商业银行和货币政策与论文无关，得0分。

title: Fighting discrimination with reputation: The case of online platforms
abstract: On a large French ridesharing platform, new minority drivers earn 11.6% less revenue than otherwise similar nonminority drivers; the gap nearly vanishes as they accumulate reviews. Reviews drive the convergence: when a railway strike exogenously raised demand and sped up review accumulation, minority entrants gained the most. We explain the pattern with an estimated model of passenger choice and driver career concerns. Passengers hold overly pessimistic priors about minority entrants - expecting substantially lower quality before the ride than they report after it. As a result, minority drivers cut introductory prices and exert extra effort to overturn those beliefs quickly. Counterfactuals show the cost of incorrect priors is high, and the reputation system strictly benefits minority drivers.
tldr: 该论文研究在线平台上的种族歧视问题，发现少数族裔司机初始收入较低，但通过积累评价可以缩小差距，声誉系统有助于减少歧视。
abstract_cn: 在法国某大型拼车平台上，新加入的少数族裔司机相较于条件相似的非少数族裔司机，收入低11.6%；随着评价积累，这一差距几乎消失。评价驱动了趋同过程：当铁路罢工外生地提升需求并加速评价积累时，少数族裔新司机获益最大。我们通过构建乘客选择与司机职业发展模型来解释这一现象。乘客对少数族裔新司机持有过度悲观的先验信念——在乘车前预期其服务质量远低于乘车后的实际评价。因此，少数族裔司机通过降低初始定价并付出额外努力，迅速扭转这些偏见。反事实分析表明，错误先验信念的成本高昂，而声誉系统对少数族裔司机具有显著的正面作用。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究在线拼车平台上的歧视与声誉机制，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。商业银行为0分，因为不涉及银行或信贷中介；货币政策为0分，因为不涉及中央银行政策或通胀；财政政策为0分，因为不涉及政府收支或债务。

title: Structural Divergence of the Roman--Byzantine Trade Network, 0--1453\,CE: Persistent Homology, Topological Velocity, and Criticality Indicators of Imperial Collapse
abstract:
We extend the persistent homology analysis of~\paperone{} to the full Roman--Byzantine trade network (0--1453\,\textsc{ce}), using 2{,}599 nodes and 4{,}503 trimodal edges calibrated against the \textsc{orbis} Geospatial Network Model. Five results are reported. %
(i)~The $H_t{=}0$ western sub-network result of~\paperone{} is a data-coverage artifact: with full western representation ($N_{\rm west}=987$, $β_1\approx52$ cycles per decade) a baseline East--West entropy gap of $+2.22$ units is present from 0\,\textsc{ce} and grows at $+3.3\times10^{-3}$\,yr$^{-1}$, predating the Theodosian partition by four centuries. %
(ii)~A \emph{hub-selection artifact} in degree-heterogeneous networks can reverse the sign of the inferred Phase~III slope, requiring full-coverage or stratified sampling for reliable structural-break detection. %
(iii)~Decomposing Byzantine resilience into geographic ($H_{\rm geo}$) and economic ($H_{\rm eco}$) components reveals a peak decoupling ratio $R_d = H_{\rm eco}/H_{\rm geo} = 47.7$ at 620\,\textsc{ce}, falling to 13.9 at 640\,\textsc{ce}, quantifying the McCormick--Ward-Perkins historiographical debate as a contrast between two network layers operating on different timescales. %
(iv)~The inter-decade $W_2$ Wasserstein velocity identifies the Late Roman--Early Byzantine transition (495\,\textsc{ce}) as the highest topological-velocity event of the 1,453-year record; the cross-network Wasserstein ratio increases by $150$--$300\times$ after the Chrysobull of 1082\,\textsc{ce}, providing an independent diagram-space analogue of $R_d$. Both the Western collapse (476\,\textsc{ce}) and the Byzantine endpoint (1453\,\textsc{ce}) occur at $H^{\ast}\approx0.524$, interpreted as a candidate topological percolation threshold.
tldr: 该论文通过持续同调分析罗马-拜占庭贸易网络（0-1453年）的结构分歧，发现东西方熵差距早在帝国分裂前就已存在，并识别出拓扑速度峰值和渗流阈值等关键指标。
abstract_cn:
我们将\paperone{}的持续同调分析扩展至完整的罗马-拜占庭贸易网络（公元0–1453年），使用了2,599个节点和4,503条经\textsc{orbis}地理空间网络模型校准的三模态边。报告了五项结果：  
（i）\paperone{}中$H_t{=}0$的西部子网络结果是数据覆盖的人为产物：在完整的西部表征下（$N_{\rm west}=987$，每十年$β_1\approx52$个循环），从公元0年起即存在基线东西熵差$+2.22$单位，并以$+3.3\times10^{-3}$\,yr$^{-1}$的速度增长，比狄奥多西分治早四个世纪。  
（ii）在度异质网络中，一种\textit{枢纽选择人为产物}可能逆转推断的第三阶段斜率符号，因此需要全覆盖或分层抽样以实现可靠的结构断点检测。  
（iii）将拜占庭韧性分解为地理（$H_{\rm geo}$）与经济（$H_{\rm eco}$）成分，揭示出在公元620年解耦比峰值$R_d = H_{\rm eco}/H_{\rm geo} = 47.7$，至公元640年降至13.9，从而将McCormick–Ward-Perkins史学辩论量化为两个在不同时间尺度上运行的网络层之间的对比。  
（iv）十年间$W_2$ Wasserstein速度将罗马晚期–拜占庭早期过渡期（公元495年）识别为1,453年记录中拓扑速度最高的事件；在公元1082年《金玺诏书》之后，跨网络Wasserstein比增加了$150$–$300$倍，提供了$R_d$的独立图空间类比。西部崩溃（公元476年）与拜占庭终点（公元1453年）均发生在$H^{\ast}\approx0.524$处，这被解读为一个候选的拓扑逾渗阈值。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究罗马-拜占庭贸易网络的结构演变，使用持续同调等拓扑方法分析历史网络数据，完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。没有银行、信贷、利率、通胀、政府支出、税收等任何相关主题。因此三个领域均为0分。

title: The Geography of Private Sector Agricultural Innovation in the USA: Evidence from Patents
abstract: This paper develops a novel estimates of annual private sector agricultural R&D at the level of US states for the period 1976-2014. For each of five different agricultural subsectors, I allocate estimates of national private sector R&D across the 50 states by using the geographic distribution of inventors listed on contemporaneous US patents in the same agricultural subsector. These five subsectors comprise a large majority of total private sector agricultural R&D. I then use this new dataset to document three stylized facts about private sector agricultural R&D: it is highly correlated with the size of the state's agricultural economy (including over time, as well as in cross section), it is highly persistent, and is has become increasingly less concentrated over 1976-2014, though this last trend shows signs of reversing.
tldr: 该论文利用专利数据估计美国各州私营农业研发支出，并揭示了其与农业经济规模高度相关、高度持久且集中度下降的趋势。
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种针对1976-2014年间美国各州年度私营部门农业研发（R&D）的新型估算方法。针对五个不同的农业子部门，我利用同期同一农业子部门美国专利中列出的发明人地理分布，将全国私营部门研发（R&D）的估算值分配至50个州。这五个子部门涵盖了私营部门农业研发（R&D）的绝大部分。随后，我利用这一新数据集记录了关于私营部门农业研发（R&D）的三个典型事实：它与各州农业经济规模高度相关（包括时间序列与横截面维度），具有高度持续性，并且在1976-2014年间集中度持续下降，尽管这一趋势近期显现出逆转迹象。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究美国各州私人部门农业研发的地理分布，使用专利数据估计研发支出，与商业银行、货币政策或财政政策无任何实质关联。三个领域均得0分。

title: Fooling Yourself: how narratives shape beliefs
abstract: Decision-makers usually receive information through narratives that combine diagnostic evidence with nondiagnostic details. In a laboratory experiment, we study how such nondiagnostic clues affect belief updating. Participants repeatedly report beliefs in a Bayesian inference task within a narrative context. Reduced-form estimates and subject-level classifications show that nondiagnostic narrative clues systematically induce belief revision toward maximal uncertainty, weakening previously accumulated diagnostic evidence. This effect is weaker in an equivalent abstract context and disappears in an identical narrative task when nondiagnostic clues are replaced by no-information messages. We assess the economic significance of such return to uncertainty by showing that it delays belief convergence, thereby increasing the amount of information agents require before making a decision.
tldr: 该论文通过实验室实验研究叙事中的非诊断性细节如何导致信念回归不确定性，从而延迟信念收敛。
abstract_cn: 决策者通常通过结合诊断性证据与非诊断性细节的叙述来接收信息。在一项实验室实验中，我们研究了此类非诊断性线索如何影响信念更新。参与者在叙述情境中重复报告贝叶斯推理任务中的信念。简化形式估计与受试者层面分类表明，非诊断性叙述线索系统性地促使信念向最大不确定性方向修正，从而削弱了先前积累的诊断性证据。在等效的抽象情境中，该效应较弱；而在相同的叙述任务中，当非诊断性线索被无信息消息替代时，该效应消失。我们通过展示这种“回归不确定性”会延迟信念收敛，从而增加决策者所需的信息量，来评估其经济意义。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究叙事如何影响信念更新，通过实验室实验考察非诊断性线索对贝叶斯推断的影响。不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的具体问题、工具或机制，与三个领域均无实质关联。

title: A Design-Based Approach to Testing and Inference in (Quasi-)Experiments with Spillovers
abstract: Economic policies rarely affect only their direct targets. To study these spillovers, researchers summarize who else was treated with a simple exposure measure, such as the share of treated neighbors within a radius. But for many settings, economic theory provides little guidance on choosing the functional form (e.g., ring) of that measure or its parameters (e.g., radius). We show that the data can inform both choices. Correctly specified exposure measures imply orthogonality conditions that can be used for both estimation and testing. We establish consistency and asymptotic normality of the resulting estimator under spatial and network dependence in a design-based framework, with all randomness arising from treatment assignment. We then characterize the efficient moment conditions. Applied to two large-scale anti-poverty programs, the framework supports some prior radius estimates but rejects others. In the latter case, the revised radius yields substantively different policy-effect estimates.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于设计的方法，利用数据选择暴露度量的函数形式和参数，以改进存在溢出效应的实验中的因果推断，并通过反贫困项目验证了方法的有效性。
abstract_cn: 经济政策很少仅影响其直接目标。为研究这些溢出效应，研究者通过简单的暴露度量（如一定半径内受处理邻居的比例）来概括哪些其他主体也受到了影响。然而在许多情境下，经济理论对于如何选择该度量的函数形式（如环形）及其参数（如半径）提供的指导甚少。我们证明数据可以为这两种选择提供信息。正确设定的暴露度量蕴含了可用于估计与检验的正交条件。我们在一个基于设计的框架下，利用空间与网络依赖性建立了所得估计量的一致性与渐近正态性，其中所有随机性均源于处理分配。随后我们刻画了有效矩条件。将该框架应用于两个大规模反贫困项目时，它支持了部分先前的半径估计值，但拒绝了其他估计值。在后一种情形中，修正后的半径产生了实质不同的政策效应估计值。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文提出了一种基于设计的统计方法，用于在存在溢出效应的准实验中检验和推断，并以两个大规模反贫困项目为例进行应用。该方法论本身不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的具体内容。反贫困项目虽与政府支出相关，但论文重点在于方法而非财政政策分析，因此三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Finite-Population Inference for Heterogeneity in Many-Group Synthetic Difference-in-Differences
abstract: Synthetic difference-in-differences is widely used to estimate treatment effects for many treated groups against a common donor pool. When the same donors are reused across groups, the group-specific estimates are cross-sectionally dependent, and plug-in second moments overstate effect heterogeneity. We develop finite-population inference for heterogeneity in many-group synthetic difference-in-differences: the projection of realized group effects on observed group covariates, the projected group-effect curve, the between-group variance, and the explained share. The theory combines a modular first-stage representation, a joint covariance kernel for donor sharing and block dependence, analytic and leave-out corrections for second moments, and calibrated omnibus and directed tests under explicit exchangeability or fit-matching conditions. In an American Community Survey application to the Affordable Care Act Medicaid expansion, whose estimand is the incremental effect of expansion status, pre-expansion uninsured rates explain much of the state-level effect variation on the percentage-point scale, household split-samples validate the decomposition, and donor sharing materially increases the standard error for the average effect. In a county-level Clean Air Act application, groupwise estimates are noisy, but a pre-specified projection on baseline fine-particulate pollution reveals a sign-stable directed component under state and division block covariance; placebo analyses attribute part of the raw gradient to regional convergence.
tldr: 该论文提出了针对多组合成双重差分法的有限总体推断方法，以解决因共享对照组导致的组间依赖和异质性估计偏差问题，并通过医疗补助扩展和清洁空气法案案例验证了方法的有效性。
abstract_cn: 合成双重差分法被广泛用于估计多个处理组相对于共同供体池的处理效应。当同一供体在不同组间被重复使用时，各组特定的估计值存在横截面依赖性，而插入式二阶矩会夸大效应异质性。我们针对多组合成双重差分法中的异质性发展了有限总体推断：将已实现组效应投影到观测到的组协变量上、投影组效应曲线、组间方差以及解释份额。该理论结合了模块化的第一阶段表示、用于供体共享与区块依赖的联合协方差核、针对二阶矩的解析与留出校正，以及在显式可交换性或拟合匹配条件下的校准综合检验与定向检验。在针对《平价医疗法案》医疗补助扩展的美国社区调查应用中，其估计目标为扩展状态的增量效应，扩展前未参保率在很大程度上解释了州级效应在百分点尺度上的变异，家庭分割样本验证了该分解，而供体共享显著增加了平均效应的标准误。在县级《清洁空气法案》应用中，分组估计存在噪声，但基于基线细颗粒物污染的预设投影揭示了在州与分区区块协方差下符号稳定的定向成分；安慰剂分析将原始梯度的一部分归因于区域收敛。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究的是合成双重差分法在多个处理组中的有限总体推断，聚焦于方法论的改进（如处理组间依赖、方差校正等），应用案例为医疗补助扩展和清洁空气法案，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的核心主题。因此三个领域均得0分。

title: Robust Inference for Weighted Estimands
abstract: Researchers often conduct inference on weighted estimands, defined as weighted averages of group-level effects. Example settings include event studies with cohort-level effects and experiments with site-level effects. Under heterogeneous effects, different weighting schemes yield estimands with distinct empirical and policy interpretations, leading to ambiguity and disagreement over the choice of weights. I establish bounds on differences between weighted estimands and confidence bounds on effect heterogeneity, which I use to construct estimators that minimize worst-case bias and confidence intervals that are uniformly valid over classes of weighted estimands. I apply these methods to an event study in Lakdawala, Nakasone, and Kho (2023), which studies the effects of school-based internet access on test scores. I find that results are robust to broad classes of weights. I then apply the methods to Tennessee's Project STAR experiment and find that results are sensitive to small departures from baseline weights.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种对加权估计量进行稳健推断的方法，通过建立加权估计量差异的界限和效应异质性的置信界，构建最小化最坏情况偏差的估计量和均匀有效的置信区间，并应用于教育干预研究，发现结果对权重选择具有稳健性或敏感性。
abstract_cn: 研究者通常对加权估计量进行推断，这些估计量被定义为群体层面效应的加权平均值。示例场景包括涉及队列层面效应的事件研究和涉及站点层面效应的实验。在异质性效应下，不同的加权方案会产生具有不同实证解释和政策含义的估计量，从而导致对权重选择的模糊性和分歧。我建立了加权估计量之间差异的界限，以及效应异质性的置信界限，并据此构建了能够最小化最坏情况偏差的估计量，以及在一类加权估计量上具有一致有效性的置信区间。我将这些方法应用于Lakdawala、Nakasone和Kho（2023）的一项事件研究，该研究探讨了基于学校的互联网接入对考试成绩的影响。我发现结果对广泛的权重类别具有稳健性。随后，我将这些方法应用于田纳西州的Project STAR实验，并发现结果对基线权重的微小偏离较为敏感。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究加权估计量的稳健推断方法，应用于学校互联网接入对考试成绩的影响和班级规模实验，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。

title: A Machine-Learning-Compatible Omnibus Test for Treatment Effect Heterogeneity
abstract: This study proposes a formal, computationally efficient nonparametric omnibus test for treatment-effect heterogeneity that is compatible with a broad class of estimators, including modern machine-learning methods. The test is designed for settings in which identification can rely on high-dimensional controls while heterogeneity is assessed with respect to a low-dimensional subset of covariates. We derive the test statistic's asymptotic null distribution and develop a bootstrap procedure that is efficient because it avoids re-estimating nuisance parameters in each iteration. The testing approach applies to multiple empirical designs, including randomized experiments, selection-on-observables, difference-in-differences, and instrumental-variables settings. Monte Carlo simulations show that the test attains near-nominal size under the null and exhibits good power against heterogeneous alternatives. We further illustrate the procedure using two empirical applications on retirement savings and trade liberalization.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种与机器学习方法兼容的非参数检验，用于检测处理效应异质性，并证明了其渐近性质和有效性。
abstract_cn: 本研究提出了一种形式化、计算高效的非参数综合检验方法，用于评估处理效应异质性，该方法兼容包括现代机器学习方法在内的广泛估计器类别。该检验适用于以下场景：识别可依赖高维控制变量，而异质性评估则针对低维协变量子集进行。我们推导了检验统计量的渐近零分布，并开发了一种高效的自助法（bootstrap）程序，该程序通过避免在每次迭代中重新估计冗余参数来提升效率。该检验方法可应用于多种实证设计，包括随机实验、基于可观测变量的选择、双重差分（difference-in-differences）以及工具变量（instrumental-variables）设定。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，该检验在零假设下具有接近名义水平的检验尺度，且对异质性备择假设表现出良好的检验功效。我们进一步通过退休储蓄与贸易自由化两项实证应用对该程序进行了说明。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文提出一种用于检验处理效应异质性的机器学习兼容的全局检验方法，属于计量经济学方法论研究。摘要中提到的实证应用涉及退休储蓄和贸易自由化，但未涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的核心主题。因此，三个领域的评分均为0。

title: Factor-Augmented Machine Learning Panel Regressions
abstract: This paper develops the asymptotic theory for high-dimensional panel data regressions in settings with cross-sectionally dependent errors driven by common shocks. We consider a factor-augmented sparse-group LASSO estimator that combines MIDAS aggregation with latent factors. The estimator can take advantage of the mixed-frequency group structure in the time-series dimension. Theory shows that it can outperform the standard LASSO estimator both for prediction and estimation while allowing for cross-sectional dependence.
tldr: 该论文开发了因子增强的稀疏组LASSO估计量，用于处理具有跨截面相关误差的高维面板数据回归，并证明了其在预测和估计上的优势。
abstract_cn: 本文发展了在高维面板数据回归中，由共同冲击驱动的截面相依误差设定下的渐近理论。我们考虑了一种结合MIDAS聚合与潜在因子的因子增强型稀疏组LASSO估计量。该估计量能够利用时间序列维度上的混频组结构。理论表明，该估计量在允许截面相依性的同时，在预测和估计方面均优于标准LASSO估计量。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究高维面板数据回归的渐近理论，提出因子增强的稀疏组LASSO估计量，结合MIDAS聚合与潜在因子。方法本身是计量经济学，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的具体问题、数据或政策含义。三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Revision Risk in Real-Time Macroeconomic Forecasting
abstract: Macroeconomic forecasts refer to outcomes that are first released and then revised. A 90 percent interval for the first GDP release, a six-month value, or a latest-value benchmark is not the same uncertainty statement. We ask how revision risk evolves through the release cycle and what can be reported in real time when later-outcome errors are scarce. We decompose later-outcome MSE into preliminary forecast risk, revision risk, and their covariance. In SPF data, first-release to roughly 180-day revisions account for 8.3 percent of later-outcome MSE across real-activity targets, versus 3.6 percent across inflation targets. We show that later-outcome uncertainty is partially identified: released histories give early-error and revision marginals, but not their dependence. This yields a sharp Frechet-Makarov set and motivates direct late calibration, dependence-robust transport, and signed or revision-model transport. Out-of-sample results support method choice rather than a universal transport rule: coverage and stability determine when transport gains are usable.
tldr: 论文研究了宏观经济预测中修正风险的演变，发现首次发布到约180天修正对实际活动目标的均方误差贡献8.3%，对通胀目标贡献3.6%，并提出了部分识别下的不确定性量化方法。
abstract_cn: 宏观经济预测指的是先发布、后修正的结果。针对首次发布的GDP数据、六个月数值或最新值基准所构建的90%置信区间，所表达的不确定性含义并不相同。我们探讨修正风险在发布周期中如何演变，以及在后期结果误差稀缺时，如何实时报告相关信息。我们将后期结果的均方误差分解为初步预测风险、修正风险及其协方差。在专业预测者调查数据中，对于实际经济活动目标，从首次发布到约180天修正的修正风险占后期结果均方误差的8.3%，而对于通胀目标，这一比例为3.6%。我们证明，后期结果的不确定性是部分可识别的：已发布的历史数据提供了早期误差和修正的边际分布，但未提供它们之间的依赖关系。这产生了尖锐的弗雷歇-马卡罗夫集，并推动了直接后期校准、依赖关系鲁棒传输以及带符号或修正模型传输等方法。样本外结果支持方法选择而非通用传输规则：覆盖率和稳定性决定了传输增益何时可用。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究宏观经济预测中的修正风险，聚焦于GDP和通胀预测的误差分解与不确定性量化，不涉及商业银行、货币政策工具或财政政策。虽然提及通胀，但未研究货币政策含义；提及GDP，但未涉及财政政策。因此三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Bolivia and an IMF Extended Fund Facility: Financial Sustainability, Verifiable Social Sustainability, and Net Financing Additionality
abstract: This paper evaluates stabilization scenarios for Bolivia under external-financing stress by jointly modeling financial sustainability, verifiable social sustainability and the net additionality of multilateral financing. The main correction is that financing already received, contracted or expected from multilateral institutions cannot be counted as a marginal benefit of a hypothetical IMF Extended Fund Facility. Already secured resources are moved to the baseline; only incremental, liquid, timely and non-displaced financing is rewarded. The analysis combines corrected scenario scoring, poverty and inequality measures, maternal-child mortality indicators, public investment multipliers, self-defeating consolidation diagnostics, Monte Carlo uncertainty, leave-one-criterion-out tests and adverse execution assumptions. The results do not support an orthodox IMF-first strategy or front-loaded fiscal consolidation. The strongest designs are concessional multilateral packages with verified net additionality, productive execution, social-health floors and protection against poverty and maternal-child deterioration. An IMF arrangement is valuable only if it adds resources or credibility that were not already secured. The conclusion is that sustainability must be evaluated as a joint financial and social condition: closing cash gaps by weakening growth, poverty, inequality or maternal-child outcomes can be macroeconomically self-defeating.
tldr: 论文评估了玻利维亚在外部融资压力下的稳定方案，发现传统IMF优先策略和前置财政紧缩不可取，而具有净增量、生产性执行和社会健康底线的优惠多边方案更有效。
abstract_cn: 本文通过联合建模财政可持续性、可验证的社会可持续性以及多边融资的净增量效应，评估了玻利维亚在外部融资压力下的稳定化方案。主要修正在于：已从多边机构获得、签约或预期获得的融资，不能被视为假设性国际货币基金组织（IMF）扩展基金安排的边际收益。已落实的资源被纳入基准情景；仅对增量性、流动性、及时且非替代性的融资予以奖励。分析结合了修正后的情景评分、贫困与不平等指标、母婴死亡率指标、公共投资乘数、自我挫败式财政整固诊断、蒙特卡洛不确定性分析、逐项剔除检验以及不利执行假设。研究结果不支持正统的IMF优先策略或前置式财政整固。最具效力的方案是附带已验证净增量效应、生产性执行、社会健康底线以及防止贫困与母婴状况恶化的优惠性多边融资组合。IMF安排只有在能够增加尚未落实的资源或可信度时才有价值。结论是：可持续性必须作为财政与社会联合条件加以评估——通过削弱增长、贫困、不平等或母婴状况来填补现金缺口，可能在宏观经济层面产生自我挫败效应。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：财政政策 8.0/10。论文主要研究玻利维亚在外部融资压力下的稳定方案，核心是财政可持续性、社会可持续性和多边融资的净增量。涉及公共投资乘数、财政整顿、债务可持续性等，属于财政政策领域。未涉及商业银行或货币政策工具、传导机制。

title: A Framework for Transportation and Land Use Integration as a Parallel Constrained Multiple Discrete-Continuous Extreme Value (PC-MDCEV) Home Production Model
abstract: Integrated urban models (IUM) typically rely on a measure of accessibility or travel time to form the link between the transportation and land use systems. Such integration does not fully capture the trade-offs made by households in how they spend their limited temporal and monetary budgets. We propose a microeconomic foundation for transportation and land use choice model integration based on the theory of home production. A utility function is developed that considers both household monetary expenditure and individual time use. We address several limitations in previous home production functions. First, the introduction of a parallel constrained multiple discrete-continuous extreme value (MDCEV) structure that allows for the inclusion of multi-person households in the model. Second, travel time is defined as the minimum time required to conduct an activity and deducted from the temporal budget. This assumption has several appealing features. It defines the minimum time to complete an activity as a measure of accessibility. An empirical application is provided for the Greater Toronto Area using a validated synthetic dataset. Empirical results demonstrate an economy of scale in time devoted to home production, analogous to scaling exhibit in market production. It was found that the mix of dwelling types (detached, apartment, etc.) has a significant influence on both time use and consumption. Finally, we provide several directions for future research to advance the practice of urban modelling and better capture the complex dynamics of household decision-making.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于家庭生产理论的交通与土地利用整合模型，通过平行约束的多重离散-连续极值结构，分析了多成员家庭的时间与货币预算分配，并在大多伦多地区进行了实证验证。
abstract_cn: 综合城市模型通常依赖于可达性或出行时间的度量来建立交通与土地利用系统之间的联系。然而，这种整合方式并未完全反映家庭在有限的时间和货币预算分配中所做的权衡。本文基于家庭生产理论，为交通与土地利用选择模型的整合提出了一个微观经济学基础。我们构建了一个同时考虑家庭货币支出与个人时间使用的效用函数，并解决了以往家庭生产函数中的若干局限性。首先，引入了并行约束的多重离散-连续极值结构，使得模型能够包含多成员家庭。其次，将出行时间定义为开展活动所需的最短时间，并从时间预算中扣除。这一假设具有若干显著特征：它将完成活动的最短时间定义为可达性的一种度量。我们使用经过验证的合成数据集，对大多伦多地区进行了实证应用。实证结果表明，家庭生产中时间投入存在规模经济效应，类似于市场生产中的规模表现。研究发现，住宅类型（独立屋、公寓等）的混合构成对时间使用和消费均有显著影响。最后，我们为未来研究提出了若干方向，以推动城市建模实践的发展，并更准确地捕捉家庭决策的复杂动态。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究交通与土地利用整合的家庭生产模型，属于城市规划和交通工程领域，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无任何实质关联。未提及银行、信贷、利率、通胀、政府支出、税收等主题。

title: Estimating Causal Effects from Data Generated by Stochastic Algorithms
abstract: Recommendation systems and chatbots present content to users, typically using stochastic algorithms that select the content based on user characteristics or context. Examples of content include chat responses, videos, or items available for purchase. Scientists and application developers are often interested in whether characteristics of content increase outcomes such as user engagement. Estimates of such causal effects may guide content providers to generate content that emphasize desirable features. However, in settings with a large content library or where content is generated uniquely for a given user, it can be difficult to use observational data to learn the causal effect of content features, because the content a user sees is tailored to that user, and because content varies in many dimensions. This paper proposes a new method for estimating the impact of content features using observational data, when the algorithm that determines user exposure incorporates some randomization, and when two additional data elements are logged for each user: $(i)$ the identity of at least one item that could have been exposed to the user, but was not (the unexposed item); $(ii)$ an estimate of the ratio of the probability that the unexposed item would have been shown to the probability that the exposed item was shown. We show that causal effects of features are identified in this setting, even in the presence of unobserved confounders that affect both user preferences and the identity of the considered pair of items (exposed and unexposed). Our estimator differs from prior approaches in terms of what data is used and how the estimator is constructed.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用随机算法生成的数据估计内容特征因果效应的新方法，通过利用未曝光项和曝光概率比来识别因果效应。
abstract_cn: 推荐系统与聊天机器人通常采用基于用户特征或上下文选择内容的随机算法，向用户呈现内容。内容示例包括聊天回复、视频或可供购买的商品。科学家与应用开发者常关注内容特征是否会影响用户参与度等结果指标。对此类因果效应的估计，可引导内容提供方生成强调理想特征的内容。然而，在内容库规模庞大或内容需为特定用户单独生成的场景中，利用观测数据学习内容特征的因果效应存在困难，原因在于用户所看到的内容是经过个性化定制的，且内容在多个维度上存在差异。本文提出一种新方法，利用观测数据估计内容特征的影响，该方法适用于以下条件：决定用户曝光内容的算法包含一定随机性，且针对每位用户记录两项额外数据：（1）至少一个本可曝光给用户但实际未曝光的项目（未曝光项目）的标识；（2）未曝光项目被展示概率与已曝光项目被展示概率之比的估计值。我们证明，在此设定下，即使存在同时影响用户偏好与所考虑项目对（已曝光与未曝光项目）标识的未观测混杂因素，内容特征的因果效应仍可被识别。本研究的估计器在数据使用方式及估计器构建方法上均与既有方法存在差异。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究的是从随机算法生成的数据中估计因果效应的方法，应用于推荐系统和聊天机器人，与商业银行、货币政策或财政政策无任何关联。

title: Identification, Estimation and Inference Based on Structural Error Projection
abstract: This paper proposes to project and expand the conditional mean function of the structural error given the regressors in an endogenous regression under consideration. As the projection process is semiparametric, we define this procedure as a semiparametric projection (SP) method to address endogeneity in regression models by internally constructed instrumental variables. The SP method is applicable to many classes of regression models associated with endogeneity, such as linear, nonlinear, and non- and semi-parametric models, and provides a simple and computationally tractable alternative to conventional instrumental variable approaches available from the existing literature. This paper establishes identification conditions and derives the asymptotic properties of the resulting estimators. It then proposes a simple LASSO selection method to examine the finite-sample performance of both the proposed method and the established theory by simulated and real data examples.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种半参数投影方法，通过内部构造工具变量解决回归模型中的内生性问题，并建立了识别条件和渐近性质。
abstract_cn: 本文提出在考虑内生回归的条件下，对结构误差给定回归变量的条件均值函数进行投影与扩展。由于该投影过程是半参数的，我们将此方法定义为半参数投影（Semiparametric Projection, SP）方法，通过内部构造的工具变量来解决回归模型中的内生性问题。SP方法适用于多种与内生性相关的回归模型类别，例如线性、非线性、非参数及半参数模型，并为现有文献中传统的工具变量方法提供了一种简单且计算上易于处理的替代方案。本文建立了识别条件，并推导了所得估计量的渐近性质。随后，提出一种简单的LASSO选择方法，通过模拟与真实数据实例来检验所提方法及所建立理论的有限样本表现。

title: Empirical Global Games of Regime Change
abstract: Global games theory provides a tractable framework for analyzing coordination problems with multiple equilibria, with regime overthrow serving as a canonical application. A large empirical literature on coups d'état examines the relationship between country-level characteristics, coup occurrence, and coup success using reduced-form approaches that leave the underlying coordination problem implicit. Bridging these literatures, we develop an estimable global games model of coups d'état. The model incorporates strategic coordination into the empirical analysis of coups, employing the global games framework as an equilibrium selection device. The model distinguishes between the feasibility and desirability of regime overthrow, allowing observable fundamentals to enter separately into beliefs about regime strength and perceived gains from rebellion. The model therefore provides a theoretical basis for decomposing coup outcomes into feasibility and desirability components under maintained exclusion restrictions and equilibrium assumptions. If information on coup strength is available, the model also allows estimation of agents' uncertainty about regime strength. We show how the model can be estimated using simulated maximum likelihood coupled with a contraction mapping, and demonstrate how observable covariates map into regime strength and the perceived benefits of overthrow. We illustrate how the framework can be applied through counterfactuals varying coup benefits, regime strength, and information quality.
tldr: 该论文构建了一个可估计的全球博弈模型来分析政变中的协调问题，将战略互动纳入实证分析，并区分了政变的可行性与合意性。
abstract_cn: 全球博弈论为分析存在多重均衡的协调问题提供了一个易于处理的框架，其中政权推翻是一个经典的应用场景。大量关于政变的实证文献采用简化形式方法，考察国家层面特征、政变发生与政变成功之间的关系，但未明确揭示其背后的协调问题。为弥合这两类文献的鸿沟，我们构建了一个可估计的全球博弈论政变模型。该模型将战略协调纳入政变的实证分析，利用全球博弈论框架作为均衡选择机制。模型区分了政权推翻的可行性（feasibility）与可取性（desirability），允许可观测的基本面因素分别进入关于政权强度的信念与叛乱预期收益的考量。因此，该模型为在维持排他性约束（exclusion restrictions）与均衡假设的条件下，将政变结果分解为可行性成分与可取性成分提供了理论基础。若可获得关于政变力量的信息，该模型还能估计行为主体对政权强度的不确定性。我们展示了如何通过模拟极大似然法（simulated maximum likelihood）结合压缩映射（contraction mapping）来估计该模型，并论证了可观测协变量如何映射为政权强度与推翻政变的预期收益。最后，我们通过改变政变收益、政权强度与信息质量的反事实分析，阐释了该框架的应用方式。

title: Approximate Minimax Estimation of a Bounded Normal Mean via Stochastic Mirror Ascent
abstract: This paper presents a computational approach to find an approximately minimax estimator for the classical Bounded Normal Mean problem. The suggested procedure is the Bayes estimator corresponding to an approximately least-favorable distribution obtained from a stochastic mirror ascent routine for concave maximization. The paper shows that both the approximately least-favorable distribution and the approximately minimax estimator are indeed close (in a sense we make precise) to their desired targets. Simulation evidence suggests that the approximately minimax estimator can yield, with a reasonable amount of compute, risk improvements from 6% to almost 18% relative to the minimax linear estimator (which is known to admit a maximal improvement of 20%). The approximately minimax estimator is then applied to the problem of how to best aggregate the information contained in local projections and vector autoregressions to estimate an impulse response coefficient.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过随机镜像上升算法计算有界正态均值问题的近似极小极大估计量的方法，并展示了其在聚合局部投影和向量自回归信息以估计脉冲响应系数中的应用。
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种计算方法来寻找经典有界正态均值问题的近似极小极大估计量。所建议的程序对应于贝叶斯估计量，该估计量基于通过随机镜像上升法（stochastic mirror ascent）进行凹最大化（concave maximization）所获得的近似最不利分布。本文表明，近似最不利分布和近似极小极大估计量确实（在我们精确化的意义上）接近其预期目标。模拟证据表明，相对于极小极大线性估计量（已知其最大改进幅度为20%），近似极小极大估计量在合理计算量下可实现6%至近18%的风险改进。随后，该近似极小极大估计量被应用于如何最优整合局部投影（local projections）与向量自回归（vector autoregressions）中所包含的信息以估计脉冲响应系数的问题。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Forecasting Realized Volatility with Time Series Foundation Models: A Comparison with Econometric Benchmarks
abstract: We ask whether pretrained time series foundation models (TSFMs) improve on established econometric benchmarks for forecasting realized volatility. Using the VOLARE dataset, we conduct the first systematic comparison of nine zero-shot TSFMs against eight econometric specifications, including the Heterogeneous Autoregressive (HAR) family, across 50 assets in equities, foreign exchange, and futures, and three forecast horizons, with formal pairwise and multi-model forecast-comparison tests. Foundation models do not deliver a uniform gain. Pooled losses favor them, but the advantage is concentrated in a few outlier assets; averaging each asset's loss ratio to a well-specified Log-HAR benchmark, so that no single asset dominates, only one small model, Tiny Time Mixers (TTM), beats the benchmark at every horizon, and by a narrow margin. The other foundation models do not improve on Log-HAR, and the econometric benchmarks remain competitive throughout. A Mincer--Zarnowitz recalibration, which removes level and scale bias from every forecast, shows that much of the short-horizon advantage reflects better-scaled forecasts rather than better prediction of volatility dynamics, and only at the monthly horizon does a genuine informational gain remain. Because this edge is thin and even TTM is not best on every asset, a simple equal-weight average of TTM and Log-HAR matches the best single model and enters the Model Confidence Set for 98 to 100\% of assets, more often than either component alone, so a forecaster need not identify the best model for each asset in advance. Our most durable finding is that performance varies so much across foundation-model architectures that choosing the right architecture matters more than the broader choice between foundation and econometric models.
tldr: 该论文比较了预训练时间序列基础模型与计量经济学基准在预测已实现波动率上的表现，发现基础模型并未带来普遍改进，只有Tiny Time Mixers模型略微优于基准，且模型选择比范式选择更重要。
abstract_cn: 我们探究预训练时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）是否能在已实现波动率的预测中，相较于成熟的经济计量基准有所改进。利用VOLARE数据集，我们首次对九种零样本TSFMs与八种经济计量模型（包括异质自回归（HAR）族）进行了系统性比较，涵盖股票、外汇和期货领域的50种资产及三个预测期限，并采用了正式的成对与多模型预测比较检验。基础模型并未带来一致的增益。汇总损失指标倾向于支持它们，但这一优势集中在少数异常资产上；将每种资产的损失比率相对于一个设定良好的对数HAR（Log-HAR）基准进行平均（以避免单一资产主导结果）后，仅有一个小型模型——Tiny Time Mixers（TTM）——在每个预测期限均优于该基准，且优势幅度较小。其他基础模型并未超越Log-HAR，而经济计量基准在整个过程中仍保持竞争力。通过Mincer-Zarnowitz再校准（该步骤消除了每个预测中的水平与尺度偏差）表明，短期优势很大程度上源于更优的预测尺度校准，而非对波动率动态的更好预测；仅在月度预测期限上，才存在真正的信息增益。由于这一优势微弱，且即便是TTM也并非在所有资产上表现最佳，因此对TTM与Log-HAR进行简单等权平均，即可达到最佳单一模型的表现，并在98%至100%的资产中进入模型置信集，其入选频率高于任一单独模型。这意味着预测者无需事先为每种资产识别最优模型。我们最持久的发现是：不同基础模型架构之间的性能差异如此之大，以至于选择正确的架构比在基础模型与经济计量模型之间进行更宽泛的选择更为重要。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Variance Estimation for Saturated Fixed-Effect Specifications
abstract: We characterize the asymptotic behavior of conventional variance estimators in linear regression with high-dimensional fixed effects under a drift in which both the proportional fixed-effect dimension $ρ_n = d_{K_n}/n \to ρ\in [0,1)$ and the residual treatment variance $τ_n^2 = nQ_{K_n} \to τ^2 \in (0, \infty]$ are non-degenerate. Three findings emerge. First, under strict exogeneity and conditional homoskedasticity, the Cattaneo--Jansson--Newey-corrected $t$-statistic is asymptotically exact for any $τ^2 > 0$: there is no Stock--Yogo-style threshold in $τ^2$. Second, the Eicker--White HC0 estimator is biased downward by a fixed factor $(1-ρ)$, producing over-rejection that grows with saturation. Third, HC3 over-corrects in the opposite direction by a factor $1/(1-ρ)$. The leave-one-out estimator (HC2) removes the first-order leverage distortion and is asymptotically exact under homoskedasticity or design-balanced heteroskedasticity; under general heteroskedasticity with non-uniform leverage, HC2 retains an additional bias of order $ρ|μ- ω^2|$ that we characterize. An empirical application to Piotroski F-Score returns in CEE markets illustrates the predicted variance hierarchy in real data.
tldr: 该论文研究了饱和固定效应模型中方差估计量的渐近行为，发现Cattaneo-Jansson-Newey校正的t统计量在严格外生性和条件同方差下渐近精确，而HC0和HC3分别存在向下和向上的偏差，HC2在特定条件下表现良好。
abstract_cn: 我们刻画了在高维固定效应线性回归中，在漂移条件下传统方差估计量的渐近行为，其中比例固定效应维度 $ρ_n = d_{K_n}/n \to ρ\in [0,1)$ 与残差处理方差 $τ_n^2 = nQ_{K_n} \to τ^2 \in (0, \infty]$ 均为非退化的。主要发现有三点。第一，在严格外生性与条件同方差假设下，Cattaneo–Jansson–Newey 校正后的 $t$ 统计量对于任意 $τ^2 > 0$ 均是渐近精确的：$τ^2$ 中不存在 Stock–Yogo 式的阈值。第二，Eicker–White HC0 估计量存在固定因子 $(1-ρ)$ 的向下偏误，导致随饱和度增加而加剧的过度拒绝。第三，HC3 则以因子 $1/(1-ρ)$ 在相反方向上过度校正。留一法估计量（HC2）消除了一阶杠杆扭曲，并在同方差或设计平衡的异方差下是渐近精确的；在具有非均匀杠杆的一般异方差下，HC2 保留了额外的偏误，其阶数为 $ρ|μ- ω^2|$，我们对此进行了刻画。一项针对中欧与东欧（CEE）市场 Piotroski F-Score 收益率的实证应用展示了实际数据中预测的方差层级结构。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究高维固定效应线性回归中方差估计的渐近性质，属于计量经济学方法论，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。标题和摘要未提及任何银行、货币或财政主题，应用部分仅以Piotroski F-Score为例，不涉及银行信贷、货币政策工具或财政政策。

title: Geometric Control of Decisions' Affordability
abstract: This paper studies the performance of data-driven decisions from a geometric perspective. A policymaker learns from an innovated donor population to decide whether to innovate groups in a distinct target population, and must compensate for any mistake. I introduce certification: an estimator yields certified decisions when it controls the probability of a mistake, whenever intervention effects are sufficiently large in magnitude. First, I show that certification implies a bound on worst-case compensation. Then, I study matching estimators with positive weights and show that, in a large-sample regime, affordability by certification becomes a purely geometric problem. I prove that a Delaunay interpolant, whose properties are well-known from results in computational geometry, delivers the best affordability guarantee. Finally, I show how this result can be leveraged to guide donor-data collection plans to bring worst-case compensation cost below a target level. I illustrate the gains of adopting this geometric point of view in targeting and collection plans with a semi-synthetic empirical application in development economics.
tldr: 该论文从几何角度研究数据驱动决策的可负担性，引入认证概念，证明Delaunay插值可提供最佳可负担性保证，并指导数据收集以控制补偿成本。
abstract_cn: 本文从几何视角研究数据驱动决策的性能。政策制定者通过从创新的供体群体中学习，来决定是否对不同的目标群体进行创新，并必须为任何错误进行补偿。我引入了认证的概念：当干预效应在幅度上足够大时，若估计量能控制错误概率，则其产生认证决策。首先，我证明认证意味着对最坏情况补偿的约束。随后，我研究具有正权重的匹配估计量，并证明在大样本条件下，认证的可负担性成为一个纯粹的几何问题。我证明，一个在计算几何中性质广为人知的Delaunay插值函数能够提供最佳的可负担性保证。最后，我展示如何利用这一结果指导供体数据收集计划，以将最坏情况补偿成本降至目标水平以下。我通过发展经济学中的一个半合成实证应用，说明了采用这一几何视角在目标定位与数据收集计划中的优势。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
