title: Stabilized Higher-Order Influence Functions: Statistical Theory of a Class of Bilinear Forms
abstract: Higher-order influence functions, introduced in a series of articles (Robins et al., 2008, 2009a; van der Vaart, 2014; Robins et al., 2016, 2023; Liu et al., 2017), are a unified framework for constructing rate-optimal point estimates of a class of statistical functionals under various complexity-reducing assumptions on the posited statistical model that generates the observed data. Although higher-order (influence functions) estimators are theoretically appealing, they have very limited practical uptake compared to their first-order counterparts. The original higher-order estimators proposed in Robins et al. (2008) and Robins et al. (2017) involve nonparametric density estimation of multi-dimensional covariates, a highly nontrivial statistical and computational problem on its own. The density estimator is, in turn, used in the evaluation of the inverse population Gram matrix $Ω$ of a set of $k$-dimensional basis transformations of covariates. There, $k$ is allowed to be as large as $o (n^2)$. To partially address this potential shortcoming, Liu et al. (2017) restrict $k$ to $o (n)$ and instead estimate $Ω$ directly using the inverse sample Gram matrix estimator, but computed from an independent sample often obtained by sample-splitting. Liu et al. (2017) refer to this alternative estimator as the empirical higher-order estimator. Although the empirical higher-order estimator bypasses density estimation, it suffers from numerical instability due to inverting a large-dimensional sample Gram matrix. In this article, for a class of bilinear forms/functionals that often appear in substantive fields, we propose a new stabilized higher-order estimator without sample splitting, which exhibits more stable finite-sample performance compared to the empirical higher-order estimator. We also prove that this new class of higher-order estimators enjoys similar statistical guarantees.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种稳定的高阶影响函数估计量，用于一类双线性形式的统计推断，解决了现有方法数值不稳定的问题，并证明了其统计性质。
abstract_cn: 高阶影响函数（Higher-order influence functions）在一系列文献（Robins et al., 2008, 2009a; van der Vaart, 2014; Robins et al., 2016, 2023; Liu et al., 2017）中被提出，是一个统一框架，用于在针对生成观测数据的假定统计模型施加各种降低复杂性假设的条件下，构造一类统计泛函的速率最优点估计。尽管高阶（影响函数）估计量在理论上具有吸引力，但与一阶估计量相比，其实际应用非常有限。Robins等人（2008）和Robins等人（2017）最初提出的高阶估计量涉及多维协变量的非参数密度估计，这本身就是一个高度非平凡的统计与计算问题。该密度估计量随后被用于评估一组协变量的k维基变换的逆总体Gram矩阵Ω，其中k可达到o(n²)量级。为部分解决这一潜在缺陷，Liu等人（2017）将k限制为o(n)，并转而直接使用逆样本Gram矩阵估计量来估计Ω，但该估计量基于通过样本分割获得的独立样本计算。Liu等人（2017）将这种替代估计量称为经验高阶估计量（empirical higher-order estimator）。尽管经验高阶估计量绕过了密度估计，但由于需要求逆大维度的样本Gram矩阵，它存在数值不稳定性问题。在本文中，针对实质性领域中常见的一类双线性形式/泛函，我们提出了一种无需样本分割的新型稳定化高阶估计量，与经验高阶估计量相比，该估计量在有限样本下表现出更稳定的性能。我们还证明了这类新型高阶估计量具有相似的统计保证。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究高阶影响函数的统计理论，提出一种稳定的高阶估计量，属于统计学和因果推断领域。内容完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策，与三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Sufficientarian Grading Rules and Rankings: Characterizations and Implementation
abstract: Sufficientarian grading rules are defined using a finite family of sufficientarian judgements on individual capability assignments as embodied in a sufficientarian binary grading function (BGF). Both sufficientarian grading rules and the sufficientarian total preorders on capability-type assignments they induce are characterized. Moreover, several further total preorders based upon sufficiency-gap information provided by a sufficientarian grading rule are explicitly defined and some of them are also characterized. It is also shown that there exists a class of inclusive, unanimity-respecting and suitably strategy-proof protocols (including simple majority when the number of agents is odd) which can be deployed in order to select one specific sufficientarian grading rule.
tldr: 该论文定义了充分主义评分规则，并对其诱导的排序进行了特征化，同时展示了如何通过策略-proof协议选择特定的充分主义评分规则。
abstract_cn: 充分主义分级规则通过一个有限的充分主义判断族来定义，这些判断针对个体能力分配，并体现于一个充分主义二元分级函数中。本文对充分主义分级规则及其所诱导的能力类型分配上的充分主义全预序进行了刻画。此外，基于充分主义分级规则所提供的充分性差距信息，明确定义了若干进一步的全预序，并对其中部分全预序进行了刻画。研究还表明，存在一类包容性强、尊重一致性且适当满足策略防护性的协议（包括当代理人数量为奇数时的简单多数规则），可用于选择某一特定的充分主义分级规则。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究充分性分级规则（sufficientarian grading rules）及其在能力分配上的排序，属于社会选择理论、福利经济学或能力方法（capability approach）领域。完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。三个领域均无实质关联，故均评0分。

title: Random Utility Model with Endogenously Assigned Menus
abstract: There is a largely overlooked assumption underlying stochastic choice theory: menus are assigned exogenously, as if by a hidden randomized controlled trial. This assumption is not innocuous, because in many real-world settings menus are assigned endogenously according to the decision makers' preferences. This paper studies Random Utility Model under menu endogeneity and shows that any seemingly anomalous choice behavior can be generated by a population of rational decision makers with heterogeneous preferences facing endogenously assigned menus. To address this problem, I propose a new causal estimand: the probability that an alternative would be chosen from a given menu if that menu were presented to the entire population. I then characterize sharp bounds on this estimand using observed menu and choice frequencies. In addition, I show that when choices are observed across multiple markets with different preference distributions and a common menu-assignment rule, the causal estimands from those markets and the menu assignment rule are uniquely identified.
tldr: 该论文研究随机效用模型中菜单内生性导致的选择行为异常，并提出因果估计量及其边界识别方法。
abstract_cn: 随机选择理论中有一个很大程度上被忽视的假设：菜单是外生分配的，仿佛通过一个隐藏的随机对照试验。这一假设并非无关紧要，因为在许多现实场景中，菜单是根据决策者的偏好内生分配的。本文研究了菜单内生性下的随机效用模型（Random Utility Model），并表明任何看似异常的选择行为，都可以由一群具有异质性偏好的理性决策者面对内生分配的菜单所产生。为解决这一问题，我提出一个新的因果估计量：如果某个菜单被呈现给整个群体，则该菜单中某一备选项被选择的概率。随后，我利用观察到的菜单和选择频率，刻画了这一估计量的锐界（sharp bounds）。此外，我证明，当在不同市场（这些市场具有不同的偏好分布和共同的菜单分配规则）中观察到选择行为时，这些市场的因果估计量以及菜单分配规则可以被唯一识别。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究随机效用模型中的菜单内生性问题，属于微观经济理论/计量经济学领域，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的任何核心主题。三个领域均无实质关联。

title: Bundling Complements
abstract: I develop a duality-based multi-dimensional screening framework with a geometric characterization of combinatorial preferences. For a mechanism to be optimal, the type distribution pins down \emph{required} directions of binding feasibility constraints, while the complementarity among bundles determines the \emph{covered} directions; optimality reduces to full coverage of required directions. I apply the framework to a one-parameter family in which every bundle containing a fixed \emph{core} of items earns a complementarity premium. Two thresholds organize the optimum: above a lower threshold the grand bundle must be offered; above a higher threshold a \emph{core-peripheral} menu -- a bundled core with optional add-ons that are not sold standalone -- is optimal. The tight distributional condition for finiteness of the higher threshold is \emph{inclusivity}, that the menu exclude no near-top buyer.
tldr: 该论文开发了一个基于对偶性的多维筛选框架，用于分析捆绑互补品的最优机制，并刻画了核心-外围菜单的最优性条件。
abstract_cn: 本文构建了一个基于对偶性的多维筛选框架，该框架对组合偏好进行了几何刻画。对于最优机制而言，类型分布决定了可行性约束的“必需”方向，而捆绑组合间的互补性则决定了“覆盖”方向；最优性即归结为对必需方向的完全覆盖。我将该框架应用于一个单参数族，其中每个包含固定“核心”物品的捆绑组合均享有互补性溢价。两个阈值界定了最优解：低于较低阈值时，必须提供全捆绑组合；高于较高阈值时，“核心-外围”菜单——即捆绑的核心组合搭配可选的附加项（这些附加项不单独出售）——为最优方案。较高阈值有限性的严格分布条件为“包容性”，即菜单不得排除任何接近顶端的买家。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究捆绑互补品的机制设计，属于微观经济理论，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。

title: Evaluation and Assignment with Networked Competition and Spillovers
abstract: This paper studies how organizations should jointly design evaluation rules and assign workers when performance depends on both effort and non-discretionary advantage. Agents choose effort in positions linked by a competition network, while their effective advantage depends on own type and spillovers through a second network. The planner chooses both the assignment and the effort weight in evaluation. Equilibrium effort rises with a position's Katz-Bonacich centrality and falls with effective advantage. The optimal evaluation rule generally differs from true output. When effort is more important in production, the planner lowers the effort weight and uses negative assortative assignment to strengthen incentives. When advantage is more important, the planner raises the effort weight and uses positive assortative assignment to exploit spillovers. We also study a constraint requiring assignments to be pairwise stable, which creates an output loss depending on the intensity of competition.
tldr: 该论文研究在竞争网络和溢出效应下，组织如何联合设计评估规则和分配工人以优化激励和产出。
abstract_cn: 本文研究当绩效同时取决于努力与非酌情优势时，组织应如何联合设计评估规则并分配工人。代理人通过竞争网络连接的职位选择努力水平，而其有效优势则取决于自身类型及通过另一网络产生的溢出效应。规划者需同时选择分配方案及评估中的努力权重。均衡努力水平随职位的卡茨-博纳奇中心度（Katz-Bonacich centrality）上升而提高，随有效优势上升而下降。最优评估规则通常不同于真实产出。当努力在生产中更为重要时，规划者会降低努力权重并采用负匹配分配以强化激励；当优势更为重要时，规划者会提高努力权重并采用正匹配分配以利用溢出效应。本文还研究了要求分配满足两两稳定性的约束条件，该约束会导致产出损失，其大小取决于竞争强度。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究组织如何设计评估规则和任务分配，以激励员工努力并利用溢出效应。模型涉及竞争网络和溢出网络，但完全不涉及银行、货币政策或财政政策。因此，三个领域的核心相关度均为0。

title: Axioms for Correlated Equilibrium
abstract: We characterize correlated equilibrium in finite normal-form games. Interpreting correlated strategies as action recommendations, we show that correlated equilibrium is the unique solution concept that never recommends a pure-strategy dominated action, treats payoff-equivalent actions interchangeably, and respects the sure-thing principle under uncertainty about payoffs and the correlation device. A parallel characterization identifies coarse correlated equilibrium among solution concepts that recommend dominant actions whenever they exist and treat payoff-equivalent actions as strongly interchangeable.
tldr: 该论文通过公理化方法刻画了有限正规型博弈中的相关均衡，证明相关均衡是唯一满足不推荐纯策略占优行动、等价对待收益等价行动、以及在收益和相关性装置不确定性下遵循确定原则的解概念。
abstract_cn: 我们刻画了有限正则博弈中的关联均衡。将关联策略解读为行动建议，我们证明关联均衡是唯一满足以下条件的解概念：从不推荐纯策略占优行动、将收益等价行动互换处理，并在收益与关联装置存在不确定性时遵循确定原则。一个平行的刻画将粗关联均衡识别为如下解概念：在存在占优行动时推荐该行动，并将收益等价行动视为强可互换。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Ordering by Unanimity: Giving Applications Sequencing Rights Without Breaking Composability
abstract: Blockchain applications may have preferences over the order in which transactions execute: an automated market maker may use an external feed to price its liquidity, and require that the oracle update incorporating this price execute before any swap; an exchange may want to execute cancellations of limit orders before incoming market orders; an application may run an on-chain auction by executing bids from highest to lowest, so that the first bid wins. However, the ordering of transactions is chosen by the underlying blockchain and may not be compatible with the requirements of a specific application. In this paper, I tackle this problem by introducing an algorithm called unanimity override. The intuition is that when all the applications agree on how to order two transactions, the underlying blockchain should respect this agreement; a default order - the order in which transactions appear in the block - settles the rest. The problem with this naive approach is that application unanimity may form cycles, which the algorithm must break. Cycle-breaking is also the rule's main vulnerability because an attacker can insert transactions to manufacture a cycle. Yet two guarantees hold against any attacker who sets the default order, deploys applications, and inserts transactions. All transactions that interact with a single application that expressed preferences are ordered according to that application's preferences, even when they also interact with other applications that did not express preferences. Also, gated transactions - those that cannot be outranked in the unanimity order by any transaction crafted by an attacker - always execute as the applications unanimously prefer, even when they touch many applications. The two guarantees identify the preferences the protocol can protect, and they tell applications and senders in advance which transactions will execute in the intended order.
tldr: 该论文提出一种名为'一致同意覆盖'的算法，解决区块链应用中交易排序的偏好冲突问题，确保在应用一致同意时按偏好排序，并防止攻击者制造循环破坏排序。
abstract_cn: 区块链应用可能对交易的执行顺序存在偏好：自动化做市商可能依赖外部数据源为其流动性定价，并要求包含该价格的预言机更新（oracle update）在任何兑换（swap）之前执行；交易所可能希望在接收市价单（market order）之前先执行限价单（limit order）的撤销操作；某个应用可能通过从高到低执行出价来运行链上拍卖（on-chain auction），从而使首个出价者获胜。然而，交易的排序由底层区块链决定，可能与特定应用的需求不兼容。本文通过引入一种名为“一致同意覆盖”（unanimity override）的算法来解决这一问题。其核心思路是：当所有应用就如何排序两笔交易达成一致时，底层区块链应尊重这一共识；而默认顺序——即交易在区块中出现的顺序——则用于处理其余情况。这种朴素方法的问题在于，应用的一致同意可能形成循环（cycle），算法必须打破这种循环。循环打破也是该规则的主要弱点，因为攻击者可以插入交易来人为制造循环。然而，对于任何能够设定默认顺序、部署应用并插入交易的攻击者，仍存在两项保障。所有与表达了偏好的单一应用交互的交易，均按照该应用的偏好进行排序，即使这些交易同时与未表达偏好的其他应用交互。此外，门控交易（gated transactions）——即那些在一致同意顺序中无法被攻击者构造的任何交易超越的交易——始终按照应用一致同意的偏好执行，即便它们涉及多个应用。这两项保障明确了协议能够保护的偏好类型，并提前告知应用和发送方哪些交易将按预期顺序执行。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究区块链交易排序算法（unanimity override），与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。未涉及银行信贷、金融中介、监管、利率、通胀、政府收支等主题。

title: Network games with heterogeneous players
abstract: Real social and economic networks involve individuals with diverse incentives, yet most studies of network games assume homogeneous preferences or few player types. We introduce a general framework for binary choice network games with fully heterogeneous payoff structures. We first show that any such game can be transformed into an equivalent one with conformist, rebel, and stubborn archetypes, preserving equilibria and best response trajectories. We then establish sufficient conditions for pure strategy Nash equilibrium existence and convergence of best response dynamics on arbitrary networks, while proving that equilibria almost surely vanish in large sparse random networks. We further develop a deterministic approximation approach that predicts evolutionary trends and equilibrium strategy frequencies from network homophily and heterophily patterns, without computing equilibria explicitly. Extending the framework to limited information, we prove that dynamics converge either to a unique limited information equilibrium or to a unique stationary distribution, and we derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of the limited information equilibrium. We validate our predictions using Prisoner's Dilemma games on real social networks that incorporate heterogeneous altruism and peer influence. These findings together provide a unified framework for equilibrium existence, evolutionary dynamics, and equilibrium outcome prediction in heterogeneous network games.
tldr: 该论文提出了一个异质性参与者二元选择网络博弈的通用框架，证明了均衡存在性和动态收敛性，并利用真实社交网络上的囚徒困境博弈验证了预测。
abstract_cn: 现实社会与经济网络中的个体具有多样化的动机，然而大多数网络博弈研究假设参与者偏好同质或仅有少数几种类型。我们提出一个适用于完全异质性收益结构的二元选择网络博弈的通用框架。首先证明，任意此类博弈均可转化为一个包含从众者、反叛者与固执者三种原型的等价博弈，且保持均衡与最优反应轨迹不变。随后，我们建立了任意网络上纯策略纳什均衡存在性及最优反应动态收敛的充分条件，同时证明在大型稀疏随机网络中均衡几乎必然消失。进一步，我们发展了一种确定性近似方法，该方法无需显式计算均衡，即可根据网络同质性与异质性模式预测演化趋势及均衡策略频率。将该框架扩展至有限信息情境后，我们证明动态过程要么收敛至唯一的有限信息均衡，要么收敛至唯一的平稳分布，并推导出有限信息均衡存在的充要条件。我们利用真实社会网络上的囚徒困境博弈验证了上述预测，该博弈融合了异质性利他主义与同伴影响。这些发现共同为异质性网络博弈中的均衡存在性、演化动力学及均衡结果预测提供了统一框架。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究网络博弈中的异质性参与者，属于博弈论和网络科学领域，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的任何核心主题。摘要中未提及银行、信贷、利率、政府支出等关键词，因此三个领域均得0分。

title: Selection of Efficient Monetary Equilibria Through Aggregate Real Savings-Based Taylor Rule
abstract: This paper uses the generalized Cass criterion $\sum^{\infty}_{t=1}(\Vert p_{t}\Vert\sum_{h\in G_{t}}\Vert e^{h}_{t}\Vert)^{-1}=\infty$ to extend the results from Dognini (2026) regarding the existence of efficient monetary equilibria on consumption-loan overlapping generations economies. These results reveal that if the economy is prone to savings, then monetary equilibria will emerge in a pure non-stationary general equilibrium model with heterogeneous households, thus providing a solution to the Hahn (1965) problem. It is also proved that, in prone-to-savings economies, non-vanishing relative aggregate real savings fully characterize efficient monetary equilibria. I use this result to show that a Taylor rule based on an inflation ceiling and a relative aggregate real savings floor can be used to control the price level and lead the economy towards an efficient monetary equilibrium. In contrast, a Taylor rule based solely on an inflation target is able to control the price level but generally leads the economy towards an inefficient monetary equilibrium.
tldr: 该论文通过引入基于总实际储蓄的泰勒规则，证明了在储蓄倾向经济中，该规则能引导经济走向有效货币均衡，而仅基于通胀目标的泰勒规则则可能导致无效均衡。
abstract_cn: 本文利用广义卡斯准则 $\sum^{\infty}_{t=1}(\Vert p_{t}\Vert\sum_{h\in G_{t}}\Vert e^{h}_{t}\Vert)^{-1}=\infty$，将Dognini（2026）关于消费贷款重叠世代经济中有效货币均衡存在性的结论进行了推广。这些结果表明，若经济具有储蓄倾向，则在包含异质性家庭的纯非平稳一般均衡模型中，货币均衡将会出现，从而为Hahn（1965）问题提供了一种解决方案。本文还证明，在具有储蓄倾向的经济中，非消失的相对总实际储蓄完全刻画了有效货币均衡。利用这一结果，本文表明，基于通胀上限与相对总实际储蓄下限的泰勒规则（Taylor rule）可用于控制价格水平，并引导经济趋向有效货币均衡。相比之下，仅基于通胀目标的泰勒规则虽能控制价格水平，但通常会导致经济趋向无效货币均衡。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：货币政策 7.0/10。论文研究货币均衡的效率，核心是泰勒规则（货币政策工具）对价格水平和均衡效率的影响。虽然涉及通胀，但重点在于货币政策规则的设计和效果，属于货币政策领域。商业银行和财政政策领域无实质关联。

title: Risk Aversion Reversals
abstract: Standard stochastic choice models used to estimate risk aversion can lead to risk-aversion reversals, where a more risk-averse individual chooses a riskier lottery more frequently than a less risk-averse individual. We study when reversals are implied by the preference specification rather than the noise specification. We say that two utilities imply reversals in a given noise framework if reversals arise for every specification of noise for each individual. For weak utility, a flexible class that includes logit and probit and allows for menu-dependent noise, two utilities imply reversals if and only if their curvature ratio is unbounded. This condition holds for CARA, CRRA, and their generalizations, for which reversals arise for empirically relevant coefficients and lotteries, raising concerns about resulting estimates and out-of-sample predictions. Finally, we show that equicautious HARA, sum-ex, and sum-power utilities do not imply reversals and that, moreover, these families remain well-behaved for multinomial choice.
tldr: 该论文研究标准随机选择模型中的风险厌恶逆转现象，发现当效用函数的曲率比无界时，逆转必然发生，并提出了不导致逆转的效用函数族。
abstract_cn: 用于估计风险厌恶的标准随机选择模型可能导致风险厌恶反转，即一个更厌恶风险的个体比一个较不厌恶风险的个体更频繁地选择风险更高的彩票。我们研究了反转是由偏好设定还是噪声设定所导致的情况。我们指出，在给定的噪声框架下，如果对于每个个体的每一种噪声设定都会出现反转，那么两种效用函数就蕴含了反转。对于弱效用函数（weak utility）——这一灵活类别包括逻辑模型（logit）和概率模型（probit），并允许依赖于菜单的噪声——两种效用函数蕴含反转当且仅当其曲率比（curvature ratio）是无界的。这一条件适用于常绝对风险厌恶（CARA）、常相对风险厌恶（CRRA）及其推广形式，对于这些模型，反转会在经验相关的系数和彩票中出现，从而引发对由此产生的估计结果及样本外预测的担忧。最后，我们证明等谨慎的HARA（equicautious HARA）、指数和（sum-ex）以及幂和（sum-power）效用函数并不蕴含反转，而且这些函数族在多项选择（multinomial choice）中仍然保持良好的性质。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究风险厌恶逆转现象，属于微观经济理论或行为经济学范畴，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。三个领域均无实质关联。

title: The Impossibility of a Gerrymander-Proof Representative Democracy
abstract: A representative democracy is immune to gerrymandering if it satisfies Chambers' (2008) representative consistency. We examine preference aggregation and show that representative consistency is mutually inconsistent with three other normative desiderata -- efficiency, anonymity, and neutrality. We show this impossibility result both in a setting with ordinal preferences and a setting with expected utility preferences.
tldr: 该论文证明在代议制民主中，无法同时满足代表一致性、效率、匿名性和中立性四个规范性条件，即不存在完全避免不公正选区划分的选举制度。
abstract_cn: 一个代议制民主政体若满足Chambers（2008）所提出的代表性一致性（representative consistency），则可免受选区划分不公（gerrymandering）的影响。我们考察了偏好聚合问题，并证明代表性一致性与另外三项规范性准则——效率（efficiency）、匿名性（anonymity）和中立性（neutrality）——相互矛盾。我们在序数偏好（ordinal preferences）与期望效用偏好（expected utility preferences）两种设定下均证明了这一不可能性结果。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究的是代议制民主中的选区划分（gerrymandering）问题，属于政治学和偏好聚合理论，完全不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。因此三个领域均为0分。

title: Agreement and Diversity in Interpretation
abstract: We study joint decision-making when agents agree on all primitives other than signal likelihoods. We propose a decision-theoretic measure of interpretive disagreement: a pair of subjective models is more agreeable than another if, uniformly across decision problems, it supports a larger set of signal-contingent plans that both agents weakly prefer ex-ante to the common reservation payoff. We show that this measure is prior independent and can be represented as an inclusion preorder over pairs of subjective models: each model in the more agreeable pair is a convex combination of the two models in the less agreeable pair. We then show that the measure's unique rotation-invariant scalar completion is cosine similarity. Applications show that greater agreement reduces speculative-trade wedges, expands a normalized version of the ex-ante Pareto frontier, and enlarges the set of single-model rationalizations. Our order is independent of Blackwell dominance and selects quadratic over KL-type Bregman divergences.
tldr: 该论文提出一种决策理论度量来衡量解释分歧，并证明余弦相似度是其唯一的旋转不变标量完备化，应用于投机交易、帕累托前沿和理性化集合。
abstract_cn: 我们研究了当主体在除信号似然外的所有原始要素上达成一致时的联合决策问题。我们提出了一种决策理论视角下的解释性分歧度量：如果一对主观模型在各类决策问题中，相较于另一对主观模型，能够支持更大规模的、使两个主体在事前均弱偏好于共同保留收益的信号依赖计划集，则称前者比后者更具一致性。我们证明该度量具有先验独立性，并可表示为成对主观模型上的包含预序关系：更具一致性对中的每个模型均为较不一致对中两个模型的凸组合。进一步，我们证明该度量唯一的旋转不变标量完备化形式是余弦相似度。应用表明，更高的一致性会减少投机性交易价差、扩展事前帕累托边界的标准化版本，并扩大单一模型合理化的集合。我们的序关系独立于布莱克威尔优势，且选择二次型而非KL型布雷格曼散度。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究的是决策理论中的解释分歧，涉及主观模型、信号依赖计划和帕累托前沿，与商业银行、货币政策或财政政策无任何实质关联。

title: Square-Root Price Impact Is Necessary for Endogenous Manipulation Cycles in Learning-Agent Markets
abstract: We study a minimal agent-based market in which a single evolutionary-optimized institutional agent interacts with 20{,}000 herding retail traders. The agent spontaneously discovers a multi-cycle predatory strategy, producing 8--11 complete cycles over 2000 trading days with total portfolio return of $+51\%$ (best of 20 seeds; mean $+37.7\%$). Mean-field reduction maps the system onto a nonlinear oscillator that undergoes two distinct bifurcations: a continuous Hopf transition as institutional capital exceeds a critical threshold $C_c$, with oscillation amplitude $A \propto (C-C_c)^α$ where $α$ is consistent with the standard prediction of $1/2$; and a discontinuous fold transition in the herding-scale parameter space. The limit cycle persists even at $β= 0$: position-tracking feedback coupled with square-root price impact creates a self-sustained nonlinear oscillator requiring no retail herding. Square-root impact is shown to be necessary: linear impact eliminates the Hopf bifurcation entirely and renders the retail market unconditionally stable. Manipulation cycles thus emerge as the optimal-control solution of a nonlinear dynamical system, and a structural analogy to Maxwell's demon frames the agent as an information-processing controller that reduces the entropy rate of the price process.
tldr: 该论文通过代理模型发现，平方根价格影响是内生操纵周期存在的必要条件，而线性影响则消除周期，揭示了市场操纵周期作为非线性动力系统最优控制解的本质。
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一个基于智能体的最小化市场模型，其中单个经过进化优化的机构智能体与20,000名羊群行为散户交易者进行交互。该智能体自发发现了一种多周期掠夺策略，在2000个交易日内产生8至11个完整周期，投资组合总回报率为+51%（20次模拟中的最佳结果；平均值为+37.7%）。通过平均场约化，该系统被映射为一个非线性振荡器，该振荡器经历两种不同的分岔：当机构资本超过临界阈值$C_c$时，发生连续Hopf分岔，振荡幅度$A \propto (C-C_c)^α$，其中$α$与标准预测值$1/2$一致；以及在羊群规模参数空间中发生的不连续折叠分岔。即使在$β= 0$时，极限环仍然存在：持仓跟踪反馈与平方根价格冲击相结合，形成了一个自持的非线性振荡器，无需散户羊群行为即可维持。研究表明，平方根冲击是必要的：线性冲击完全消除了Hopf分岔，并使散户市场无条件稳定。因此，操纵周期作为非线性动力系统的最优控制解而涌现，并且与麦克斯韦妖的结构类比将智能体视为一个信息处理控制器，该控制器降低了价格过程的熵率。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究基于智能体的市场模型中的价格影响和操纵周期，涉及非线性动力学和最优控制，与商业银行、货币政策或财政政策无实质关联。未提及银行、信贷、中央银行政策或财政工具。

title: Rockafellian relaxation and minimum-norm slack for the Walrasian equilibrium problem
abstract: We propose a Rockafellian relaxation of the Walrasian equilibrium problem for an exchange economy that may not admit one. Market clearing is slackened by a non-negative variable $v$ whose norm is penalized; the relaxation is well posed throughout. As the penalty grows, the residual converges to a vector $v^*_\infty$ of minimum norm in the feasible range of excess demand, measuring the distance to the nearest equilibrium-admitting economy. A stressed Shapley--Shubik example recovers the analytical infeasibility floor to machine
tldr: 该论文提出了一种Rockafellian松弛方法来解决可能不存在均衡的交换经济中的瓦尔拉斯均衡问题，通过最小范数松弛度量到最近均衡经济的距离。
abstract_cn: 我们针对可能不存在瓦尔拉斯均衡的交换经济，提出了一种罗克费利安松弛方法。市场出清条件通过一个非负变量 $v$ 被放宽，该变量的范数受到惩罚；该松弛方法在整个过程中均具有适定性。随着惩罚增大，残差收敛至超额需求可行范围内具有最小范数的向量 $v^*_\infty$，该向量衡量了与最近的可容许均衡经济之间的距离。一个经过压力测试的沙普利-舒比克（Shapley--Shubik）示例将分析不可行下限恢复至机器精度。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究Walrasian均衡的存在性问题，提出Rockafellian松弛方法，属于一般均衡理论，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。

title: Robustness in Sequential Decision Making under Evolving Uncertainty: Evidence from High-Frequency Market Making
abstract: We study sequential decision making under evolving uncertainty in high-frequency financial markets, where changing market dynamics continually challenge static decision policies. We show that robustness has two economically meaningful dimensions: uncertainty tolerance, which determines how much uncertainty the decision maker allows, and action robustness, which governs how conservatively decisions respond. Robustness is not merely protection against model misspecification, but a state-dependent mechanism that reshapes sequential decision behaviors. Simulation and empirical evidence show that action robustness has a substantially larger impact than uncertainty tolerance. Moreover, excessive robustness may reduce profitability in illiquid markets by limiting execution opportunities.
tldr: 该论文研究高频金融市场中序贯决策对演化不确定性的鲁棒性，发现行动鲁棒性比不确定性容忍度影响更大，且过度鲁棒性在非流动性市场中会降低盈利。
abstract_cn: 我们研究高频金融市场中在动态不确定性下的序贯决策问题，其中不断变化的市场动态持续挑战静态决策策略。我们证明，稳健性具有两个具有经济学意义的维度：不确定性容忍度（uncertainty tolerance），它决定了决策者所允许的不确定性程度；以及行动稳健性（action robustness），它控制着决策的保守程度。稳健性不仅仅是对模型误设的保护，更是一种依赖于市场状态、能够重塑序贯决策行为的机制。模拟与实证证据表明，行动稳健性的影响远大于不确定性容忍度。此外，过度的稳健性可能通过限制执行机会，降低非流动性市场的盈利能力。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究高频交易中的序贯决策鲁棒性，涉及市场微观结构和算法交易，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。未提及银行、信贷、中央银行政策或财政工具。

title: Strategic Buying Agents
abstract: Agentic AI is shifting online shopping from search toward delegated purchasing, where autonomous buying agents monitor markets and decide when to buy on a consumer's behalf. We study the design of such strategic buying agents, which must decide when to purchase within a finite shopping window, translating price observations, the remaining time horizon, and beliefs about future price changes into a purchase policy. We formulate this problem across three information regimes: stationary, Bayesian, and robust, and treat the resulting optimal policies as a policy menu for implementation. In the stationary regime, price adjustments follow a Poisson arrival process with a known post-adjustment price distribution; the optimal policy is a dynamic purchase-threshold rule, with the threshold governed by an ordinary differential equation. In the Bayesian regime, the adjustment intensity is known, but the price-adjustment distribution is uncertain; the optimal rule remains threshold-based, now depending on posterior beliefs, and we bound the value of knowing the true distribution. In the robust regime, the agent has only price bounds and seeks worst-case protection; randomized threshold policies achieve optimal competitive-ratio and minimax-regret guarantees. We evaluate the proposed policies on Amazon price histories from Keepa (367 items, 48,933 timestamped observations) and examine their integration into language-model buying agents. The stationary and Bayesian policies perform competitively on mean normalized consumer surplus despite their stylized assumptions, while the robust policy performs best at the distribution's 10th percentile. Results suggest language models are better suited to selecting among regimes and calibration samples than to making buy-or-wait decisions directly.
tldr: 该论文研究战略购买代理在有限购物窗口内的最优购买策略，提出了三种信息体制下的阈值策略，并在亚马逊价格数据上评估了其性能。
abstract_cn: 自主型人工智能正将在线购物从搜索模式转向委托购买模式，即由自主购买代理监控市场，并代表消费者决定何时购买。我们研究了此类战略性购买代理的设计问题，这些代理需在有限购物窗口内决定购买时机，将价格观测值、剩余时间跨度以及对未来价格变化的信念转化为购买策略。我们在三种信息机制下对该问题进行建模：平稳机制、贝叶斯机制和鲁棒机制，并将所得最优策略视为可供实施的政策菜单。在平稳机制下，价格调整遵循泊松到达过程，且调整后的价格分布已知；最优策略为动态购买阈值规则，该阈值由常微分方程控制。在贝叶斯机制下，调整强度已知，但价格调整分布不确定；最优规则仍基于阈值，但此时依赖于后验信念，我们界定了知晓真实分布的价值。在鲁棒机制下，代理仅掌握价格边界并寻求最坏情况下的保护；随机阈值策略可实现最优竞争比和极小化最大遗憾保证。我们基于Keepa提供的亚马逊价格历史数据（367件商品，48,933个带时间戳的观测值）对所提策略进行评估，并考察其与语言模型购买代理的集成。尽管采用了简化假设，平稳策略与贝叶斯策略在平均标准化消费者剩余方面仍表现出竞争力，而鲁棒策略在分布的第10百分位处表现最佳。结果表明，语言模型更适用于在机制与校准样本之间进行选择，而非直接做出买或等的决策。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Innovating Risk Modelling for Global Funds
abstract: Markowitz defined portfolio risk as an internal property, built from the covariance among a book's own holdings rather than the distance to any index. Seventy years of simplification reversed that. The market beta of CAPM, the fixed style and industry axes of Barra-type models, and the promotion of benchmark deviation to the definition of risk all traded the inward view for an external one. Risk became distance from an index. For a fund that fits no benchmark, that trade fails. A global book concentrated in a few markets and a few innovation sectors has no natural index to deviate from, and the active-risk number it produces measures the mismatch, not the risk. We return to the covariance. Principal component analysis (PCA) recovers the systematic structure inside the portfolio directly from its own returns. PCA has always carried one cost: its factors resist a plain-English reading. We clear that with a generative-AI labelling layer. It names the leading factors, ranked by their actual contribution to risk rather than by universe variance, and a deterministic rubric keeps it from inventing structure the loadings do not contain. Around this sit four independent signals. Density-based clustering with a mismatch ratio flags groups whose risk outruns their capital. A sign-invariant PCA Risk Score (PRS) marks the names that build the dominant factor bets. A standalone Bleed score catches the slow capital destroyers PCA cannot see. A trailing-return timing gate routes disagreements between the risk signals and recent price action to human judgment. We run the full engine on a proxy global-innovation book of thirty names over one year.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于主成分分析和生成式AI标签的全球基金风险建模方法，以解决传统基准偏离风险模型对无基准基金的适用性问题。
abstract_cn: Markowitz将投资组合风险定义为一种内在属性，它源于投资组合自身持仓之间的协方差，而非与任何基准指数的距离。七十年的简化过程颠覆了这一观点。CAPM的市场贝塔、Barra类型模型中的固定风格与行业轴，以及将基准偏离度提升为风险定义的做法，都将内在视角置换为外在视角。风险变成了与基准指数的距离。对于不匹配任何基准的基金而言，这种置换是失效的。一个集中于少数市场与少数创新领域的全球性投资组合，并无天然的基准指数可供偏离，其所产生的主动风险数值衡量的是错配程度，而非风险本身。我们回归到协方差。主成分分析（PCA）直接从投资组合自身的收益率中恢复其内部的系统结构。PCA一直存在一个代价：其因子难以用通俗语言解读。我们通过一个生成式AI标注层解决了这一问题。它根据因子对风险的实际贡献（而非全市场方差）进行排序，并命名主要因子，同时一个确定性的评分准则确保它不会编造出载荷中不包含的结构。围绕这一核心，设有四个独立信号。基于密度的聚类结合错配比率，可标记出风险超过其资本的组别。一个符号不变的PCA风险评分（PRS）用于识别构成主要因子押注的标的。一个独立的Bleed评分用于捕捉PCA无法察觉的缓慢资本侵蚀者。一个滞后收益率择时门控机制，将风险信号与近期价格行为之间的分歧交由人工判断。我们在一个由三十只标的构成的全球创新代理投资组合上，对该完整引擎进行了为期一年的运行测试。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: SHARC: SHAP-Based Interpretability in Machine Learning Risk Models for Regulatory Capital under ICAAP and CCAR
abstract:
The adoption of non-parametric machine learning models for regulatory capital estimation introduces a fundamental governance challenge: the inability to explain model outputs in a manner auditable by supervisory bodies. This 'black box' problem remains a major barrier to the adoption of Gaussian Process Regression (GPR) and related ML architectures in ICAAP and CCAR workflows despite their predictive advantages over traditional parametric approaches.
  This paper addresses this barrier through SHARC (SHAP for Regulatory Capital), an explainability framework for the Hybrid GPR-HS architecture and its stress-testing extension. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP), derived from cooperative game theory and satisfying the properties of Local Accuracy, Missingness, Consistency, and Efficiency, are applied to Stressed Value-at-Risk (SVaR) outputs under three macro scenarios: West Asia War, Climate Risk, and AI Bubble/Regulatory Burden.
  SHARC decomposes SVaR into baseline, mean-driven, and volatility-driven components, enabling transparent linkage between scenario design and capital outcomes. Two findings emerge. First, SHARC consistently links non-linear SVaR outputs to underlying scenario inputs, confirming framework fidelity and providing auditable traceability of capital drivers. Second, under stress conditions, the mean return component (directional loss magnitude) dominates the variance component (volatility baseline) in determining capital levels, with implications for capital limit-setting, position management, and hedging strategy. The results establish SHARC as a regulator-aligned explainability layer that makes the Hybrid GPR-HS framework fully auditable and consistent with FRTB, ICAAP Pillar 2, and CCAR transparency requirements.
tldr: 该论文提出SHARC框架，利用SHAP值解释混合GPR-HS模型在监管资本（ICAAP和CCAR）中的风险输出，解决了机器学习黑箱问题，并发现压力情景下均值成分主导资本水平。
abstract_cn:
采用非参数机器学习模型进行监管资本估算引发了一个根本性的治理挑战：无法以监管机构可审计的方式解释模型输出。这一“黑箱”问题仍是高斯过程回归（Gaussian Process Regression, GPR）及相关机器学习架构在内部资本充足评估程序（ICAAP）和全面资本分析与审查（CCAR）工作流中应用的主要障碍，尽管这些模型在预测能力上优于传统参数化方法。

本文通过SHARC（用于监管资本的SHAP解释框架）这一可解释性框架来应对该障碍，该框架针对混合GPR-HS架构及其压力测试扩展而设计。基于合作博弈论、满足局部准确性、缺失性、一致性和效率性等性质的Shapley加法解释（SHapley Additive exPlanations, SHAP）被应用于三种宏观情景下的压力风险价值（Stressed Value-at-Risk, SVaR）输出：西亚战争、气候风险以及人工智能泡沫/监管负担。

SHARC将SVaR分解为基准成分、均值驱动成分和波动率驱动成分，从而在情景设计与资本结果之间建立透明关联。研究得出两项发现。第一，SHARC始终将非线性SVaR输出与底层情景输入相关联，证实了框架的保真度，并为资本驱动因素提供了可审计的追溯性。第二，在压力条件下，均值回报成分（方向性损失幅度）在决定资本水平方面主导方差成分（波动率基准），这对资本限额设定、头寸管理及对冲策略具有重要影响。研究结果表明，SHARC构建了一个与监管要求一致的可解释性层，使混合GPR-HS框架完全可审计，并符合交易账簿基本审查（FRTB）、ICAAP第二支柱及CCAR透明度要求。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 7.0/10。commercial_banking: 论文核心是监管资本（ICAAP, CCAR）和风险模型（SVaR），直接涉及银行资本充足率、压力测试和监管合规，属于商业银行领域。monetary_policy: 仅提及宏观场景（如战争、气候），未研究货币政策工具或传导，评分低。fiscal_policy: 未涉及政府收支或债务，评分低。最高匹配领域为commercial_banking。

title: Stablecoins under Stress in a National Economy: Transaction-Level Evidence from Austrian Crypto-Asset Service Providers
abstract: Cryptoassets are increasingly entangled with the traditional financial system, and how this activity integrates into national economies and behaves under stress bears on financial stability and the design of public digital money. However, blockchain pseudonymity and the lack of geographic identifiers force existing work to rely on indirect proxies to infer and locate market participants. Here we use a regulatory registry that directly identifies the on-chain addresses of all crypto-asset service providers (CASPs) registered in Austria, reconstructing their on-chain transaction activity across Bitcoin, Ether, USDC, and USDT through May 2025, and separating retail-like from institutionally mediated flows. We find that Austrian CASPs intermediate roughly USD 30 billion with external counterparties and are integrated globally rather than domestically. In value, this activity is dominated by a few institutional counterparties; in number, by retail-like ones. Around three major shocks, the Terra-Luna collapse, the FTX bankruptcy, and the Silicon Valley Bank failure, the two groups respond through different mechanisms, and stablecoins do not act as a uniform safe haven. The clearest case is SVB, where retail-like deposits and institutional withdrawals are consistent with USDC's two-tiered redemption mechanism. These patterns are invisible in aggregate data. Registry-based, transaction-level measurement thus offers a reproducible, cross-jurisdictional basis for monitoring how cryptoasset markets transmit risk.
tldr: 该论文利用奥地利加密资产服务提供商的链上交易数据，研究稳定币在三次重大冲击（Terra-Luna崩溃、FTX破产、硅谷银行倒闭）下的行为，发现零售和机构投资者反应不同，稳定币并非统一的安全港，且这些模式在聚合数据中不可见。
abstract_cn: 加密资产正日益与传统金融体系交织在一起，其如何融入国民经济以及在压力下的表现，对金融稳定和公共数字货币的设计具有重要影响。然而，区块链的匿名性以及地理标识符的缺失，迫使现有研究依赖间接代理指标来推断和定位市场参与者。本文利用直接识别在奥地利注册的所有加密资产服务提供商（CASPs）链上地址的监管登记册，重建了其截至2025年5月在比特币、以太币、USDC和USDT上的链上交易活动，并将零售类流量与机构中介流量区分开来。我们发现，奥地利CASPs与外部交易对手的中介交易额约为300亿美元，且其整合是全球性的而非国内性的。从价值上看，这一活动由少数机构交易对手主导；从数量上看，则由零售类交易对手主导。在三次重大冲击——Terra-Luna崩盘、FTX破产和硅谷银行（SVB）倒闭——期间，这两类群体通过不同机制做出反应，而稳定币并未充当统一的避险资产。最明显的案例是SVB事件，其中零售类存款与机构提款的行为与USDC的双层赎回机制一致。这些模式在汇总数据中是无法观察到的。因此，基于登记册的交易层面测量为监测加密资产市场如何传导风险提供了一个可复制、跨司法管辖区的依据。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 1.0/10。论文研究稳定币在压力事件下的行为，使用奥地利加密资产服务提供商的链上交易数据。虽然涉及金融稳定和公共数字货币设计，但核心是加密资产市场，而非商业银行、货币政策或财政政策。商业银行领域：未涉及银行信贷、资本监管等；货币政策领域：未研究央行政策工具或传导；财政政策领域：未涉及政府收支或债务。因此三个领域均仅得1分。

title: Grounded Event Extraction from SEC 8-K Filings with a Fine-Grained Taxonomy
abstract: Form 8-K filings are the primary channel through which U.S. public companies disclose material events, but the SEC item codes attached to them are coarse: a single item spans routine administrative changes and chief executive departures, and many of the most market-moving disclosures fall into a catch-all item. Large language models make fine-grained labelling feasible at corpus scale, but only if the labels can be traced to the source text and shown to be reliable. We present a two-stage system that tags 8-K disclosures against a three-tier taxonomy of 119 event types. The first stage constrains output to valid taxonomy entries and anchors every tag to a verbatim quote via fuzzy n-gram validation; the second re-grades each cited quote against the category definition to produce a quality score. Applying the system to 292,984 filings from 2022 to 2026 yields 601,088 grounded event tags, which we release. Over 5,125 stratified tags, an LLM judge finds precision rises monotonically with the quality score, from 12% to 96%, while unsupported tags fall from 8% to near zero. Ablation shows the score is calibrated only when assigned in a dedicated second pass. An event study on unsigned abnormal returns confirms, without any language model, that the taxonomy separates economically distinct events sharing an item code.
tldr: 该论文提出一个两阶段系统，从SEC 8-K文件中提取细粒度事件标签，并通过质量评分和事件研究验证其可靠性。
abstract_cn: 表格8-K申报文件是美国上市公司披露重大事件的主要渠道，但美国证券交易委员会（SEC）为其附加的项目代码较为粗疏：单个项目既涵盖常规行政变更，也包含首席执行官离职，且许多最具市场影响力的披露内容被归入一个包罗万象的杂项。大型语言模型使得在语料库规模上实现细粒度标注成为可能，但前提是这些标签能够追溯到源文本并被证明可靠。我们提出一个两阶段系统，该系统依据包含119种事件类型的三级分类法对8-K披露内容进行标注。第一阶段将输出约束为有效的分类条目，并通过模糊n-gram验证将每个标签锚定于逐字引文；第二阶段根据类别定义对每条引文进行重新评分，生成质量分数。将该系统应用于2022年至2026年间的292,984份申报文件，我们生成了601,088个有据可查的事件标签并予以发布。在5,125个分层标签上，大语言模型（LLM）评判器发现精确度随质量分数单调上升，从12%提升至96%，而无依据标签的比例则从8%降至接近零。消融实验表明，仅在专门的第二阶段分配时，该分数才具有校准性。一项针对非正常收益的事件研究（未使用任何语言模型）证实，该分类法能够区分共享同一项目代码但经济意义不同的事件。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究从SEC 8-K文件中提取细粒度事件，属于自然语言处理和金融文本挖掘领域，不涉及商业银行、货币政策或财政政策的核心问题。没有讨论银行信贷、监管、利率、通胀、政府支出或债务等主题。

title: What Useful Alphas?
abstract: This paper examines about 200 published long-short anomaly equity portfolios (Chen and Zimmermann, 2022). Over the period through 2005 (December 2005 and earlier) and across all stocks, their median zero-investment return was an impressive 48 bp per month. Using only post-2005 years (January 2006 onward) reduces this to 19 bp. Using only "non-micro" top-3,000 stocks in the top 90% of market capitalization reduces this to 26 bp. Using only post-2005 and non-micro stocks reduces this to 7 bp. Even modest allowances for luck or transaction costs would have eliminated even these 7 bp. The evidence strongly suggests that published academic anomalies have been useless to non-micro-cap portfolio managers in the 21st century. Public stock markets were very efficient.
tldr: 该论文检验了约200个已发表的长期-短期异常股票组合，发现自2005年后这些异常收益大幅下降，对非微型股组合经理而言几乎无用，表明公开股票市场非常有效。
abstract_cn: 本文考察了约200个已发表的多空异常股票投资组合（Chen & Zimmermann, 2022）。在截至2005年（2005年12月及更早）的时期内，且涵盖所有股票，其中位数零投资回报率高达每月48个基点。仅使用2005年之后（2006年1月起）的数据，该回报率降至19个基点。仅使用市值排名前90%中“非微型”的3000只股票，该回报率降至26个基点。同时使用2005年之后的数据与非微型股票，该回报率降至7个基点。即使考虑适度的运气或交易成本，这7个基点也可能被完全抵消。证据强烈表明，在21世纪，已发表的学术异常对非微型股投资组合经理而言已毫无用处。公开股票市场非常有效。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究股票市场中的异常收益组合（anomaly equity portfolios），属于资产定价和有效市场假说领域，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。未涉及银行信贷、金融中介、中央银行政策或政府财政工具。

title: Any Axes Are Allowed: A Characteristic-Axis Integral Diagnostic of Factor Models
abstract: This paper extends the cap-axis integral diagnostic to general characteristic axes, measuring factor-model pricing errors as bridge-alpha curves. A predetermined characteristic order generates prefix portfolios; subtracting equal-exposure aggregate portfolios yields zero-investment bridges indexed by cutoff p. The null is a zero-curve restriction on the subspace generated by the order, not a pointwise decile test. In 1967-2024 CRSP data, adding a counterpart factor shifts each curve downward, but only HML and CMA/IA overcorrect enough to be rejected, whereas RMW and UMD flatten their axes. A size-split reconstruction traces the overcorrection to 2x3 factor construction rather than the premium. Axis pricing errors relate weakly to maximum-Sharpe gains.
tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于特征轴积分的因子模型诊断方法，通过桥-alpha曲线测量定价误差，并在CRSP数据中检验了常见因子，发现HML和CMA/IA过度校正，而RMW和UMD则使曲线平坦化。
abstract_cn: 本文将cap-axis积分诊断方法推广至一般特征轴，将因子模型定价误差测量为桥-alpha曲线。预设的特征顺序生成前缀投资组合；减去等暴露汇总投资组合后，得到以截止点p为索引的零投资桥。原假设是对由该顺序生成的子空间施加的零曲线约束，而非逐十分位点检验。在1967-2024年CRSP数据中，加入对应因子会使每条曲线下移，但仅HML与CMA/IA过度修正至被拒绝的程度，而RMW与UMD则使其轴趋于平坦。通过规模拆分重建发现，过度修正源于2x3因子构建方式而非溢价本身。轴定价误差与最大夏普增益之间的关联较弱。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 0.0/10。论文研究因子模型的定价误差诊断方法，属于资产定价领域，与商业银行、货币政策、财政政策均无实质关联。标题、摘要和关键词均未涉及银行、信贷、中央银行、政府收支等主题。

title: Integrated model of brand trust and brand loyalty from digital, ethical, and operational perspectives: an empirical study in the Vietnamese commercial bank sector
abstract: In rapidly digitizing emerging countries, the enhancement of brand loyalty (BL) is essential to drive growth and create a sustainable business. To achieve this, this study empirically tests an integrated digital, ethical, and operational framework. The study examines how three contemporary antecedents, consumer-generated social media communication (CGSC), corporate social responsibility (CSR), and service accessibility (SA), foster BL through brand trust (BTR) within the Vietnamese commercial banking sector. Data collected from 420 Vietnamese commercial bank customers via online convenience and snowball sampling were analyzed using PLS-SEM to test the model. The findings reveal that CGSC, CSR, and SA significantly and positively predict BTR, with accessibility exerting the strongest influence. In turn, BTR powerfully determines BL. Significantly, the analysis substantiates the full mediating role of BTR in these relationships. Hence, our results provide an actionable blueprint for business practitioners to build sustainable customer loyalty. Banking executives should strengthen BTR through CGSC, CSR, and SA, as it serves as the essential bridge for business success. This novel research also contributes significantly by revealing the complete mechanism from digital, ethical, and operational perspectives to customer BL through BTR.

open_access_candidates.source: DOAJ (DOAJ: Directory of Open Access Journals)

tldr: 该论文通过实证研究越南商业银行客户数据，发现消费者生成的社交媒体沟通、企业社会责任和服务可及性通过品牌信任显著影响品牌忠诚度。
abstract_cn: 在快速数字化的新兴国家中，提升品牌忠诚度（BL）对于推动增长和创造可持续业务至关重要。为实现这一目标，本研究通过实证检验了一个整合了数字化、伦理与运营的综合框架。研究考察了消费者生成的社交媒体传播（CGSC）、企业社会责任（CSR）和服务可及性（SA）这三个当代前因变量，如何通过品牌信任（BTR）在越南商业银行领域促进品牌忠诚度。通过在线便利抽样和滚雪球抽样收集了420名越南商业银行客户的数据，并采用偏最小二乘结构方程模型（PLS-SEM）对模型进行检验。研究结果表明，CGSC、CSR和SA均显著正向预测BTR，其中服务可及性的影响最强；而BTR又强有力地决定了BL。重要的是，分析证实了BTR在这些关系中具有完全中介作用。因此，我们的研究结果为商业从业者构建可持续客户忠诚度提供了可操作的蓝图。银行高管应通过CGSC、CSR和SA强化BTR，因为它是实现业务成功的关键桥梁。这项新颖的研究还通过揭示从数字化、伦理和运营视角经由BTR通向客户BL的完整机制，做出了重要贡献。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 7.0/10。commercial_banking: 论文以越南商业银行客户为研究对象，探讨品牌信任和忠诚度，涉及银行服务可及性、企业社会责任等，属于商业银行领域的客户关系管理，但未涉及信贷、风险、监管等核心银行议题，因此评7分。monetary_policy: 论文完全不涉及货币政策工具、传导或通胀，评0分。fiscal_policy: 论文不涉及政府收支、债务或财政政策，评0分。最高匹配领域为commercial_banking。

title: Does Liquidity Risk Impact Asset Quality and Financial Stability? Evidence from Uzbekistan Commercial Banks
abstract: This study investigates the impact of liquidity risk on asset quality and financial stability in Uzbekistan’s commercial banking sector. Using quarterly time-series data from 2016 to 2024, the study employs Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) regression with quadratic specifications to capture potential non-linear effects of liquidity. Two models are estimated to examine (i) the relationship between liquidity risk and asset quality, and (ii) the impact of liquidity risk on financial stability, proxied by net profit. The results indicate that liquidity risk does not have a statistically significant effect on asset quality, suggesting that credit performance is primarily driven by structural and macroeconomic factors rather than liquidity conditions. In contrast, the financial stability model demonstrates high explanatory power (R2 = 0.883), although individual coefficients are statistically insignificant due to severe multicollinearity among banking sector variables. The findings do not support the conventional liquidity–profitability trade-off hypothesis, as no evidence of a linear or non-linear relationship between liquidity and profitability is observed. Regulatory capital emerges as the most influential variable, indicating the importance of capital strength in supporting banking stability. This study contributes to the literature by providing novel empirical evidence from a transition economy, highlighting the limitations of isolating liquidity effects in rapidly expanding banking systems. The results suggest that in reform-oriented financial environments, banking stability is shaped more by structural growth and capital adequacy than by liquidity trade-offs, offering important implications for macroprudential policy design.
journal: Journal of risk and financial management

open_access_candidates.source: Journal of risk and financial management

tldr: 该研究利用乌兹别克斯坦商业银行2016-2024年季度数据，发现流动性风险对资产质量无显著影响，而金融稳定性主要由资本充足率驱动，不支持流动性-盈利权衡假说。
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了流动性风险对乌兹别克斯坦商业银行部门资产质量与金融稳定的影响。利用2016年至2024年的季度时间序列数据，本研究采用包含二次项设定的普通最小二乘法（OLS）回归，以捕捉流动性可能存在的非线性效应。研究估计了两个模型，分别考察：（i）流动性风险与资产质量之间的关系；（ii）流动性风险对以净利润为代理变量的金融稳定的影响。结果表明，流动性风险对资产质量并无统计上显著的影响，这表明信贷表现主要受结构性及宏观经济因素驱动，而非流动性状况。相比之下，金融稳定模型显示出较高的解释力（R² = 0.883），但由于银行业变量之间存在严重的多重共线性，各单个系数的统计显著性并不显著。研究结果不支持传统的流动性-盈利性权衡假说，未观察到流动性与其盈利性之间存在线性或非线性关系的证据。监管资本成为最具影响力的变量，表明资本实力在支撑银行稳定性方面的重要性。本研究通过提供来自转型经济体的新颖实证证据，为相关文献作出贡献，并揭示了在快速扩张的银行体系中孤立考察流动性效应的局限性。研究结果表明，在以改革为导向的金融环境中，银行稳定性更多由结构性增长与资本充足性所塑造，而非流动性权衡，这为宏观审慎政策设计提供了重要启示。

analysis.chinese_title: 流动性风险是否影响资产质量和金融稳定性？来自乌兹别克斯坦商业银行的证据
analysis.summary: 本研究利用2016年至2024年乌兹别克斯坦商业银行的季度时间序列数据，采用带有二次项的普通最小二乘回归，考察流动性风险对资产质量和金融稳定性的影响。两个模型分别检验流动性风险与资产质量的关系，以及流动性风险对金融稳定性（以净利润衡量）的影响。结果显示，流动性风险对资产质量无显著影响，表明信贷表现主要由结构和宏观经济因素驱动；金融稳定性模型解释力高（R²=0.883），但系数因严重多重共线性而不显著。未发现流动性-盈利性权衡的证据，监管资本是最具影响力的变量。研究强调了在快速扩张的银行体系中，资本充足率对稳定性的重要性。
innovations: 首次为转型经济体（乌兹别克斯坦）提供流动性风险对资产质量和金融稳定性影响的实证证据

title: Service Marketing Mix and Customer Loyalty in Commercial Banks of Bangladesh: Investigating the Mediating Role of Customer Satisfaction
abstract: This study evaluates the impact of the service marketing mix on customer loyalty in commercial banks in Bangladesh and examines the mediating role of customer satisfaction in this relationship. Survey data were collected from 210 customers of commercial banks located in Dhaka City using a structured questionnaire and a convenience sampling approach. The collected data were analyzed using Structural Equation Modelling through SmartPLS version 4. The findings reveal that all seven elements of the service marketing mix product, price, place, promotion, people, process, and physical evidence have significant and positive relationships with customer satisfaction and customer loyalty. The results also highlight the importance of customer satisfaction as a key mechanism through which service marketing strategies can strengthen customer loyalty in the banking sector. The study provides useful implications for bank managers by identifying the strengths and weaknesses of existing marketing strategies and demonstrating how improved customer satisfaction can contribute to stronger customer retention and loyalty. From an academic perspective, this research contributes to the literature on service marketing and customer behavior in the banking industry. As the role of the service marketing mix in Bangladesh’s commercial banking sector has not been adequately explored, this study offers valuable insights into how effective service marketing strategies can enhance customer loyalty and support long-term sustainability through customer satisfaction.

tldr: 该研究调查了孟加拉国商业银行服务营销组合对客户忠诚度的影响，发现所有七个营销组合要素均显著正向影响客户满意度和忠诚度，且客户满意度起中介作用。
abstract_cn: 本研究评估了服务营销组合对孟加拉国商业银行客户忠诚度的影响，并探讨了客户满意度在此关系中的中介作用。采用结构化问卷和便利抽样法，收集了达卡市210名商业银行客户的数据。通过SmartPLS 4版软件运用结构方程模型（Structural Equation Modelling）对数据进行分析。研究结果表明，服务营销组合的七个要素——产品（product）、价格（price）、地点（place）、促销（promotion）、人员（people）、过程（process）及有形证据（physical evidence）——均与客户满意度和客户忠诚度呈显著正相关。结果还凸显了客户满意度作为关键机制的重要性，服务营销策略可通过该机制增强银行业中的客户忠诚度。本研究通过识别现有营销策略的优势与不足，并展示提升客户满意度如何有助于增强客户留存与忠诚度，为银行管理者提供了实用启示。从学术视角看，本研究丰富了银行业服务营销与客户行为领域的文献。鉴于服务营销组合在孟加拉国商业银行领域尚未得到充分探讨，本研究为如何通过有效的服务营销策略提升客户忠诚度、并借助客户满意度支持长期可持续性发展提供了宝贵见解。

title: Financial Institutional Infrastructure: The Defence, Security and Resilience Bank as a Security-Finance Intermediary
abstract: This working paper examines the proposed Defence, Security and Resilience Bank (DSRB) as a form of financial institutional infrastructure rather than simply as a new multilateral lending institution. Rather than asking whether the DSRB is desirable policy or attempting to predict its eventual success, the paper asks a narrower institutional question: what financial function is the Bank designed to perform, and how can that function be evaluated before long-run defence, industrial, or macroeconomic outcomes become observable? The paper argues that the DSRB is intended to address a financing step that can be systematically underprovided under conditions of geopolitical uncertainty, long investment horizons, fragmented procurement, and commercial banking constraints. It locates the Bank within a broader sequence through which political commitments become operational capability and proposes that security-finance institutions should be evaluated not only by the capital pathways they create, but also by how effectively they constrain extraction, opacity, strategic reporting, and accountability displacement. To support this analysis, the paper introduces SFICRA-X (Security-Finance Institutional Crosswalk and Risk Allocation with Extraction, Opacity, and Discipline), a structured audit and early-evidence framework. SFICRA-X is designed to identify institutional claims, counterparties, financial instruments, risk allocation, degradation risks, discipline mechanisms, and the earliest evidence that should become observable if a security-finance institution is functioning as intended. It is presented as an audit and evaluation framework, not as a predictive model or performance assessment. The paper draws on official Government of Canada announcements, DSRB design materials, banking and defence-finance literature, multilateral development bank governance literature, and related institutional sources. Because the DSRB is not yet operational, the paper treats announcements and design documents as evidence of intended institutional architecture rather than evidence of institutional performance. The accompanying Zenodo package includes the final PDF, manuscript source, figures, methodological materials, metadata, citation files, release documentation, and transcript-support materials documenting the development of the analytical framework. These supporting materials are included for transparency, provenance, and research reproducibility and should not be interpreted as independent evidence for the factual claims made in the manuscript.

tldr: 论文提出国防、安全与韧性银行（DSRB）作为一种安全-金融中介，旨在解决地缘政治不确定性下融资不足的问题，并引入SFICRA-X框架用于评估其制度架构和风险分配。
abstract_cn: 本工作论文将拟议中的“国防、安全与韧性银行”（Defence, Security and Resilience Bank, DSRB）视为一种金融制度基础设施，而非仅仅是一个新的多边贷款机构。论文并非探讨DSRB是否为理想的政策选择，亦非试图预测其最终成败，而是聚焦于一个更为具体的制度性问题：该银行旨在履行何种金融功能，以及在长期国防、工业或宏观经济结果尚未显现之前，如何评估这一功能？论文认为，DSRB旨在解决一个在地缘政治不确定性、投资周期漫长、采购碎片化以及商业银行约束条件下可能系统性供给不足的融资环节。论文将该银行置于一个更广泛的序列中——即政治承诺如何转化为作战能力——并提出，安全-金融机构不仅应依据其创造的资本路径来评估，还应考察其在多大程度上有效约束了资源提取、不透明性、战略报告失当以及责任转移。为支撑这一分析，论文引入了SFICRA-X（安全-金融制度交叉映射与风险分配框架，涵盖提取、不透明性与纪律约束），这是一个结构化的审计与早期证据框架。SFICRA-X旨在识别制度主张、交易对手方、金融工具、风险分配、退化风险、纪律机制，以及在安全-金融机构按预期运作时最早应可观察到的证据。该框架被定位为审计与评估工具，而非预测模型或绩效评估。论文参考了加拿大政府官方公告、DSRB设计材料、银行与国防金融文献、多边开发银行治理文献及相关制度来源。由于DSRB尚未投入运营，论文将公告与设计文件视为预期制度架构的证据，而非制度绩效的证据。随附的Zenodo数据包包含最终PDF、手稿源文件、图表、方法论材料、元数据、引用文件、发布文档以及记录分析框架开发过程的转录支持材料。这些辅助材料旨在确保透明度、来源可追溯与研究可重复性，不应被解读为对手稿中事实主张的独立证据。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 6.5/10。commercial_banking: 论文核心研究拟议的国防、安全与韧性银行（DSRB）作为金融制度基础设施，其功能是解决商业银行业务约束下的融资缺口，涉及银行信贷供给、金融中介和银行监管等主题，属于商业银行领域的主要研究问题。monetary_policy: 论文未涉及中央银行政策工具、利率、通胀或货币政策传导，仅背景提及，评分1。fiscal_policy: 论文涉及政府支出和公共债务，但主线是银行制度而非财政政策本身，评分2。最高匹配领域为commercial_banking。

title: БАРТАРИЯТҲОИ РАҚАМИКУНОНИИ МАҲСУЛОТИ ҚАРЗИИ БОНКӢ ДАР ШАРОИТИ РАҚАМИКУНОНИИ ИҚТИСОДИЁТИ ТОҶИКИСТОН
abstract: The article evaluates the advantages of digitalizing bank credit products amid the formation of the digital economy of the Republic of Tajikistan. The study aims to identify how digital channels, scoring technologies, remote identification, mobile banking, and credit infrastructure affect the dynamics of bank lending, financial accessibility, and the efficiency of the banking sector. The methodological framework combines comparative, statistical, and econometric analysis. The empirical section relies on National Bank of Tajikistan data for 2006–2025 on GDP, the credit portfolio, small loans, and consumer loans. The calculations show that over the period under review the banking sector’s credit portfolio increased 10.9-fold, while the volume of small loans increased 29.7-fold. At the same time, the sustained impact of digitalization depends on the quality of digital infrastructure, payment interoperability, and the population’s digital financial literacy.
tldr: 该论文评估了塔吉克斯坦数字经济背景下银行信贷产品数字化的优势，发现数字化显著促进了银行信贷增长，尤其是小额贷款，但其持续影响取决于数字基础设施、支付互操作性和数字金融素养。
abstract_cn: 本文评估了在塔吉克斯坦共和国数字经济形成过程中，银行信贷产品数字化的优势。研究旨在揭示数字渠道、评分技术、远程身份识别、移动银行及信贷基础设施如何影响银行贷款动态、金融可及性及银行业效率。方法论框架结合了比较分析、统计分析与计量经济分析。实证部分基于塔吉克斯坦国家银行2006–2025年关于GDP、信贷组合、小额贷款及消费贷款的数据。计算表明，在考察期内，银行业信贷组合增长了10.9倍，而小额贷款规模增长了29.7倍。与此同时，数字化的持续影响取决于数字基础设施质量、支付互操作性及民众的数字金融素养。

title: Analytical Study of Interest Rate Spread on Private Consumption, Savings and Investment in Nigeria
abstract: The paper examined how interest rate spreads affected private consumption, investments, and savings in Nigeria. The Ordinary Lease Square (OLS) was used. Descriptive statistics, the short-run ECM mode were all investigated in this study. According to the study, interest rate spread significantly and favorably affects savings, investments, and private consumption. Savings increase by 6.6%, investments increase by 8.4%, and consumption increases by 1.1%. The findings of study shows that interest rate spreads on private consumption, savings and investments in Nigeria are significantly correlated. Based on the results, the study suggested that in order to reinforce Nigeria's monetary system, the CBN should implement and adopt measures to monitor and observe interest rate spread-related metrics like lending rate, deposit rate, operational effectiveness, liquidity risk, provision, and gross domestic rate. The study also suggests that the government work more closely with financial institutions to develop strategies and regulations that will lower bank lending rates.
tldr: 该论文研究了尼日利亚利率差对私人消费、储蓄和投资的影响，发现利率差显著正向影响这些变量，并建议央行加强利率差相关指标的监管。
abstract_cn: 本文研究了利差如何影响尼日利亚的私人消费、投资和储蓄。研究采用了普通最小二乘法（Ordinary Least Square, OLS），并探讨了描述性统计以及短期误差修正模型（ECM）。研究表明，利差对储蓄、投资和私人消费具有显著且积极的影响：储蓄增加6.6%，投资增加8.4%，消费增加1.1%。研究结果显示，尼日利亚的利差与私人消费、储蓄和投资之间存在显著相关性。基于上述结果，研究建议，为强化尼日利亚的货币体系，尼日利亚中央银行（CBN）应实施并采取相关措施，以监测和观察与利差相关的指标，如贷款利率、存款利率、运营效率、流动性风险、准备金及国内生产总值利率。研究还建议，政府应与金融机构加强合作，制定有助于降低银行贷款利率的战略和监管规定。

analysis.chinese_title: 尼日利亚利差对私人消费、储蓄和投资的影响分析研究
analysis.summary: 本文研究了尼日利亚利差如何影响私人消费、投资和储蓄。采用普通最小二乘法（OLS）进行估计，并使用了描述性统计和短期误差修正模型（ECM）。研究发现，利差对储蓄、投资和私人消费有显著且正向的影响：储蓄增加6.6%，投资增加8.4%，消费增加1.1%。结果表明，尼日利亚的利差与私人消费、储蓄和投资显著相关。基于此，研究建议尼日利亚中央银行（CBN）实施并采取监测和观察利差相关指标（如贷款利率、存款利率、运营效率、流动性风险、拨备和国内生产总值）的措施，以加强货币体系。同时，建议政府与金融机构更紧密合作，制定降低银行贷款利率的策略和法规。
innovations: 首次系统分析尼日利亚利差对私人消费、储蓄和投资的综合影响

利差对投资有显著正向影响，投资增加8.4%

title: The impact of non-performing loans on bank lending behaviour: Evidence from the capital channel mechanism in Chinese commercial banks
abstract: Non-performing loans (NPLs) constitute an important concern for banking stability and credit creation, more so for developing countries where commercial banks play a crucial role in economic growth (Bernanke et al., 1994; Markovic, 2006). Much literature has examined the association between the quality of banking assets and their consequences, but little evidence exists on how NPLs impact bank lending through the capital channel. This study tests the relationship between NPL shocks and banks’ lending behaviour, as well as the moderating effect of the capital adequacy ratio (CAR) and common equity tier 1 (CET1) on this link. The research employs two-way fixed effects (TWFE) and dynamic difference generalized method of moments (GMM) on the unbalanced panel dataset obtained from 42 Chinese commercial banks listed between 2013 and 2023. The results show that a rise in the NPL ratio considerably decreases loan growth rates. This means that worsening credit risk reduces banks’ ability to lend money. While neither CAR nor CET1 stimulates lending, a higher CET1 makes NPLs’ adverse influence greater. Thus, capital buffers improve the solvency position, but they cannot protect against the negative supply-side impacts of declining asset quality. This highlights the need for stronger NPL resolution frameworks and countercyclical capital management.
tldr: 该研究利用中国42家商业银行2013-2023年数据，发现不良贷款率上升显著降低贷款增长率，且核心一级资本会加剧不良贷款对信贷的负面影响，表明资本缓冲无法抵御资产质量下降的负面供给冲击。
abstract_cn: 不良贷款（Non-performing loans, NPLs）是影响银行稳定性与信贷创造的重要因素，对于商业银行在经济增长中发挥关键作用的发展中国家而言尤为如此（Bernanke等，1994；Markovic，2006）。已有大量文献探讨了银行资产质量与其后果之间的关联，但关于不良贷款如何通过资本渠道影响银行放贷的证据尚不充分。本研究检验了不良贷款冲击与银行放贷行为之间的关系，以及资本充足率（Capital Adequacy Ratio, CAR）和核心一级资本（Common Equity Tier 1, CET1）对此关联的调节效应。研究采用双向固定效应（Two-way Fixed Effects, TWFE）和动态差分广义矩估计（Generalized Method of Moments, GMM）方法，基于2013年至2023年间42家中国上市商业银行的非平衡面板数据进行分析。结果表明：不良贷款率的上升显著降低了贷款增长率，这意味着信用风险的恶化削弱了银行的放贷能力。尽管资本充足率和核心一级资本均未刺激放贷，但较高的核心一级资本反而加剧了不良贷款的负面影响。因此，资本缓冲虽能改善偿付能力状况，却无法抵御资产质量下降带来的负面供给侧冲击。这凸显了强化不良贷款处置框架与实施逆周期资本管理的必要性。

analysis.chinese_title: 不良贷款对银行贷款行为的影响：来自中国商业银行资本渠道机制的证据
analysis.summary: 本研究探讨不良贷款（NPL）冲击如何通过资本渠道影响银行贷款行为，并检验资本充足率（CAR）和核心一级资本（CET1）的调节效应。基于2013-2023年42家中国上市商业银行的非平衡面板数据，采用双向固定效应（TWFE）和动态差分广义矩估计（GMM）方法。结果表明，不良贷款率上升显著降低贷款增长率，即信用风险恶化削弱银行放贷能力。虽然CAR和CET1本身不刺激贷款，但更高的CET1会加剧不良贷款的负面影响。因此，资本缓冲虽能改善偿付能力，但无法抵御资产质量下降带来的负面供给冲击。研究强调了加强不良贷款处置框架和逆周期资本管理的必要性。
innovations: 聚焦资本渠道机制，检验不良贷款对银行贷款行为的间接影响路径
引入资本充足率（CAR）和核心一级资本（CET1）作为调节变量，揭示资本缓冲的异质性作用

基于中国商业银行的微观数据，提供新兴市场证据
analysis.methodology: 采用双向固定效应（TWFE）和动态差分广义矩估计（GMM）方法，对2013-2023年42家中国上市商业银行的非平衡面板数据进行分析。
key_results: 不良贷款率上升显著降低贷款增长率
资本充足率（CAR）和核心一级资本（CET1）本身不刺激贷款增长
更高的CET1会加剧不良贷款对贷款增长的负面影响

title: The Computational Transmission Gap: Monetary Policy, Inflation Persistence, and Sovereignty Risks in AI-Mediated Markets
abstract: This paper examines whether AI-mediated discovery, ranking, pricing, verification, and transaction execution introduce a new friction into monetary-policy transmission. It defines the Computational Transmission Gap (CTG) as the difference between the monetary-policy response potentially available to an economic entity under identified financial conditions and the response actually realised after computational discovery, eligibility, ranking, verification, and action constraints are taken into account. The paper proposes a computational transmission coefficient linking transmission effectiveness to Computational Visibility, Computational Eligibility, verifiability, Agent Readiness, and Agent Actionability. It distinguishes entity-level attenuation from aggregate reallocation, external leakage, and genuinely unrealised activity, developing a staged accounting framework for demand conservation in computationally mediated markets. A sectoral, computationally augmented inflation framework is proposed, with implications for inflation persistence, sectoral dispersion, output-gap interpretation, and monetary-policy observability. The framework is applied to European real estate as a high-sensitivity test market. An illustrative and non-empirical numerical simulation examines direct attenuation, convex ranking, capacity constraints, domestic recovery, and cross-border allocation. The paper does not claim that monetary policy is ineffective or that traditional transmission channels have disappeared. It argues that monetary policy may remain financially operative while becoming computationally incomplete, with heterogeneous outcomes depending on the computational allocation characteristics of firms, assets, and households. No causal estimates or validated empirical results are reported. All proposed mechanisms, indices, and hypotheses require empirical testing. Representation Economy Research Programme — Volume XI, Research Layer 20.Working Paper, Version 1.4.Not peer reviewed.

tldr: 论文提出计算传导缺口（CTG）概念，认为AI中介市场可能使货币政策在保持金融有效性的同时变得计算不完整，从而影响通胀持续性和金融稳定，但未提供实证证据。
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了由人工智能中介的发现、排序、定价、验证及交易执行是否在货币政策传导中引入了新的摩擦。本文定义了“计算传导缺口”（Computational Transmission Gap, CTG），即经济实体在既定金融条件下潜在可获得的货币政策响应，与在考虑计算发现、资格认定、排序、验证及行动约束后实际实现的响应之间的差异。本文提出了一个“计算传导系数”，将传导效率与“计算可见性”（Computational Visibility）、“计算资格”（Computational Eligibility）、可验证性、“主体就绪度”（Agent Readiness）及“主体可行动性”（Agent Actionability）联系起来。本文区分了实体层面的衰减与总量再分配、外部泄漏以及真正未实现的经济活动，并针对计算中介市场中的需求守恒，构建了一个分阶段的核算框架。本文提出了一个分部门的、经计算增强的通胀框架，并探讨了其对通胀持续性、部门分化、产出缺口解释以及货币政策可观测性的影响。该框架被应用于欧洲房地产市场，作为高敏感性的测试市场。本文通过一个说明性且非经验性的数值模拟，考察了直接衰减、凸性排序、容量约束、国内复苏及跨境配置。本文并未声称货币政策无效或传统传导渠道已经消失，而是认为货币政策可能在金融层面仍然有效，但在计算层面变得不完整，其异质性结果取决于企业、资产及家庭的计算分配特征。本文未报告任何因果估计或经过验证的实证结果。所有提出的机制、指数及假设均需经过实证检验。《表征经济学研究计划——第十一卷，研究层20。工作论文，版本1.4。未经同行评审。》

title: Timothy N. J. Antoine and the modernisation of Caribbean central banking: rethinking monetary policy in small open economies
abstract: Caribbean small open economies have long been exposed to a macroeconomic environment that is typified by structural weaknesses, such as small export bases, high levels of importation, exogenous shocks in world prices of external commodities and frequent climate risks. These structural vices have in the past curtailed the capacity of the Eastern Caribbean economies to pursue sustainable and steady growth. In this difficult environment, the Eastern Caribbean Central Bank (ECCB) under the management of Timothy N. J. Antoine has embarked on a modernisation programme to re-engineer the position of the central bank in the Eastern Caribbean Currency Union (ECCU). Antoine, since coming to office in 2016, has promoted a resilience-oriented and developmental approach to monetary governance, which represents a break with many traditional doctrines that have dominated the policy discourse in larger developed economies.
tldr: 论文研究了东加勒比中央银行在Timothy N. J. Antoine领导下如何通过现代化改革，采用韧性导向和发展导向的货币政策，以应对小型开放经济体的结构性弱点。
abstract_cn: 加勒比小型开放经济体长期处于以结构性弱点为特征的宏观经济环境中，例如出口基础薄弱、进口依赖度高、外部商品世界价格的外生冲击以及频繁的气候风险。这些结构性缺陷过去曾制约东加勒比经济体实现可持续稳定增长的能力。在此困境下，由蒂莫西·N·J·安托万（Timothy N. J. Antoine）管理的东加勒比中央银行（ECCB）启动了一项现代化计划，旨在重塑该央行在东加勒比货币联盟（ECCU）中的定位。安托万自2016年上任以来，推动了一种以韧性和发展为导向的货币治理路径，这标志着与主导较大型发达经济体政策话语的诸多传统教条的决裂。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：货币政策 7.0/10。论文主要讨论东加勒比中央银行在Timothy N. J. Antoine领导下的现代化改革，强调韧性导向和发展导向的货币政策治理，属于货币政策领域。商业银行和财政政策仅作为背景提及，非主线。

title: Peran Museum Bank Indonesia sebagai Sarana Wisata Edukasi Sejarah
abstract: . This study analyzes the role of the Bank Indonesia Museum (MuBI) in Jakarta as a historical educational tourism facility. Using a qualitative approach with a case study method, data were collected through observation, interviews, and documentation. The findings show that MuBI serves as an effective historical learning space through three main aspects. First, its numismatic and non-numismatic collections contain historical value and are closely related to everyday life. Second, information is presented with the support of interactive technologies, including touchscreen displays, sound domes, magic books, interactive floors and screens, and immersive spaces, making the learning process more engaging and contextual. Third, MuBI offers public programs based on edutainment, combining education and entertainment. Visitor perceptions indicate that the museum provides an attractive learning experience through its collections, spatial arrangement, and technology. However, some visitors still find the central banking material difficult to understand, while visit motivations are often recreational and influenced by visual appeal. Overall, MuBI has effectively integrated preservation, education, and recreation, although material simplification and communication strategies still need improvement.
journal: Jurnal Ekonomi Manajemen Pariwisata dan Perhotelan

tldr: 论文分析印度尼西亚银行博物馆作为历史教育旅游设施的作用，发现其通过收藏、互动技术和寓教于乐项目有效提供学习体验，但部分访客仍觉央行材料难懂。
abstract_cn: 本研究以雅加达的印度尼西亚银行博物馆（Bank Indonesia Museum, MuBI）为对象，分析其作为历史教育旅游设施的作用。采用质性研究方法及个案研究法，通过观察、访谈与文献收集数据。研究结果表明，MuBI通过三个主要方面成为有效的历史学习空间。其一，其钱币学（numismatic）与非钱币学（non-numismatic）藏品蕴含历史价值，且与日常生活密切相关。其二，信息呈现借助交互式技术（interactive technologies）支持，包括触屏显示器（touchscreen displays）、声穹（sound domes）、魔法书（magic books）、互动地板与屏幕（interactive floors and screens）以及沉浸式空间（immersive spaces），使学习过程更具参与感与情境性。其三，MuBI提供基于寓教于乐（edutainment）理念的公共项目，将教育与娱乐相结合。参观者感知表明，该博物馆通过其藏品、空间布局与技术手段提供了富有吸引力的学习体验。然而，部分参观者仍认为中央银行相关材料难以理解，而参观动机往往以休闲娱乐为主，并受视觉吸引力影响。总体而言，MuBI已有效整合了保存、教育与娱乐功能，但材料简化与传播策略仍有待改进。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策
score_reasoning: 最高匹配领域：商业银行 1.0/10。论文研究印度尼西亚银行博物馆作为历史教育旅游设施的角色，属于博物馆学、旅游教育领域。虽然涉及中央银行（Bank Indonesia），但未研究商业银行的信贷、风险、监管等核心主题；未分析货币政策工具、传导或通胀；未涉及财政政策。因此三个领域得分均很低。

title: Structural Vulnerabilities of Peripheral Economies under Dollar Hegemony: External Financial Containment, Endogenous Livelihood Supply Autonomy and Macroeconomic Governance Distortion — A Multi-Case Comparative Analysis Based on the Philippines (2022–2024)
abstract: Abstract Against the backdrop of global multipolarization, dollar-dominated cross-border financial systems have enabled Western powers to deploy two differentiated unilateral containment tools: the freezing of sovereign foreign exchange reserves and the judicial seizure of overseas private assets belonging to political elites. Existing scholarship tends to compartmentalize research on geopolitical alliances, imported inflation, dollar sanctions, currency stability and people-centered livelihood security, lacking an integrated analytical chain linking long-term institutional structural defects, superimposed external financial restraints, distorted domestic policy arrangements, erosion of physical monetary anchors, and persistent divergence between macroeconomic indicators and grassroots livelihood perceptions. This paper constructs a unified theoretical framework integrating Dependency Theory, layered physical monetary anchor theory, monetary sovereignty theory, resource curse theory, latecomer advantage theory and the people-centered sustainable development paradigm. It strictly distinguishes benign comparative advantage trade division from structural over-reliance on survival necessities, formal institutional texts from defective enforcement mechanisms, and short-term foreign exchange gains from high-end manufacturing versus long-term livelihood-based physical output support. Taking the Philippines from 2022 to 2024 as the core research case, this study relies on verifiable official sequential data released by the Philippine Statistics Authority, ADB, FAO and IMF to conduct objective mechanism analysis without speculating on the subjective intentions or future political fate of policymakers. Gradient comparative cases are introduced, including Somalias systemic monetary collapse and Sri Lankas sovereign debt crisis as negative crisis samples, Russias autonomous de-dollarization practice as a positive breakthrough sample, Vietnam and Indonesias moderate diversified reform as transitional balanced samples, and Japan-South Korea high-endmanufacturing economies as transitional risk samples. The research quantifies risk thresholds for over-reliance on essential livelihood goods and sorts out the evolutionary logic of U.S. proxy containment strategies during the Cold War and the contemporary era. The study concludes that long-term institutional flaws in industry, food security, statistical supervision, diplomacy and monetary governance form the fundamental structural root of governance distortion, while overseas asset judicial control and global imported inflation merely act as risk amplifiers. The stable purchasing power of a countrys currency is fundamentally supported by domestically self-produced food, energy and other livelihood necessities rather than short-term foreign exchange dividends generated by high-tech exports. Constrained by technological bottlenecks and latecomer catch-up effects, the profit advantages of high-end industries are only temporary buffers and cannot resolve long-term structural fragility caused by external supply dependence. For most developing peripheral economies, improving institutional systems to guarantee independent supply of core livelihood necessities is a structural path to weaken unilateral external restraints and implement people-centered sustainable development. Keywords Dollar Financial Hegemony; Physical Monetary Anchor; Monetary Sovereignty; Dependency Theory; Autonomy of Basic Livelihood Supplies; Peripheral Economies; Governance Distortion

tldr: 论文构建统一理论框架，以菲律宾2022-2024年为核心案例，分析外围经济体在美元霸权下因制度缺陷和外部金融遏制导致的治理扭曲，强调核心生计品自主供给对货币稳定的根本作用。
abstract_cn:
在全球多极化背景下，以美元为主导的跨境金融体系使西方大国得以部署两种差异化的单边遏制工具：冻结主权外汇储备以及对政治精英的海外私人资产实施司法扣押。现有学术研究倾向于将地缘政治联盟、输入型通胀、美元制裁、货币稳定与以人民为中心的生计保障等议题分门别类地加以探讨，缺乏一条将长期制度性结构缺陷、叠加的外部金融约束、扭曲的国内政策安排、实物货币锚的侵蚀以及宏观经济指标与基层民生感知之间的持续背离相联结的整合性分析链条。本文构建了一个统一的理论框架，融合了依附理论、分层实物货币锚理论、货币主权理论、资源诅咒理论、后发优势理论以及以人民为中心的可持续发展范式。本文严格区分了良性比较优势贸易分工与对生存必需品的结构性过度依赖、正式制度文本与有缺陷的执行机制、高端制造业带来的短期外汇收益与基于生计的长期实物产出支撑。以2022年至2024年的菲律宾为核心研究案例，本研究依赖菲律宾统计局、亚洲开发银行、联合国粮农组织和国际货币基金组织发布的可验证官方时序数据，进行客观的机制分析，而不对政策制定者的主观意图或未来政治命运进行推测。本文引入了梯度比较案例，包括索马里的系统性货币崩溃和斯里兰卡的主权债务危机作为负面危机样本，俄罗斯的自主去美元化实践作为正面突破样本，越南和印度尼西亚的温和多元化改革作为过渡性平衡样本，以及日韩高端制造业经济体作为过渡性风险样本。研究量化了对基本民生必需品过度依赖的风险阈值，并梳理了冷战时期与当代美国代理人遏制策略的演变逻辑。研究结论表明，产业、粮食安全、统计监管、外交和货币治理领域的长期制度缺陷构成了治理扭曲的根本结构性根源，而海外资产司法控制与全球输入型通胀仅扮演了风险放大器的角色。一国货币的稳定购买力从根本上由其国内自主生产的粮食、能源及其他民生必需品所支撑，而非由高科技出口所产生的短期外汇红利所决定。受制于技术瓶颈与后发追赶效应，高端产业的利润优势仅是暂时的缓冲，无法化解由外部供给依赖所导致的长期结构性脆弱。对于大多数发展中边缘经济体而言，完善制度体系以保障核心民生必需品的自主供给，是削弱外部单边约束、实现以人民为中心的可持续发展的结构性路径。  
关键词：美元金融霸权；实物货币锚；货币主权；依附理论；基本民生供给自主性；边缘经济体；治理扭曲

title: Expectation as Criterion: A Cross-Modal Real-Time Calibration Mechanism of Human Sensory Judgment
abstract: Author Information Author: Baichen Yi Preprint V1.0 Affiliation: Independent Researcher, Xi'an, Shaanxi, 710000, China ORCID: 0009-0008-6242-7743 Corresponding Author: Baichen Yi Email:ybcbenxin@163.com Conflict of Interest Statement: The author declares that there are no conflicts of interest related to this work. Copyright and License This preprint is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International License (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0), permitting open sharing and redistribution worldwide under the conditions of proper attribution, non-commercial use, and no derivative works. Special Authorization Statement: The author expressly authorizes any individual or institution to translate this article, in whole or in part, into other languages. Translated versions must preserve the core logic of the original text and cite the original source and author information. The full license text is available at: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/ Preprint Statement This article is a preprint that has not undergone peer review. It proposes testable structural hypotheses based on cross-modal phenomenological induction and reinterpretation of existing literature. All falsification conditions and operationalization criteria are presented in §6. Abstract Background: The MFY three-variable steady-state model has achieved cross-domain validation across multiple fields including psychology, economics, motor skill acquisition, AI alignment, mammalian behavior, and placebo effects. The proposition that "expectation Y is the sole legitimate intervention target of the system" has been supported by multiple independent lines of evidence. However, these validations have focused on behavioral and decision-making levels, leaving untouched a more fundamental question: where do the criteria of subjective experience in the human sensory system itself — taste, vision, olfaction, audition, somatosensation, spatial distance perception, and proprioception — come from? Method: Starting from six cross-modal sensory calibration phenomena and integrating the Y variable definition and M₁→F₁→Y→F₂→M₂ transmission structure of the MFY framework, this article proposes and argues for a unified proposition: the subjective judgment criteria of all sensory modalities are real-time calibrated by expectation Y; neural transmission serves as the physical carrier of signals, while Y is the determinant of criteria. This work is fully compatible with existing findings in sensory neuroscience regarding signal transmission mechanisms, and addresses a long-standing question that has never been directly answered: where does the "judgment criterion" come from after signals arrive, and how does it change? Results: Drawing on six sensory modalities — taste/olfaction (flavor adaptation and cross-cultural dietary experience reversal), somatosensation/pain (tactile adaptation and placebo/nocebo effects), audition (auditory adaptation and soundscape calibration), spatial distance perception (distance judgment calibration in driving and martial arts), proprioception (body schema calibration in motor skill acquisition), and vision (Y recalibration under irreversible physical changes) — this article identifies six unified characteristics of sensory system Y calibration, and forms cross-validation with the Y/M dual-layer defense mechanism in Paper 1 §4.6, the expectation lock-in theory in Paper 8, and the signal-source dependence of the inflation coefficient in Paper 10. Conclusion: "Y is the criterion itself" is not a local regularity confined to a single domain, but a unified mechanism covering the full hierarchy from sensation to cognition to behavior. The real-time calibration of Y in the sensory system provides the most fundamental and universal empirical evidence for the MFY framework, elevating "expectation-driven" from a psychological hypothesis to a testable proposition about the foundational structure of the sensory-cognitive system. Keywords: sensory adaptation; expectation; judgment criterion; reference point; cross-modal perception; placebo effect; habituation; proprioception; body schema; phantom limb pain; obsessive-compulsive disorder; trust; real-time calibration; MFY three-variable model

tldr: 该论文提出期望Y是感官系统主观判断标准的实时校准机制，并通过跨模态现象验证了Y作为标准本身的理论。
abstract_cn:
**作者信息**  
作者：易白尘  
预印本 V1.0  
所属机构：独立研究者，中国陕西西安，710000  
ORCID：0009-0008-6242-7743  
通讯作者：易白尘  
邮箱：ybcbenxin@163.com  
**利益冲突声明**  
作者声明，本工作不存在任何相关利益冲突。  
**版权与许可**  
本预印本采用知识共享署名-非商业性使用-禁止演绎 4.0 国际许可协议（CC BY-NC-ND 4.0），允许在全球范围内进行开放共享与再分发，前提是注明出处、仅限非商业用途且不得进行衍生创作。  
**特别授权声明**  
作者明确授权任何个人或机构对本文章进行全文或部分翻译为其他语言。翻译版本必须保留原文的核心逻辑，并引用原文来源及作者信息。完整许可协议文本请参见：https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/  
**预印本声明**  
本文为未经同行评审的预印本。其基于跨模态现象学归纳及对现有文献的重新诠释，提出了可检验的结构性假设。所有可证伪条件及操作化标准均在§6中给出。  

**摘要**  
**背景**：MFY 三变量稳态模型已在心理学、经济学、运动技能习得、AI 对齐（AI alignment）、哺乳动物行为及安慰剂效应等多个领域实现跨域验证。“期望 Y 是系统唯一合法的干预目标”这一命题已获得多项独立证据支持。然而，这些验证集中于行为与决策层面，尚未触及一个更根本的问题：人类感觉系统本身的主观体验标准——味觉、视觉、嗅觉、听觉、躯体感觉、空间距离感知及本体感觉——究竟源自何处？  
**方法**：本文从六种跨模态感觉校准现象出发，结合 MFY 框架中 Y 变量的定义及 M₁→F₁→Y→F₂→M₂ 的传递结构，提出并论证了一个统一命题：所有感觉模态的主观判断标准均由期望 Y 进行实时校准；神经传递是信号的物理载体，而 Y 是标准的决定因素。本工作与感觉神经科学中关于信号传递机制的现有发现完全兼容，并解决了一个长期存在且从未被直接回答的问题：信号到达后，“判断标准”从何而来，又如何变化？  
**结果**：基于六种感觉模态——味觉/嗅觉（风味适应与跨文化饮食体验反转）、躯体感觉/疼痛（触觉适应与安慰剂/反安慰剂效应）、听觉（听觉适应与声景校准）、空间距离感知（驾驶与武术中的距离判断校准）、本体感觉（运动技能习得中的身体图式校准）及视觉（不可逆物理变化下的 Y 重新校准）——本文识别出感觉系统 Y 校准的六项统一特征，并与论文 1 §4.6 中的 Y/M 双层防御机制、论文 8 中的期望锁定理论（expectation lock-in theory）以及论文 10 中的膨胀系数信号源依赖性（signal-source dependence of the inflation coefficient）形成交叉验证。  
**结论**：“Y 即标准本身”并非局限于单一领域的局部规律，而是涵盖从感觉、认知到行为完整层级结构的统一机制。Y 在感觉系统中的实时校准为 MFY 框架提供了最基础、最普遍的实证证据，将“期望驱动”从一种心理学假设提升为关于感觉-认知系统基础结构的可检验命题。  
**关键词**：感觉适应；期望；判断标准；参照点；跨模态感知；安慰剂效应；习惯化；本体感觉；身体图式；幻肢痛；强迫症；信任；实时校准；MFY 三变量模型

title: US Dollar Weakens as Markets Await Key Economic Data and Forex Signals
abstract: The US dollar slipped as investors turned their attention to upcoming economic data and shifting forex market trends. Traders are closely monitoring inflation, employment, and central bank signals for clues on future interest rate decisions, with global currency markets expected to remain volatile.
