title: Child Disability and Effects on Sibling Mental Health
abstract: We ask how a younger sibling’s physical disability affects sibling mental health using Danish register data on families with three or more children. Difference-in-difference models compare first- and second-born children when the third-born does or does not have a disability. Use of mental health services increases 13% among second-born children, with a 23% increase in psychiatric visits and an 18% increase in use of psychiatric medications. Effects are concentrated in households where the mother has less than high school and persist after conditioning on child test scores. Parental responses suggest that caregiving demands, stress, and strained resources are potential mechanisms.
tldr: 该论文研究年幼兄弟姐妹的身体残疾如何影响年长兄弟姐妹的心理健康，发现残疾儿童的第二胎兄弟姐妹心理健康服务使用增加13%，尤其在母亲教育水平低的家庭中。
abstract_cn: 我们利用丹麦三个及以上子女家庭的面板数据，探究年幼子女的身体残疾如何影响同胞的心理健康。采用双重差分模型（Difference-in-difference），比较当第三个子女存在或不存在残疾时，第一个与第二个子女的情况。结果显示，第二个子女的心理健康服务使用率上升13%，其中精神科就诊次数增加23%，精神类药物使用增加18%。该效应集中于母亲教育程度低于高中水平的家庭，且在控制子女考试成绩后依然存在。父母的反馈表明，照护需求、压力及资源紧张是潜在的作用机制。

title: Interest rate policy or monetary base policy: implications for a central bank’s balance sheet
abstract: The article discusses the relationship between the central bank balance sheet, the monetary base, monetary aggregates and credit in the euro area. In particular, it looks at the choice of the operational procedures available to the central bank, and for this purpose it compares the current interest rate policy to a hypothetical monetary base policy. In the latter case, monetary policy would be transmitted primarily via the monetary aggregates which are already monitored by the ECB as part of its monetary analysis. The analysis points out, however, that the euro area conditions favour an interest rate policy rather than a monetary base policy. The reason is that the uncertainty created in the very short run by money demand shocks and unstable money multipliers exceeds that created by global demand shocks. This explains why central banks of countries with developed financial markets follow an interest rate policy. Such a choice is not at odds with the fact that money plays a fundamental role in the monetary policy strategy of the Eurosystem, as the comparative advantage of the monetary analysis pertains to the medium to long term. Finally, the authors point out that an interest rate policy implies an endogenous central bank balance sheet, where changes in base money demand are passed on to the balance sheet. Therefore, extra interventions, as for example those during the summer of 2007, by a central bank aiming to stabilise the official rate do not signal a change in monetary policy stance.

discovery.seed_title: Monetary Policy Transmission in the Euro Area

tldr: 论文比较了利率政策和货币基数政策，认为欧元区条件更有利于利率政策，因为货币需求冲击和货币乘数不稳定带来的短期不确定性大于总需求冲击，且利率政策意味着中央银行资产负债表内生变化。
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了欧元区中央银行资产负债表、货币基础、货币总量与信贷之间的关系。文章特别关注了中央银行可选择的操作程序，并为此将当前的利率政策与假设性的货币基础政策进行了比较。在后一种情况下，货币政策将主要通过货币总量传导，而货币总量已被欧洲央行（ECB）作为其货币分析的一部分进行监测。然而，分析指出，欧元区的条件更有利于利率政策而非货币基础政策。原因在于，由货币需求冲击和不稳定的货币乘数在极短期内产生的不确定性，超过了由全球需求冲击所产生的不确定性。这解释了为何拥有发达金融市场的国家的中央银行会采用利率政策。这种选择与货币在欧洲央行体系（Eurosystem）货币政策战略中发挥基础性作用这一事实并不矛盾，因为货币分析的比较优势在于中长期。最后，作者指出，利率政策意味着中央银行资产负债表的内生性，其中基础货币需求的变化会传导至资产负债表。因此，中央银行旨在稳定官方利率的额外干预（例如2007年夏季的干预）并不表明货币政策立场的改变。

analysis.chinese_title: 利率政策还是货币基础政策：对中央银行资产负债表的影响
analysis.summary: 本文探讨了欧元区中央银行资产负债表、货币基础、货币总量与信贷之间的关系，重点比较了当前利率政策与假设的货币基础政策两种操作程序。分析指出，欧元区条件更有利于利率政策而非货币基础政策，因为短期货币需求冲击和货币乘数不稳定带来的不确定性超过全球需求冲击。这解释了为何发达金融市场国家的中央银行采用利率政策，且与货币在欧元体系货币政策策略中的基础作用不矛盾。最后指出，利率政策意味着中央银行资产负债表内生，基础货币需求变化会传导至资产负债表，因此旨在稳定官方利率的额外干预（如2007年夏季）并不表明货币政策立场改变。
innovations: 比较了利率政策与货币基础政策对中央银行资产负债表的不同影响。
指出欧元区条件更有利于利率政策，原因在于短期货币需求冲击和货币乘数不稳定的不确定性更大。
解释了发达金融市场国家采用利率政策的原因，并论证其与货币在货币政策策略中基础作用的一致性。
提出利率政策下中央银行资产负债表具有内生性，额外干预不改变货币政策立场。
analysis.methodology: 摘要未提供具体研究方法，但推测为理论分析和比较研究，基于欧元区数据对两种政策操作程序进行对比。
key_results: 欧元区条件更有利于利率政策而非货币基础政策。
短期货币需求冲击和货币乘数不稳定带来的不确定性超过全球需求冲击。
利率政策下中央银行资产负债表是内生的，基础货币需求变化会传导至资产负债表。
2007年夏季的额外干预旨在稳定官方利率，不表明货币政策立场改变。
analysis.tech_stack: 摘要未提供具体算法、工具或数学方法。
strengths: 聚焦中央银行操作程序选择这一重要政策问题。

title: Monetary Targeting in Germany
abstract: The recent debate over monetary strategies concludes that monetary and inflation targeting lead to very similar patterns of central bank behavior. Why, then, do central banks insist on the strategies they use. In this paper, we develop an answer from political economy, arguing that monetary strategies are helpful in solving internal and external coordination problems for the central bank. We illustrate the point by reviewing the Bundesbank's experience with money growth targeting in the mid-1970s. Monetary targeting was a signal that the previous monetary regime had been overcome, and a means to define the role of monetary policy vis-a-vis other players in the macro economic policy game, and to structure the internal monetary policy debate.

tldr: 论文从政治经济学角度解释为什么中央银行坚持其货币策略，并以德国联邦银行1970年代中期的货币增长目标制为例，说明货币目标制有助于解决中央银行的内部和外部协调问题。
abstract_cn: 近期关于货币政策策略的争论得出结论：货币目标制与通胀目标制会导致非常相似的中央银行行为模式。那么，为何各国央行仍坚持其采用的策略？本文从政治经济学角度提出一种解释，认为货币政策策略有助于解决央行的内外部协调问题。我们通过回顾德意志联邦银行（Bundesbank）在20世纪70年代中期实施货币增长目标制的经验来阐明这一观点。货币目标制既标志着此前货币体制已被克服，也是一种界定货币政策在宏观经济政策博弈中相对于其他参与者角色的手段，同时还能构建内部货币政策辩论的框架。

title: Monetarna politika i njene institucije
abstract: Monetaryism is a view in economic theory that relies on the control of money supply and monetary mechanisms in order to achieve the economic policy goals, and this is primarily about price stability. Although monetaryism is no longer in fashion, today monetary policy is the central tool of stabilization policy in large market economies. Monetary policy is a system that controls the money supply by the central bank. Monetary policy consists of two policies, which are policies restricting the money supply where an increase in interest rates results in inflation and an expansionary monetary policy offers where a reduction in interest rates leads recession. This type of policy has several main and clearly set objectives, namely economic liquidity, monetary balance and stability of the local currency and its exchange rate. There are several types of monetary policy which are determined to GDP – an expansive, restrictive and neutral policy. The main institution of monetary policy is the central bank, and a central bank of the Republic of Croatia is the Croatian National Bank.

discovery.seed_title: Monetary Policy Transmission in the Euro Area

tldr: 论文概述了货币政策作为稳定政策的核心工具，强调中央银行通过控制货币供应和利率实现价格稳定等目标，并介绍了货币政策的类型及其对经济的影响。
abstract_cn: 货币主义是一种经济学理论观点，主张通过控制货币供给及货币机制来实现经济政策目标，其核心在于维持物价稳定。尽管货币主义已不再盛行，但时至今日，货币政策仍是大型市场经济体中稳定政策的核心工具。货币政策是由中央银行控制货币供给的一套体系，包含两种政策：一是限制货币供给的政策，即通过提高利率应对通货膨胀；二是扩张性货币政策，即通过降低利率应对经济衰退。此类政策具有若干明确设定的主要目标，即经济流动性、货币平衡以及本币及其汇率的稳定性。根据与国内生产总值（GDP）的关系，货币政策可分为三种类型：扩张性政策、紧缩性政策与中性政策。货币政策的主要执行机构是中央银行，克罗地亚共和国的中央银行为克罗地亚国家银行（Croatian National Bank）。

title: The German Financial System
abstract: Abstract The book provides a comprehensive and up-to-date overview of all aspects of the German financial system, grounded in the current discussion about the importance of a country's financial system for its economic development. The common starting points for the book as a whole as well as for all 15 individual chapters are what the respective authors perceive as peculiarities of the German financial system and the perception that seems to prevail among foreign observers of this system. The book covers a wide range of topics from the banking system, the stock exchanges, bank–client relationships, regulation and competition in the financial sector to corporate governance and financial accounting in Germany.

title: Pricing Liquidity Risk in the Korean Corporate Bond Market*
abstract: Abstract This study investigates the pricing of liquidity risk in the Korean corporate bond market. We use three different liquidity factors — namely, aggregate market liquidity, liquidity innovation, and predicted liquidity. The empirical results show that, while a liquidity premium exists in the Korean corporate bond market when measured by the market liquidity factor, a liquidity discount occurs when measured by the predicted liquidity factor. Drawing on prior studies, we further describe that the lower (higher) returns for portfolios with a high sensitivity to unexpected liquidity shocks may be attributable to the infrequent (frequent) trading of AAA(A)‐rated bonds in the Korean market. Finally, our findings suggest that while a liquidity premium exists in expectation, investors are penalized for taking predicted liquidity risks in the Korean corporate bond market.

discovery.seed_title: A Pigovian Approach to Liquidity Regulation

tldr: 该论文研究韩国公司债券市场中流动性风险的定价，发现市场流动性因子存在流动性溢价，而预测流动性因子存在流动性折价。
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了韩国公司债券市场中流动性风险的定价问题。我们采用了三种不同的流动性因子——即总体市场流动性（aggregate market liquidity）、流动性创新（liquidity innovation）以及预测流动性（predicted liquidity）。实证结果表明，虽然以市场流动性因子衡量时韩国公司债券市场存在流动性溢价（liquidity premium），但以预测流动性因子衡量时却出现了流动性折价（liquidity discount）。借鉴先前的研究，我们进一步指出，对非预期流动性冲击（unexpected liquidity shocks）具有高敏感性的投资组合之所以获得较低（较高）收益，可能归因于韩国市场中AAA级（AAA）与A级（A）债券交易频率的差异（即低频与高频交易）。最后，我们的发现表明，尽管预期中存在流动性溢价，但在韩国公司债券市场中，投资者因承担预测流动性风险（predicted liquidity risk）而受到了惩罚。

title: Liquidity risk and performance of banking system
abstract: Purpose The purpose of this paper is to examine liquidity risk in Pakistani banks and evaluate the effect on banks' profitability. Design/methodology/approach Data are retrieved from the balance sheets, income statements and notes of 22 Pakistani banks during 2004‐2009. Multiple regressions are applied to assess the impact of liquidity risk on banks' profitability. Findings The results of multiple regressions show that liquidity risk affects bank profitability significantly, with liquidity gap and non‐performing as the two factors exacerbating the liquidity risk. They have a negative relationship with profitability. Research limitations/implications The period studied in this paper is 2004‐2009, due to availability of the data. However, the sample period does not impair the findings since the sample includes 22 banks, which constitute the main part of the Pakistani banking system. Moreover, only profitability is used as the measure of performance. Economic factors contributing to liquidity risk are not covered in this paper. Originality/value This is the first paper addressing the liquidity risk faced by the Pakistani banking system. Past researchers and practitioners have not given the proper attention to liquidity risk. This paper helps in understanding the factors of liquidity risk and their impact on the profitability of the banking system. The authors emphasise contemporary risk managers to mitigate liquidity risk by having sufficient cash resources. This will reduce the liquidity gap, thereby reducing the dependence on repo market.
journal: Journal of Financial Regulation and Compliance

discovery.seed_title: A Pigovian Approach to Liquidity Regulation

tldr: 本文研究巴基斯坦银行流动性风险对盈利能力的影响，发现流动性缺口和不良贷款显著加剧流动性风险并降低盈利能力。
abstract_cn: 目的 本文旨在研究巴基斯坦银行的流动性风险，并评估其对银行盈利能力的影响。设计/方法/路径 数据来源于2004年至2009年间22家巴基斯坦银行的资产负债表、利润表及附注。采用多元回归分析评估流动性风险对银行盈利能力的影响。研究发现 多元回归结果显示，流动性风险显著影响银行盈利能力，其中流动性缺口与不良贷款是加剧流动性风险的两大因素，二者与盈利能力呈负相关关系。研究局限/启示 受数据可得性限制，本文研究时段为2004年至2009年。但由于样本涵盖22家银行，构成巴基斯坦银行体系的主体部分，因此样本期间并未削弱研究结论的有效性。此外，本文仅以盈利能力作为绩效衡量指标，未涉及导致流动性风险的经济因素。原创性/价值 本文是首篇针对巴基斯坦银行体系流动性风险的研究。过往研究者及实务工作者对流动性风险关注不足。本文有助于理解流动性风险的构成要素及其对银行体系盈利能力的影响。作者建议当代风险管理者通过持有充足现金资源来缓解流动性风险，这将缩小流动性缺口，进而降低对回购市场的依赖。

title: Liquidity and Financial Operations
abstract: With some background on liquidity and its associated risks, we are now prepared to review the role of liquidity in financial operations. By examining concepts related to the operating environment we come to understand the importance of liquidity from an internal and systemic perspective, which will be useful when we consider liquidity-induced problems in Part II of the book. In this chapter we explore liquidity operating requirements, the liquidity risk/return trade-off, liquidity characteristics across industries, and endogenous versus exogenous liquidity.KeywordsCash FlowFinancial InstitutionMutual FundHedge FundFinancial DistressThese keywords were added by machine and not by the authors. tldr: 该论文介绍了流动性在金融操作中的重要性，包括流动性需求、风险收益权衡以及不同行业的流动性特征，但未涉及具体的银行信贷、货币政策或财政政策等主题。
abstract_cn:
在了解流动性及其相关风险的基本背景后，我们现在准备审视流动性在金融运作中的作用。通过考察与运营环境相关的概念，我们从内部和系统性的角度理解流动性的重要性，这将在本书第二部分探讨流动性引发的问题时有所助益。本章将探讨流动性运营要求、流动性风险与收益的权衡、不同行业的流动性特征，以及内生流动性（endogenous liquidity）与外生流动性（exogenous liquidity）。

title: Liquidity Risk and Liquidity Management Role
abstract: The aim of this paper is the analysis of liquidity management policy in order to determine the level of liquidity risk. Planning of liquidity requirements is important from the microeconomic aspect, because the banks at any moment must respond to requests submitted by depositors or applications for new loans. Provision of liquidity is also required from the macroeconomic aspect, since this reflects the economic and financial stability. Quantitative data for this study were collected using a questionnaire designed to analyse liquidity risk management, which would help in the identification and explanation of possible changes in the banking system in the country. Based on the analysis, it is estimated that banks properly manage liquidity and maintain adequate liquidity reserves to ensure sufficient funds to meet their commitments on time. Also, the main sources providing liquidity for banks are the non-term deposits and the issuance of various securities. However, holding excess liquidity reserves causes the opportunity cost for banks, but also non-fulfilment of the requirements of the economy for loans. Therefore, the regulatory bodies should reduce the liquidity reserve holding.

discovery.seed_title: A Pigovian Approach to Liquidity Regulation

tldr: 该论文通过问卷调查分析银行流动性管理政策，发现银行能妥善管理流动性并维持充足储备，但过度储备导致机会成本并抑制贷款，建议监管机构降低流动性储备要求。
abstract_cn: 本文旨在分析流动性管理政策，以确定流动性风险水平。从微观经济角度来看，流动性需求的规划至关重要，因为银行必须随时应对存款人提交的取款请求或新的贷款申请。从宏观经济角度来看，流动性供给同样不可或缺，因为这反映了经济与金融的稳定性。本研究通过设计用于分析流动性风险管理的问卷收集定量数据，该问卷有助于识别并解释该国银行体系中可能发生的变化。基于分析结果，可以评估银行能够妥善管理流动性，并维持充足的流动性储备（liquidity reserve），以确保拥有足够资金按时履行其承诺。此外，为银行提供流动性的主要来源是非定期存款（non-term deposits）以及各类证券的发行。然而，持有过多的流动性储备会给银行带来机会成本（opportunity cost），同时也会导致无法满足经济对贷款的需求。因此，监管机构应减少流动性储备的持有量。

analysis.chinese_title: 流动性风险与流动性管理角色
analysis.summary: 本文旨在分析流动性管理政策以确定流动性风险水平。从微观经济角度看，银行必须随时响应存款人提款或新贷款申请，因此流动性需求规划至关重要；从宏观经济角度看，流动性提供反映了经济和金融稳定。研究通过问卷调查收集定量数据，分析流动性风险管理，以识别和解释银行体系可能的变化。分析表明，银行能够妥善管理流动性并维持充足的流动性储备，以确保及时履行承诺。主要流动性来源包括非定期存款和发行各种证券。然而，持有过多流动性储备会导致银行的机会成本，并无法满足经济对贷款的需求。因此，监管机构应降低流动性储备持有量。

title: Optimal Structure of the Financial Intermediation Industry
abstract: The optimal structure of the financial intermediation industry in a finite economy, where the role of intermediaries is to reduce information costs in the lending of resources from investors to entrepeneurs, is characterized. Banks are owned by entrepeneurs in order to exploit informational gains from close relationships between banks and firms. It is shown that this form of ownership is a reason for allowing more than one bank to operate, although there are economies of scale in intermediation. It is also argued that free entry into intermediation generally would not provide the optimal number of banks.

tldr: 论文研究了在有限经济中金融中介行业的最优结构，发现企业家拥有银行可以获取信息优势，但自由进入不会导致最优银行数量。
abstract_cn: 在一个有限经济体中，金融中介行业的最优结构得以刻画，其中中介机构的作用是降低投资者向企业家提供贷款过程中的信息成本。银行由企业家所有，以便利用银行与企业之间紧密关系所带来的信息收益。研究表明，尽管中介活动存在规模经济，但这种所有权形式是允许多家银行运营的一个理由。同时，本文也指出，中介领域的自由进入通常无法实现最优的银行数量。

title: ISLAMIC FINANCIAL INTERMEDIATION THE EMERGENCE OF A NEW MODEL
abstract: Being the main function of any banking system, financial intermediation is defined in the Islamic economy based on certain parameters that confer on the organizations that operate it a particular financial activity and various objectives. Admittedly, the two theories of intermediation, whether conventional or Islamic, converge at the level of interposition between economic agents with a need for financing and agents with financing capacity to reach an optimal flow of funds; however, they differ as to the procedures put in place to ensure the function of intermediation. In other words, the Islamic financial intermediation has distinctive characteristics because, in addition to its economic vocation which shares it with its conventional counterparts, they support a social and ethical vocation constituting the specificity of Islamic banks in terms of intermediation. This paper focuses on the study of characteristics related to the financial intermediation of Islamic banks. It seeks to reconcile the theoretical approach of intermediation and the reality of Islamic intermediation while conducting a comparative analysis with that established by conventional banks. Alongside this analysis, we will present the inventory of financial risks specific to Islamic financial activity

tldr: 论文比较了伊斯兰金融中介与传统金融中介的异同，强调伊斯兰金融中介具有社会伦理目标，并分析了其特有的金融风险。
abstract_cn: 作为任何银行体系的核心功能，金融中介（financial intermediation）在伊斯兰经济中基于特定参数被定义，这些参数赋予了运营该功能的组织特定的金融活动及多元目标。诚然，无论是传统中介理论还是伊斯兰中介理论，在需要融资的经济主体与具备融资能力的主体之间进行居间协调以实现资金最优流动这一层面具有趋同性；然而，两者在确保中介功能实施的具体程序上存在差异。换言之，伊斯兰金融中介（Islamic financial intermediation）具有独特特征，因为除与其传统同行共有的经济使命外，它还承载着构成伊斯兰银行中介特殊性的社会与道德使命。本文聚焦于研究伊斯兰银行金融中介的相关特征，试图在调和中介理论方法与伊斯兰中介现实的同时，与传统银行所建立的中介模式进行对比分析。伴随这一分析，我们将呈现伊斯兰金融活动特有的金融风险清单。

title: THE FUNCTIONS OF FINANCIAL INTERMEDIATION - A SURVEY
abstract: Traditional theories of intermediation are based on transaction costs and asymmetric information. In recent decades although transaction costs and asymmetric information have declined, intermediation has increased. New markets for financial futures and options are mainly markets for intermediaries rather than individuals or firms. In this paper we survey the last theoretical and empirical research on financial intermediation and functions of financial intermediation. We discuss the functions of intermediation in this new context.

tldr: 该综述论文调查了金融中介的理论和实证研究，讨论了在交易成本和信息不对称下降背景下金融中介功能的变化。
abstract_cn: 传统中介理论建立在交易成本与信息不对称的基础之上。近几十年来，尽管交易成本与信息不对称有所下降，中介活动却有所增加。金融期货（financial futures）与期权（options）的新市场主要是中介机构的市场，而非个人或企业的市场。本文综述了关于金融中介（financial intermediation）及其功能的最新理论与实证研究，并探讨了在这一新背景下中介功能的相关问题。

title: Securitisation in India: Ambling Down or Revving up?
abstract: Financial sectorâ€™s primary role is intermediation between ultimate savers and ultimate investors. Initially, it was banks which were the intermediaries. As the financial sector evolved, other types of financial institutions came on the scene to undertake such intermediation directly, or between and among other intermediaries. A parallel development is the emergence of varieties of financial products, far removed from simple deposits and advances, delivering such intermediation. Securitisation, as we all know, is among the latest of such intermediating product.

abstract_cn: 金融部门的首要职能是在最终储蓄者与最终投资者之间发挥中介作用。最初，银行承担着这一中介职能。随着金融部门的发展，其他类型的金融机构相继出现，直接开展此类中介业务，或在其他中介机构之间及相互之间进行中介活动。与之并行发展的，是各类金融产品的涌现——这些产品已远非简单的存贷款业务所能涵盖，并以此实现中介功能。众所周知，证券化（Securitisation）正是此类中介产品中最新近的代表之一。

title: RAMSEY MONETARY POLICY WITH CAPITAL ACCUMULATION AND NOMINAL RIGIDITIES
abstract: Recent literature on the design of optimal monetary policy has shown that deviations from price stability are small whenever prices are sticky. This paper reconsiders this issue by introducing capital accumulation in the model. Optimal monetary policy in this setup implies small deviations from price stability. The monetary authority optimally uses inflation as an explicit tax on monopolistic profits to reduce the price markup across states. Variable markup is achieved in this setup because the share of investment demand over output varies across states and in response to TFP shocks.

tldr: 论文在包含资本积累和名义刚性的模型中研究最优货币政策，发现价格稳定偏差很小，货币当局利用通胀作为对垄断利润的税来减少价格加成。
abstract_cn: 近期关于最优货币政策设计的文献表明，只要价格存在粘性（price stickiness），偏离价格稳定的幅度就很小。本文通过在模型中引入资本积累（capital accumulation）重新审视这一问题。在此设定下，最优货币政策意味着对价格稳定的偏离幅度较小。货币当局最优地将通货膨胀作为对垄断利润的显性税收（explicit tax），以降低不同状态下的价格加成（price markup）。由于投资需求占产出的份额在不同状态下存在差异，且会随全要素生产率（TFP）冲击而变化，因此在该设定中实现了可变加成（variable markup）。

title: The Financial Accelerator and the Flight to Quality
abstract: Adverse shocks to the economy may be amplified by worsening credit-market conditions-- the financial 'accelerator'. Theoretically, we interpret the financial accelerator as resulting from endogenous changes over the business cycle in the agency costs of lending. An implication of the theory is that, at the onset of a recession, borrowers facing high agency costs should receive a relatively lower share of credit extended (the flight to quality) and hence should account for a proportionally greater part of the decline in economic activity. We review the evidence for these predictions and present new evidence drawn from a panel of large and small manufacturing firms.
journal: The Review of Economics and Statistics

discovery.seed_title: Borrowers' Financial Constraints and the Transmission of Monetary Policy: Evidence from Financial Conglomerates

tldr: 该论文提出并验证了金融加速器理论，即信贷市场代理成本的内生变化会放大经济冲击，导致高质量借款人获得更多信贷（flight to quality），从而加剧经济衰退。
abstract_cn: 经济遭受的不利冲击可能因信贷市场状况恶化而被放大，即金融"加速器"效应。从理论层面，我们将金融加速器解释为商业周期中贷款代理成本的内生变化所导致的结果。该理论的一个推论是：在经济衰退初期，面临高代理成本的借款人获得的信贷份额相对较低（即"质量避险"现象），因此其在经济活动衰退中所占的比重会相应增大。我们回顾了支持这些预测的现有证据，并展示了从一组大、小型制造企业面板数据中得出的新证据。

analysis.chinese_title: 金融加速器与质量飞向
analysis.summary: 本文提出“金融加速器”概念，认为负面冲击通过恶化信贷市场条件而被放大。理论上，金融加速器源于商业周期中贷款代理成本的内生变化。其含义是，衰退初期面临高代理成本的借款人获得的信贷份额相对下降（质量飞向），从而在经济活动下降中占更大比例。本文回顾了相关证据，并利用大型和小型制造企业面板数据提供了新证据。研究发现，小型企业（更易受代理成本影响）在衰退中信贷获取减少，销售、库存和短期债务的周期性波动更大。
innovations: 提出金融加速器理论，将信贷市场条件变化作为冲击放大机制。
从理论上推导出“质量飞向”现象，即衰退时信贷从高代理成本借款人流向低代理成本借款人。
利用美国商务部季度财务报告（QFR）的小型和大型制造企业面板数据，提供新证据。
通过控制行业和信贷市场准入代理变量，验证了企业规模作为信贷约束代理变量的稳健性。
粗略估算表明，制造业约三分之一的周期性波动可由信贷约束差异解释。
analysis.methodology: 本文采用理论分析与实证检验相结合的方法。理论部分基于委托-代理框架构建金融加速器模型，推导出净财富与外部融资溢价的关系。实证部分利用QFR数据，按企业规模分组，比较小型和大型企业在销售、库存、短期债务等方面的周期性行为差异，并通过控制行业和信贷市场准入代理变量进行稳健性检验。
key_results: 小型制造企业在衰退中短期债务增长显著低于大型企业，信贷获取受限。
小型企业的销售、库存和短期债务具有更强的顺周期性。
控制行业和信贷市场准入代理变量后，规模效应依然显著。
粗略估算显示，信贷约束差异可解释制造业约三分之一的周期性波动。
tech_stack: 稳健性检验（控制行业、信贷市场准入代理变量）
strengths: 理论框架清晰，将信贷市场摩擦纳入宏观经济学分析。
利用代表性更强的QFR数据，涵盖非上市公司，弥补了以往仅关注上市公司的不足。
通过多种稳健性检验，增强了结论的可信度。
提供了定量估算，表明金融加速器对制造业波动有重要贡献。
limitations: 企业规模作为信贷约束代理变量可能不完美，存在遗漏变量问题。
数据仅覆盖制造业，结论推广至其他部门需谨慎。
理论模型较为简化，未考虑银行和家庭等借款主体。
估算方法为粗略计算，精确性有限。
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 本文直接研究信贷市场摩擦对经济周期的影响，与银行信贷、金融稳定、信用周期等关键词高度相关。金融加速器机制涉及企业净财富、代理成本等，与宏观审慎政策、货币政策传导密切相关。

title: Investment, Fundamentals and Finance
abstract: Financial variables such as cash flow and cash stocks are robust and quantitatively important explanatory variables for investment at the firm-level. A large body of recent empirical work attributes these findings to capital market imperfections. This interpretation is controversial, however, because even in the absence of capital market imperfections, such financial variables may appear as an explanatory variable for investment if they contain information about the expected marginal value of capital. In this paper, we show how structural models of investment with costly external finance can be used to identify and quantify the fundamental' versus the financial' determinants of investment. Our empirical results show that investment responds significantly to both fundamental and financial factors. Point estimates from our structural model imply that, for the average firm in our sample, financial factors raise the overall response of investment to an expansionary shock by 25%, relative to a baseline case where financial frictions are zero. Consistent with theory, small firms and firms without bond ratings show the strongest response to financial factors, while bond-rated firms show little if any response once we control for investment fundamentals.

discovery.seed_title: Borrowers' Financial Constraints and the Transmission of Monetary Policy: Evidence from Financial Conglomerates

tldr: 本文利用结构模型识别并量化了基本面和金融因素对企业投资的影响，发现金融摩擦使投资对扩张性冲击的总体响应提高25%，且小企业和无债券评级企业受金融因素影响更大。
abstract_cn: 诸如现金流和现金存量等金融变量，在企业层面的投资中，是稳健且具有定量重要性的解释变量。近期大量实证研究将这些发现归因于资本市场的不完善。然而，这种解释存在争议，因为即使在没有资本市场不完善的情况下，如果这些金融变量包含关于资本预期边际价值的信息，它们仍可能作为投资的解释变量出现。在本文中，我们展示了如何利用带有昂贵外部融资成本的结构性投资模型来识别并量化投资的“基本面”与“金融面”决定因素。我们的实证结果表明，投资对基本面因素和金融因素均有显著反应。来自我们结构性模型的点估计显示，对于样本中的平均企业而言，与金融摩擦为零的基准情形相比，金融因素使投资对扩张性冲击的整体反应提高了25%。与理论一致的是，小型企业和无债券评级的企业对金融因素的反应最为强烈，而一旦我们控制了投资基本面因素，有债券评级的企业几乎未显示出任何反应。

title: Is There a `Credit Channel' for Monetary Policy?
abstract: Using data for the U.S. manufacturing sector, we test for the existence of a broad credit channel for monetary policy, which operates through the total supply of loans. Our test focuses on the relationship between internal funds and business investment. After a monetary tightening, we find that this relationship becomes much closer for small firms but not for large firms. In contrast, after a monetary easing, the relationship is little changed for all firms. This evidence supports the existence of a broad credit channel.

title: The Provision of Liquidity by High‐Frequency Participants
abstract: Abstract This paper examines the order submission strategies and supply of liquidity by high‐frequency participants versus the remainder of participants in the limit order book. The results show that high‐frequency participants submit orders at multiple prices in the limit order book, concentrated at or within the quote. This activity translates into the provision of liquidity on an on‐going basis, which is robust to fast versus slow and volatile markets, together suggesting that high‐frequency participants resolve temporal liquidity imbalances in the limit order book. The evidence is consistent with high‐frequency trading (HFT) improving market liquidity, but there remain issues surrounding high‐frequency participants’ effect on market depth and the difficulty of trading of non‐HFT participants.

abstract_cn: 本文研究了限价订单簿中高频参与者与其他参与者的订单提交策略及流动性供给情况。结果表明，高频参与者在限价订单簿中以多个价格提交订单，并集中于报价内或报价附近。这一行为转化为持续性的流动性供给，且无论在快速、慢速还是波动剧烈的市场中均表现稳健，共同表明高频参与者解决了限价订单簿中的临时流动性失衡。该证据与高频交易（HFT）改善市场流动性的观点一致，但围绕高频参与者对市场深度的影响以及非高频交易（non-HFT）参与者交易困难的问题仍然存在。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Liquidity
abstract: Abstract Everyone likes liquidity. Traders like liquidity because it allows them to implement their trading strategies cheaply. Exchanges like liquidity because it attracts traders to their markets. Regulators like liquidity because liquid markets are often less volatile than illiquid ones.

abstract: Білім берy қоғaмның экономикaлық дaмyының негізі, әлеyметтік тұрaқтылықтың фaкторлaрының бірі, хaлықтың рyхaни-aдaмгершілік әлеyетінің және интеллектyaлдық өсyінің қaйнaр көзі ретінде бaрлық yaқыттaрдa тaптырмaс құндылық болып есептеліп келеді. Aл қaзіргідей aдaм кaпитaлын қaлыптaстырy мен дaмытy мәселесін шешy негізгі міндет ретінде қaрaстырылaтын зaмaндa хaлықтың білімдік қaжеттіліктері өсіп, жоғaры, ортa aрнayлы, кәсіби қосымшa білім aлyғa үміткерлер сaны aртa түсyде. Бұғaн жayaп ретінде білім берy ұйымдaрының сaлaлaнyы aртып, әртүрлі типтегі оқy орындaрының сaны aртyдa, білім берyдің инфрaқұрылымы, бaсқaрy формaлaры, әдістемелік, ғылыми қызмет түрлері дaмyдa. Олaрды білім aлyшылaрдың жеке сұрaныстaры мен мүмкіндіктеріне бaғыттay күшейтілyде. Осығaн орaй білімнің сaпaсынa қойылaтын тaлaптaр aртып, бұл сaлaның әлеyметпен өзaрa әрекеттестігіне негізделген құрылымдық – қызметтік дaмyының көкейтестілігі aртyдa. Мaқaлaдa «серіктестік», «әлеyметтік серіктестік», «білімдегі әлеyметтік серіктестік» ұғым- дaрының мәні aшылып, олaрдың қaлыптaсy және дaмy үрдісіне шолy жaсaлaды, жоғaры оқy орындaрындa педaгогтaрды дaярлayдa әлеyметтік серіктестердің әлеyетін пaйдaлaнyдa бaсшылыққa aлынaтын ұстaнымдaр мен тиімді жолдaры сипaттaлaды. Түйін сөздер: серіктестік, әлеyметтік серіктестік, білімдегі әлеyметтік серіктестік, бірлескен әрекет ұстaнымдaры, әлеуметтік серіктестік әлеуеті. Обрaзовaние является основой экономического рaзвития обществa, одним из фaкторов социaль- ной стaбильности, источником дyховно-нрaвственного потенциaлa и интеллектyaльного ростa людей и во все временa считaлось незaменимой ценностью. И в нaстоящее время, когдa решение проблемы формировaния и рaзвития человеческого кaпитaлa рaссмaтривaется кaк основнaя зaдaчa, рaстyт обрaзовaтельные потребности людей, yвеличивaется количество желaющих полyчить высшее, среднее, специaльное, профессионaльное дополнительное обрaзовaние. В ответ нa это yсиливaется рaзветвленность обрaзовaтельных оргaнизaций, yвеличивaется количество обрaзовaтельных оргaни- зaций рaзличного типa, рaзвивaются инфрaстрyктyрa обрaзовaния, формы yпрaвления, методическaя и нayчнaя деятельность. Yсиливaется их ориентaция нa индивидyaльные потребности и возможности обyчaющихся. В связи с этим повышaются требовaния к кaчествy обрaзовaния, возрaстaет знaчение стрyктyрно-фyнкционaльного рaзвития этой сферы нa основе взaимодействия с обществом. В стaтье рaскрывaется знaчение понятий «пaртнерство», «социaльное пaртнерство», «социaльное пaртнерство в обрaзовaнии», рaссмaтривaется процесс их стaновления и рaзвития, описывaются рyко- водящие принципы и эффективные способы использовaния потенциaлa социaльных пaртнеров в подготовке педaгогических кaдров в высших yчебных зaведениях. Ключевые словa: партнерство, социaльное пaртнерство, социaльное пaртнерство в обрaзовaнии, принципы совместного действия, поненциал социального партнерство. Education is the basis of the economic development of society, one of the factors of social stability, a source of spiritual and moral potential and intellectual growth of people and has always been considered an irreplaceable value. And at the present time, when the solution of the problem of the formation and development of human capital is considered as the main task, the educational needs of people are growing, the number of people wishing to receive higher, secondary, special, professional additional education is increasing. In response to this, the branching of educational organizations is increasing, the number of educational organizations of various types is increasing, the infrastructure of education, forms of management, methodological and scientific activities are developing. Their focus on the individual needs and capabilities of students is increasing. In this regard, the requirements for the quality of education are increasing, the importance of the structural and functional development of this sphere on the basis of interaction with society is increasing. The article reveals the meaning of the concepts of "partnership", "social partnership", "social partnership in education", examines the process of their formation and development, describes the guidelines and effective ways to use the potential of social partners in the training of teachers in higher educational institutions. Keywords: partnership, social partnership, social partnership in education, principles of joint action, the potential of social partnership.

tldr: 该论文探讨了社会合作伙伴关系在高等教育教师培训中的概念、原则和有效利用方式，不涉及任何金融或经济主题。
abstract_cn: 教育是经济社会发展的基础，是社会稳定的因素之一，是人民精神道德潜力和智力增长的源泉，历来被视为不可替代的价值。而在当今时代，当人力资本的形成与发展问题的解决被视为主要任务时，人民的教育需求不断增长，希望接受高等、中等专业、职业补充教育的人数日益增加。为此，教育机构的分支增多，各类教育机构的数量增加，教育基础设施、管理形式、方法论和科学活动类型不断发展。它们正日益以学习者的个人需求和能力为导向。因此，对教育质量的要求不断提高，基于与社会互动而进行的该领域结构性-功能性发展（structural-functional development）的迫切性日益增强。本文揭示了“伙伴关系”（partnership）、“社会伙伴关系”（social partnership）、“教育中的社会伙伴关系”（social partnership in education）等概念的内涵，回顾了其形成与发展的过程，并描述了在高等院校教师培养中利用社会伙伴潜力时所遵循的原则与有效途径。关键词：伙伴关系，社会伙伴关系，教育中的社会伙伴关系，联合行动原则，社会伙伴关系潜力。

title: Private and Public Supply of Liquidity
abstract: This paper addresses a basic yet unresolved question: Do claims on private assets provide sufficient liquidity for an efficient functioning of the productive sector? Or does the State have a role in creating liquidity and regulating it either through adjustments in the stock of government securities or by other means? In our model, firms can meet future liquidity needs in three ways: by issuing new claims and diluting old ones, by obtaining a credit credit line from a financial intermediary, and by holding claims on other firms. When there is no aggregate uncertainty, we show that these instruments are sufficient for attaining the socially optimal (second-best) contract between investors and firms. Such a contract imposes both a maximum leverage ratio and a liquidity constraint on firms. Intermediaries coordinate the use of liquidity. Without intermediation, scarce liquidity may be wasted and the social optimum may not be attainable. When there is only aggregate uncertainty the private sector is no longer self-sufficient with regard to liquidity. The government can improve liquidity by issuing bonds that commit future consumer income. Government bonds command a liquidity premium over private claims. The supply of liquidity can be managed by loosening liquidity (boosting the value of its securities) when the aggregate liquidity shock is high and tightening liquidity when the shock is low. The paper thus provides a microeconomic example of government supplied liquidity as well as of the possibility of active government policy.

tldr: 论文探讨了私人资产和政府债券在满足企业流动性需求中的作用，指出在总体不确定性下政府债券能提供流动性溢价，并可通过调整政府债券供给来管理流动性。
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了一个基本但尚未解决的问题：对私人资产的要求权能否为生产部门的有效运行提供充足的流动性？还是说，国家在创造流动性并通过调整政府证券存量或其他手段对其进行监管方面应发挥作用？在我们的模型中，企业可以通过三种方式满足未来的流动性需求：发行新的要求权并稀释旧的要求权、从金融中介机构获得信贷额度，以及持有对其他企业的要求权。当不存在总体不确定性时，我们证明这些工具足以实现投资者与企业之间的社会最优（次优）契约。这种契约对企业施加了最大杠杆比率和流动性约束。金融中介机构协调流动性的使用。如果没有中介，稀缺的流动性可能会被浪费，社会最优状态可能无法实现。当仅存在总体不确定性时，私人部门在流动性方面不再能够自给自足。政府可以通过发行承诺未来消费者收入的债券来改善流动性。政府债券相对于私人要求权享有流动性溢价。流动性的供给可以通过在总体流动性冲击较高时放松流动性（提升其证券价值），在冲击较低时收紧流动性来进行管理。因此，本文为政府提供流动性以及积极政府政策的可能性提供了一个微观经济学的例证。

title: The Odero Theory of Captured Structural Inflation OTCSI
abstract: Standard monetary policy fails to control inflation in structurally captured Africaneconomies. We propose the Odero Theory of Captured Structural Inflation -OTCSI, which models inflation as a function of market power, asymmetric price transmission,import dependence, and governance decay rather than money supply alone.Using evidence from 6 countries in Africa between 2020-2025, we document auniversal ”Ratchet Effect”: retail prices rise 1:1 with input costs but fall only ∼0.3:1when costs decline. We define the Rigidity Coefficient RC = 3.0 to quantify thiseffect.We introduce the OTCSI Equation and the Odero Curve to quantify structuralinflation. The policy implication is a 4-Pillar De-Capture Act for the AU and FinanceMinisters.Keywords: Structural Inflation, Africa, Market Power, Asymmetric Pricing, Governance,Econophysics, OTCSI

tldr: 论文提出Odero理论（OTCSI），认为非洲结构性通胀由市场力量、不对称价格传导、进口依赖和治理衰退驱动，而非货币供给，并引入棘轮效应和刚性系数来量化。
abstract_cn: 标准货币政策无法在结构性俘获的非洲经济体中有效控制通货膨胀。我们提出奥德罗结构性俘获通胀理论（Odero Theory of Captured Structural Inflation, OTCSI），该理论将通胀建模为市场势力、非对称价格传导、进口依赖及治理衰退的函数，而非仅由货币供给决定。基于2020-2025年间6个非洲国家的实证数据，我们揭示了一种普遍的“棘轮效应”（Ratchet Effect）：零售价格随投入成本上涨呈1:1比例上升，但当成本下降时仅以约0.3:1的比例回落。我们将刚性系数（Rigidity Coefficient, RC）定义为3.0以量化该效应。我们引入OTCSI方程（OTCSI Equation）与奥德罗曲线（Odero Curve）以量化结构性通胀。其政策启示是为非洲联盟（AU）及各国财政部长提出一项“四支柱去俘获法案”（4-Pillar De-Capture Act）。关键词：结构性通胀，非洲，市场势力，非对称定价，治理，经济物理学，OTCSI

title: Resilience of the Moroccan financial market to global shocks: The Role of Monetary Policy and Event Study Analysis (2020–2026)
abstract: Abstract This paper investigates the resilience of the Moroccan financial market to major international shocks over the period 2020-2026. While emerging markets are highly exposed to external disturbances, empirical literature lacks evidence on how the Moroccan market absorbs heterogeneous crises. This study fills this gap by analyzing the MASI index reactions to three distinct events: the COVID-19 pandemic, the Russia–Ukraine conflict, and the geopolitical tensions between Iran and the United States. Using an event study methodology based on a constant mean return model, we estimate cumulative abnormal returns (CAR) over an eleven-day window (t–5 to t+5). This window is methodologically selected to capture both the anticipation phase and the immediate market adjustment following each shock. Quantified results reveal differentiated market sensitivity depending on the shock nature. The systemic health crisis triggered a persistent negative impact with a CAR of -14.80%. The energy shock linked to the Russia–Ukraine conflict produced an abrupt negative impact with a CAR of -6.73%. Finally, the tensions between Iran and the United States highlight a high level of volatility, resulting in a CAR of -8.91% within the observation window. These findings highlight an evolving financial resilience supported by the stabilization role of Bank Al-Maghrib and underscore the market’s differentiated absorption capacity regarding systemic versus geopolitical shocks. Résumé Ce travail examine la résilience du marché financier marocain face aux chocs internationaux majeurs sur la période 2020-2026. Bien que les marchés émergents soient fortement exposés aux perturbations externes, la littérature empirique manque de preuves sur la manière dont le marché marocain absorbe des crises hétérogènes. Cette étude comble cette lacune en analysant les réactions de l'indice MASI à trois événements distincts : la pandémie de COVID-19, le conflit russo-ukrainien et les tensions géopolitiques entre l'Iran et les États-Unis. En utilisant une méthodologie d'étude d'événement basée sur un modèle de rendement moyen constant, nous estimons les rendements anormaux cumulés (CAR) sur une fenêtre de onze jours (t–5 à t+5). Cette fenêtre est méthodologiquement sélectionnée pour capturer à la fois la phase d'anticipation et l'ajustement immédiat du marché suite à chaque choc. Les résultats quantifiés révèlent une sensibilité différenciée du marché selon la nature du choc. La crise sanitaire systémique a engendré un impact négatif persistant avec un CAR de -14,80 %. Le choc énergétique lié au conflit russo-ukrainien a produit un impact négatif abrupt avec un CAR de -6,73 %. Enfin, les tensions entre l'Iran et les États-Unis soulignent une forte volatilité, se traduisant par un CAR de -8,91 % sur la fenêtre d'observation. Ces résultats mettent en lumière une résilience financière évolutive, soutenue par le rôle stabilisateur de Bank Al-Maghrib et soulignent la capacité d'absorption différenciée du marché marocain face aux chocs systémiques par rapport aux chocs géopolitiques.

tldr: 该论文通过事件研究法发现摩洛哥金融市场对系统性健康危机、能源冲击和地缘政治冲击具有差异化反应，并强调央行在维护金融稳定中的作用。
abstract_cn: 本文研究了2020-2026年期间摩洛哥金融市场对重大国际冲击的韧性。尽管新兴市场高度暴露于外部扰动，但实证文献中关于摩洛哥市场如何吸收异质性危机的证据尚不充分。本研究通过分析MASI指数对三个不同事件的反应填补了这一空白：COVID-19疫情、俄乌冲突以及伊朗与美国之间的地缘政治紧张局势。采用基于常数均值回报模型的事件研究法，我们在十一天窗口期（t–5至t+5）内估计了累计异常回报（CAR）。该窗口期的选择在方法论上旨在捕捉每次冲击后的预期阶段与市场即时调整。量化结果显示，市场敏感性因冲击性质不同而存在差异。系统性健康危机引发了持续负面影响，CAR为-14.80%。与俄乌冲突相关的能源冲击产生了突发性负面影响，CAR为-6.73%。最后，伊朗与美国之间的紧张局势凸显了高度波动性，在观察窗口内导致CAR为-8.91%。这些发现揭示了在摩洛哥央行（Bank Al-Maghrib）稳定作用支持下不断演变的金融韧性，并强调了市场在吸收系统性冲击与地缘政治冲击方面的差异化能力。

title: Selecting seasonal filters in X-13-ARIMA via cross-validation
abstract: Official statistics routinely employs the X-13-ARIMA method to seasonally adjust economic time series. A key step is choosing the length of the seasonal moving av- erage. Traditionally, this choice relies on ad hoc criteria and expert judgement. We propose a cross-validation-based filter selection scheme that offers greater flexibility, including the possibility of incorporating novel filters. This approach is particularly promising for the seasonal adjustment of weekly, daily, and high-frequency time series. We demonstrate how to integrate cross-validation into the X-13-ARIMA method and discuss the advantages of various implementation options. Evaluation on monthly and quarterly time series demonstrates that this selection method performs at least as well as, and often better than, conventional selection criteria.
tldr: 该论文提出一种基于交叉验证的滤波器选择方法，用于改进X-13-ARIMA季节性调整中季节性移动平均长度的选择，在月度、季度数据上表现优于传统方法。
abstract_cn: 官方统计通常采用X-13-ARIMA方法对经济时间序列进行季节调整。其中一个关键步骤是选择季节移动平均的长度。传统上，这一选择依赖于特定准则（ad hoc criteria）和专家判断。我们提出了一种基于交叉验证（cross-validation）的滤波器选择方案，该方案具有更高的灵活性，包括引入新型滤波器的可能性。这一方法尤其适用于周度、日度及高频时间序列的季节调整。我们展示了如何将交叉验证整合到X-13-ARIMA方法中，并讨论了不同实现方案的优点。对月度与季度时间序列的评估表明，该选择方法的表现至少与传统选择准则相当，且通常更优。

title: Bivariate sudden stop analysis of equity and bond fund flows to emerging markets using isolation forest
abstract: This paper applies machine learning methods and anomaly detection to sudden stop analysis of portfolio flows. Using the isolation forest methodology, univariate as well as bivariate sudden stops of equity and bond fund flows to emerging markets are generated. An anomaly score and an anomaly classification are provided. The results point to an increase in anomalous portfolio flows to emerging markets in recent years. In addition, the isolation forest methodology appears to yield better results than the traditional approach to sudden stop analysis in classifying anomalies connected with the recent capital flow volatility related to the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic as well as the interest rate reversal in advanced economies in recent years. The bivariate approach to anomaly detection is better able to identify anomalous episodes of financial stress, where both equity and bond markets are simultaneously affected. Most of the classified anomalies are related to fund flow stops (i.e. simultaneous stops to both equity and bond flows) or surges (i.e. surges in both equity and bond flows). In general, univariate and bivariate anomaly detection using machine learning techniques can play an important part and lead to a better understanding of sudden stops and surges.
tldr: 该论文应用孤立森林方法检测新兴市场股票和债券基金流的单变量和双变量突然停止，发现近年来异常资本流动增加，且双变量方法能更好地识别同时影响股票和债券市场的金融压力时期。
abstract_cn: 本文应用机器学习方法与异常检测技术，对组合资本流动的骤停现象进行分析。采用孤立森林（Isolation Forest）方法，生成了股票与债券基金流向新兴市场的单变量及双变量骤停指标，并提供了异常评分与异常分类。研究结果表明，近年来流向新兴市场的异常组合资本流动有所增加。此外，相较于传统的骤停分析方法，孤立森林方法在识别与近期资本流动波动相关的异常事件方面表现更优，这些波动包括新冠疫情爆发以及近年来发达经济体利率逆转所引发的资本流动变化。双变量异常检测方法能够更有效地识别金融市场压力异常时期，即股票与债券市场同时受到影响的时段。大多数被分类的异常事件与基金流动骤停（即股票与债券流动同时停止）或激增（即股票与债券流动同时大幅增加）相关。总体而言，运用机器学习技术的单变量与双变量异常检测能够发挥重要作用，有助于更深入地理解资本流动的骤停与激增现象。

title: Austria One Century Apart: Persistent Effects of Hyperinflation on Inflation Expectations
abstract: Can the memory of past inflation shape how people form expectations about prices today? Using regional inflation data from Austria’s 1921–22 hyperinflation linked to quarterly consumer surveys (May 2020–Oct 2024), we document a persistent association between historical inflation exposure and contemporary inflation expectations: individuals from regions more exposed to the historical hyperinflation episode report higher inflation expectations, a century later. We further show that regional newspapers in historically high-inflation areas devote greater attention to inflation, suggesting that local media environments contribute to the intergenerational transmission of inflation attitudes. These findings indicate that the collective memory of major inflation episodes can durably shape expectation formation, with implications for managing heterogeneous regional responses during inflationary episodes.
tldr: 该研究利用奥地利1921-22年恶性通货膨胀的区域数据和2020-2024年的消费者调查，发现历史通胀暴露与当代通胀预期之间存在持久关联，且地方媒体环境在其中起传导作用。
abstract_cn: 过去的通胀记忆能否塑造人们当前对价格形成的预期？利用奥地利1921–22年恶性通胀时期的地区通胀数据，并结合季度消费者调查（2020年5月至2024年10月），我们记录了历史通胀暴露与当代通胀预期之间的持久关联：一个世纪后，来自历史上恶性通胀时期暴露程度更高地区的个体，报告了更高的通胀预期。我们进一步发现，历史上高通胀地区的地区报纸对通胀的关注度更高，这表明地方媒体环境促进了通胀态度的代际传递。这些发现表明，重大通胀事件的集体记忆能够持久地影响预期形成，这对于管理通胀时期异质性的地区反应具有启示意义。

title: Les effets macroéconomiques de l’encadrement de l’endettement des ménages : une approche mésoéconométrique
abstract: We develop a mesoeconometric framework to quantify the macroeconomic effects of policies that target household leverage. We focus on borrower-based macroprudential measures (BBMs), which regulate lending standards at loan origination. The approach first identifies lending standards shocks in a structural VAR-IV framework and then exploits heterogeneous borrower responses to BBMs to isolate the policy-induced component of those shocks. We apply this framework to France, where caps on debt-service-to-income (DSTI) ratios and loan maturities were introduced in 2019. We show that lending standards shocks have persistent and economically meaningful effects on housing and credit dynamics. By contrast, the BBM-induced component has statistically significant but economically moderate effects. In credit markets, the measure raises borrowing interest rates by around 0.15 to 0.20 percentage points and slows the growth of real outstanding housing credit by up to 0.8 percentage points between 2022 and 2023, a period during which outstanding credit fell by as much as 8%, mainly as a result of higher interest rates. The measure also reduces house price growth by 2 to 3 percentage points at its trough. We find no significant impact on real residential investment, household income, or real GDP. These results indicate that BBMs primarily affect the riskiest component of the housing credit market without generating broad macroeconomic spillovers, highlighting their role as targeted tools for enhancing financial resilience.
tldr: 该论文开发了一个中观计量框架，量化法国基于借款人的宏观审慎措施（如债务收入比上限）对住房信贷、房价和宏观经济的温和但显著的影响，表明这些措施主要针对高风险信贷部分而不产生广泛溢出。
abstract_cn: 我们构建了一个中观计量经济学框架，用以量化针对家庭杠杆的政策所产生的宏观经济效应。我们聚焦于基于借款人的宏观审慎措施（BBMs），这些措施在贷款发放环节对放贷标准进行监管。该方法首先在结构向量自回归-工具变量（structural VAR-IV）框架下识别放贷标准冲击，随后利用借款人对BBMs的异质性反应来分离这些冲击中由政策引发的成分。我们将该框架应用于法国——该国于2019年引入了偿债收入比（DSTI）上限和贷款期限上限。研究表明，放贷标准冲击对住房和信贷动态具有持久且具有经济意义的显著影响。相比之下，由BBMs引发的成分虽具有统计显著性，但其经济影响较为温和。在信贷市场中，该措施使借款利率上升约0.15至0.20个百分点，并在2022年至2023年间使实际住房信贷余额增速放缓至多0.8个百分点——在此期间，未偿信贷下降了多达8%，主要归因于利率上升。该措施还使房价增速在低谷时期降低了2至3个百分点。我们未发现其对实际住宅投资、家庭收入或实际国内生产总值（GDP）产生显著影响。这些结果表明，BBMs主要影响住房信贷市场中风险最高的部分，而不会产生广泛的宏观经济溢出效应，凸显了其作为增强金融韧性的针对性工具的作用。

title: Beyond Consistent Scenarios: Deriving Indirect Influence, Transition Resistance, and Adjustment Dynamics
abstract: Assessments of structural change and economic transition dynamics, such as those arising in the energy transition, depend on internally consistent qualitative scenarios specifying the policy environment, technology mix, governance arrangements, and demand conditions. Cross-Impact Balance (CIB) analysis derives such socio-technical scenarios as fixed-point attractors of an expert-elicited interdependency network, supplying structural inputs upon which assessment models (including energy system optimisation, agent-based, and general equilibrium frameworks) can draw. Standard CIB, however, delivers only this equilibrium catalogue, leaving four structural questions unanswered: how much network-weighted effort a given transition requires; which components are the true system-wide levers once indirect influence chains are counted; in what sequence the system adjusts; and how the network at a given attractor responds to an external shock. This paper extends CIB through Linear Response Theory, exploiting a structural isomorphism between the CIB drift matrix and the Leontief input-output technology matrix. Four analytical objects are derived in closed form: the Type I cross-impact multiplier, which aggregates all direct and indirect influence chains; the perturbation budget, a network-weighted and directionally asymmetric measure of transition effort; the impulse response function, which traces descriptor adjustment sequences and feedback-induced overshoots; and the unit-impulse shock profile, which characterises attractor-specific network sensitivity and yields a direct measure of structural resilience and susceptibility. The framework is applied empirically to an energy-transition cross-impact matrix, yielding all four objects for five structural equilibria, and transfers to any domain in which pairwise influence scores encode structural interdependencies.
tldr: 本文扩展了跨影响平衡分析方法，利用线性响应理论推导出间接影响乘数、扰动预算、脉冲响应函数和冲击特征，用于分析能源转型等结构性变化。
abstract_cn: 对结构变化与经济转型动态（例如能源转型过程中产生的此类动态）的评估，依赖于内部一致且定性描述政策环境、技术组合、治理安排及需求条件的场景。交叉影响平衡（Cross-Impact Balance, CIB）分析通过专家引出的相互依赖网络，将此类社会技术场景推导为不动点吸引子，从而为评估模型（包括能源系统优化模型、基于主体的模型及一般均衡框架）提供可调用的结构性输入。然而，标准CIB仅提供这一均衡目录，留下四个结构性问题未予解答：给定转型需要多少网络加权努力；在计入间接影响链后，哪些组件是真正的全系统杠杆；系统以何种顺序进行调整；以及给定吸引子下的网络如何应对外部冲击。本文通过线性响应理论扩展CIB，利用CIB漂移矩阵与列昂惕夫投入产出技术矩阵之间的结构同构性。以闭合形式推导出四个分析对象：第一类交叉影响乘数，它聚合了所有直接与间接影响链；扰动预算，一种网络加权且方向不对称的转型努力度量；脉冲响应函数，它追踪描述符调整序列及反馈引发的超调；以及单位脉冲冲击剖面，它刻画了吸引子特定的网络敏感性，并直接度量结构韧性与易感性。该框架被实证应用于一个能源转型交叉影响矩阵，为五个结构均衡生成了全部四个对象，并可迁移至任何以成对影响分数编码结构相互依赖关系的领域。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Forecasting Inflation with Microdata: An Adaptive Machine Learning Approach
abstract: Does microeconomic heterogeneity help to forecast aggregate inflation in a non-stationary environment? We develop a scan test for whether one forecast outperforms another, over an interval with unknown starting point and duration. To exploit any occasional forecasting power that the scan test detects, we design an adaptive machine learning pipeline. We encode the distribution of price changes into a high-dimensional vector, which we combine with a gradient boosted trees algorithm. We then combine this micro forecast with other benchmark forecasts, using an adaptive algorithm that makes use of the micro forecast only when it performs well. We apply the pipeline to UK microdata, with four main results. First, the micro forecast outperforms a univariate benchmark, but only in the volatile period after 2020. Second, the scan test detects periods of micro outperformance, so the micro forecast enters the combined forecast. Third, the combined forecast performs comparably to the univariate benchmark before 2020 and better at every horizon after 2020. Fourth, the value of microdata for the combined forecast materializes after 2020. We conclude that microdata are valuable for forecasting aggregate inflation, but only after large shocks.
tldr: 论文开发自适应机器学习方法，利用微观价格数据预测总体通胀，发现微观数据在2020年后大冲击下提升预测效果。
abstract_cn: 微观经济异质性是否有助于在非平稳环境中预测总体通胀？我们开发了一种扫描检验方法，用于判断在起始点和持续时间未知的区间内，某一预测是否优于另一预测。为利用扫描检验可能检测到的偶发性预测能力，我们设计了一个自适应机器学习流程。我们将价格变化分布编码为高维向量，并将其与梯度提升树算法相结合。随后，我们使用一种自适应算法将该微观预测与其他基准预测相结合，该算法仅在微观预测表现良好时加以利用。我们将此流程应用于英国微观数据，得到四项主要结果。第一，微观预测优于单变量基准，但仅在2020年后的波动时期如此。第二，扫描检验检测到了微观预测表现更优的时期，因此微观预测被纳入组合预测。第三，组合预测在2020年前的表现与单变量基准相当，而在2020年后的各个预测期限上均表现更优。第四，微观数据对组合预测的价值在2020年后得以显现。我们得出结论：微观数据对于预测总体通胀具有价值，但仅在大规模冲击之后。

title: Eigenvector rotation precedes eigenvalue-based early-warning signals: a TVP-Kalman approach to detecting critical transitions
abstract:
Early-warning signals (EWS) for critical transitions are predominantly based on
  changes in the dominant eigenvalue of the system's Jacobian-rising variance
  and lag-1 autocorrelation (AR(1)). However, eigenvalue-based EWS have
  $O(delta theta^2)$ sensitivity to perturbations, limiting their lead time.
  We introduce a complementary EWS based on eigenvector rotation, measured by the
  time-varying elasticity $beta(t) = d log y / d log x$ estimated via a
  TVP-Kalman filter in log-log space. Since eigenvector sensitivity is
  $O(delta theta)$, $beta$ is predicted to precede eigenvalue-based signals. We test this hypothesis on 24 years of monthly NASA AIRS data (2002--2026,
  284 observations) across three climatically distinct regions (Arctic 65-90N,
  Tropics 10S-10N, Indian Monsoon), using temperature ($T$) and specific
  humidity ($q$) as the coupled variables. $beta$ is orthogonal to AR(1) in all
  regions (Pearson $r approx 0$, n.s.), confirming the distinct information
  content. Systematic lead-lag analysis reveals that $beta$ precedes AR(1) by
  14--24 months, consistent with the $O(delta theta) > O(delta theta^2)$
  mechanism. Six simulated systems with known tipping points (Stommel AMOC model, fold
  bifurcation, logistic map, critical slowing down) further validate that $beta$
  leads AR(1) by 39-153 timesteps when the transition involves coupling
  degradation. The dimensionless nature of $beta$ (scale-free log-log exponent)
  suggests it may serve as a universal, cross-system EWS, analogous to scaling
  exponents in critical phenomena.
tldr: 提出基于特征向量旋转的早期预警信号，通过TVP-Kalman滤波估计弹性β，在气候数据和模拟系统中验证其领先于传统特征值信号。
abstract_cn: 临界转变的早期预警信号（EWS）主要基于系统雅可比矩阵主导特征值的变化——即方差和滞后一阶自相关（AR(1)）的上升。然而，基于特征值的EWS对扰动的灵敏度为$O(delta theta^2)$，这限制了其预警提前时间。我们提出了一种基于特征向量旋转的互补性EWS，通过在对数-对数空间中采用时变参数卡尔曼滤波（TVP-Kalman filter）估计的时变弹性系数$beta(t) = d log y / d log x$进行度量。由于特征向量的灵敏度为$O(delta theta)$，因此$beta$预计将先于基于特征值的信号出现。我们利用24年的NASA AIRS月度数据（2002—2026年，共284次观测），在三个气候特征迥异的区域（北极65-90N、热带10S-10N、印度季风区）检验了这一假设，并以温度（$T$）和比湿（$q$）作为耦合变量。在所有区域中，$beta$与AR(1)均呈正交关系（Pearson $r approx 0$，不显著），证实了二者所包含信息的差异性。系统的超前-滞后分析表明，$beta$比AR(1)提前14—24个月出现，这与$O(delta theta) > O(delta theta^2)$的机制一致。六个已知临界点的模拟系统（Stommel AMOC模型、折叠分岔、逻辑斯蒂映射、临界减速）进一步验证了：当转变涉及耦合退化时，$beta$比AR(1)提前39—153个时间步长出现。$beta$的无量纲特性（无尺度对数-对数指数）表明，它可能作为一种跨系统的普适性EWS，类似于临界现象中的标度指数。

title: Bivariate Isotonic Regression by Dynamic Programming
abstract: This article extends the dynamic programming framework introduced by (Rote, 2019) from the univariate to the bivariate isotonic problem, using an anti-diagonal traversal procedure. The proposed algorithm is applied to the well-known baseball data set that describes the association of salary with a collection of player properties, including the number of runs batted and hits. The new algorithm is relevant in the sense that dynamic programming has a wide range of applications in economics, such as the savings problem, economic growth, job search, business cycles, oligopoly equilibrium, recursive contracts, and forecasting.
tldr: 本文扩展了Rote(2019)的动态规划框架，提出双变量保序回归算法，并应用于棒球数据分析。
abstract_cn: 本文将(Rote, 2019)提出的动态规划框架从单变量等渗问题扩展到双变量等渗问题，采用反斜对角线遍历程序。所提出的算法应用于著名的棒球数据集，该数据集描述了薪资与一系列球员属性（包括击球得分和安打次数）之间的关联。该新算法具有重要意义，因为动态规划在经济学中具有广泛的应用，例如储蓄问题、经济增长、求职、商业周期、寡头垄断均衡、递归合同以及预测等领域。

title: Orthogonal Integrated Conditional Moment Tests for Treatment Effect Heterogeneity
abstract: We propose a nonparametric integrated conditional moment (ICM) test for treatment effect heterogeneity across subpopulations defined by a given covariate subvector. Under unconfoundedness, the null is recast as a conditional moment restriction based on a Neyman-orthogonal score, which reduces the first-order sensitivity of the empirical process to nuisance parameter estimation. The test statistics are constructed as continuous functionals of a marked empirical process. We establish a uniform feasible-to-oracle approximation and derive the asymptotic properties of these test statistics under the null and fixed alternatives. We further show that the test has nontrivial power against local alternatives converging to the null at the $n^{-1/2}$ rate, and develop an easy-to-implement multiplier bootstrap for feasible inference. We also develop extensions to tests of parametric CATE specifications and to settings with endogenous treatment and a binary instrument. Finally, we apply the proposed testing approach to study whether the effect of maternal smoking during pregnancy on infant birth weight varies with maternal age.
tldr: 提出正交化综合条件矩检验，用于检验处理效应异质性，并应用于孕期吸烟对婴儿出生体重的影响分析。
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种非参数积分条件矩（ICM）检验，用于检验由给定协变量子向量定义的子群体间的处理效应异质性。在无混淆性假设下，原假设被重新表述为基于奈曼正交得分（Neyman-orthogonal score）的条件矩约束，该得分降低了经验过程对 nuisance 参数估计的一阶敏感性。检验统计量被构造为带标记经验过程的连续泛函。我们建立了从可行到最优的均匀逼近，并推导了这些统计量在原假设和固定备择假设下的渐近性质。我们进一步证明，该检验对于以 $n^{-1/2}$ 速率收敛于原假设的局部备择假设具有非平凡功效，并开发了一种易于实现的多重自助法（multiplier bootstrap）用于可行推断。我们还扩展了该方法，使其适用于参数化条件平均处理效应（CATE）设定的检验，以及存在内生处理和二元工具变量的情形。最后，我们将所提出的检验方法应用于研究孕期吸烟对婴儿出生体重的影响是否随母亲年龄变化。

title: Interpreting (and testing) factor loadings
abstract: Dynamic Factor Models (DFMs) are popular to reduce dimensionality being customary in the empirical analysis of large systems of macroeconomic and/or financial variables. In this context, the common underlying factors and their loadings are often extracted using Principal Components (PC), which are consistent and asymptotically normal under very general conditions. Consequently, inference on the factor loadings, which is crucial for the correct interpretation of the underlying factors, is often based on their asymptotic distribution with the limit covariance matrix of the loadings consistently estimated using HAC estimators. In this paper, we analyse the performance of the finite sample asymptotic approximation when constructing confidence intervals and testing about estimated PC loadings. We show that this approximation is seriously affected when the cross-sectional dimension is not large enough. We propose using HAR inference and a subsampling procedure to correct the MSE of the loadings to take into account the uncertainty associated with the estimation of the covariance matrix and of the factors, respectively. The relevance of the results is illustrated in an empirical analysis of economic convergence among the US states.
tldr: 论文分析主成分估计的因子载荷的有限样本性质，提出HAR推断和子抽样方法改进置信区间和检验，并应用于美国各州经济收敛分析。
abstract_cn: 动态因子模型（Dynamic Factor Models, DFMs）在宏观经济和/或金融变量大系统的实证分析中广泛用于降维。在此背景下，通常采用主成分分析（Principal Components, PC）提取共同潜在因子及其载荷，该方法在非常一般的条件下具有一致性和渐近正态性。因此，对于因子载荷的推断——这对正确解释潜在因子至关重要——通常基于其渐近分布，并利用HAC估计量（Heteroskedasticity and Autocorrelation Consistent estimators）一致地估计载荷的极限协方差矩阵。本文分析了在构建置信区间及检验估计的主成分载荷时，有限样本渐近逼近的表现。研究表明，当横截面维度不够大时，该逼近会受到严重影响。我们提出使用HAR推断（Heteroskedasticity and Autocorrelation Robust inference）和子抽样方法，分别校正载荷的均方误差（MSE），以考虑协方差矩阵估计和因子估计带来的不确定性。相关结果在美国各州经济趋同的实证分析中得到了验证。

title: Q-SCM: A Quantum-Sequential Choice Model for Driver Mental State Evolution
abstract: We propose a Quantum-Sequential Choice Model (Q-SCM) for modelling driver mental state evolution in interactive traffic environments. The proposed framework retains the classical latent class choice structure, but replaces the conventional class membership formulation with a quantum cognitive state model. A unique feature of this model is that the quantum component is confined to the class membership layer, while the action choice layer remains a classical RUM. The driver's latent state is represented as a two-state quantum system on the Bloch sphere including neutral and defensive states. Perceptual cues, including separation distance, closing time-to-collision (CTTC), and lane deviation induce sequential unitary rotations governed by Pauli matrices. This formulation allows the model to capture memory, phase effects, cue order dependence, and transitions between behavioural regimes that depend on prior cue history. To ensure well-behaved state evolution, we introduce three control mechanisms: a monotonicity constraint that prevents pendulum-like overshoot, a geodesic safeguard mechanism that ensures convergence toward the defensive state under sustained threat exposure, and a relaxation step that allows recovery toward the neutral baseline when the threat weakens. The model is estimated using 85,754 observations from 9,610 drivers extracted from naturalistic trajectories. The empirical results show that defensive state formation is not governed only by the instantaneous values of traffic cues, but also by the accumulated cue history and the order in which cues are processed.
tldr: 提出量子-序列选择模型（Q-SCM）模拟交互交通环境中驾驶员心理状态演化，使用自然驾驶轨迹数据估计模型。
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种量子-序列选择模型（Quantum-Sequential Choice Model, Q-SCM），用于对交互式交通环境中驾驶员心理状态的演化进行建模。该框架保留了经典的潜在类别选择结构，但将传统的类别归属公式替换为量子认知状态模型。该模型的一个独特之处在于，量子部分仅限于类别归属层，而行动选择层仍为经典的随机效用模型（RUM）。驾驶员的潜在状态在布洛赫球（Bloch sphere）上被表示为包含中性状态和防御状态的双态量子系统。感知线索，包括间距、碰撞时间（closing time-to-collision, CTTC）以及车道偏离，会引发由泡利矩阵（Pauli matrices）控制的序列幺正旋转。这一公式使模型能够捕捉记忆、相位效应、线索顺序依赖性以及依赖于先前线索历史的行为模式之间的转换。为确保状态演化的良好特性，我们引入了三种控制机制：防止钟摆式过冲的单调性约束、确保在持续威胁暴露下向防御状态收敛的测地线保护机制，以及在威胁减弱时允许向中性基线恢复的松弛步骤。该模型基于从自然驾驶轨迹中提取的9,610名驾驶员的85,754次观测数据进行估计。实证结果表明，防御状态的形成不仅受交通线索瞬时值的影响，还受累积的线索历史以及线索处理顺序的制约。

title: Partial Identification with Multiple Nonlinear Measurements of a Latent Regressor
abstract: We study linear regression when the regressor is latent and observed only through multiple noisy measurements, each a smooth but possibly nonlinear function of the latent variable. The problem is acute in the measurement of occupational exposure to artificial intelligence, where competing scores yield downstream estimates that differ by a factor of eleven. A regression on any single measurement recovers a source-specific coefficient rather than the structural one. We fix the latent scale by requiring the consensus measurement function to be linear and bound the remaining curvature heterogeneity across sources relative to slope. Under this bound, the structural coefficient lies in a closed-form interval centered at a symmetric cross-source estimator. The interval is invariant to unknown source loadings, and its half-width is second order in the curvature bound and sharp to the same order. With at least four measurements, the bound is estimable from the joint distribution of the sources through a split-instrument auxiliary regression, and Imbens-Manski confidence intervals with the Stoye critical value attain uniform coverage over the curvature class, including at the point-identified boundary. The application matches six exposure measures to an American Community Survey panel of 8.88 million person-year observations for 2015 to 2024. The post-2022 employment coefficient changes sign between the language-model measures and the Webb patent-text measure, and an ex ante factor-analytic rule separates the Webb measure as a distinct construct. The five retained sources yield a loading-invariant consensus coefficient of -0.239, with a partial-identification half-width of 1.23 percent of the point estimate, or 1.88 percent at the one-sided 95 percent upper bound on the curvature. We read the application as measurement reconciliation rather than as a causal estimate of AI displacement.
tldr: 本文提出一种部分识别方法，用于处理潜变量存在多个非线性测量时的线性回归，并应用于人工智能暴露对就业的影响估计。
abstract_cn: 我们研究了当回归变量为潜变量且仅能通过多个含噪测量值观测到时的线性回归问题，其中每个测量值都是潜变量的平滑但可能非线性的函数。这一问题在职业性人工智能暴露测量中尤为突出，因为相互竞争的评分会导致下游估计值相差11倍。对任一单一测量值进行回归只能恢复特定来源的系数，而非结构性系数。我们通过要求共识测量函数为线性函数来固定潜变量尺度，并约束各来源间相对于斜率的剩余曲率异质性。在此约束下，结构性系数位于一个以对称跨来源估计量为中心的闭式区间内。该区间对未知的来源载荷具有不变性，其半宽度在曲率约束下为二阶量，且在该阶数下是精确的。当测量值数量至少为四个时，该约束可通过分裂工具辅助回归从来源的联合分布中估计得出，而采用Stoye临界值的Imbens-Manski置信区间在曲率类别上（包括在点识别边界处）达到均匀覆盖。我们将六项暴露测量指标应用于2015至2024年间包含888万人年观测值的美国社区调查面板数据。2022年后的就业系数在语言模型测量指标与Webb专利文本测量指标之间改变了符号，而一项先验的因子分析规则将Webb测量指标识别为一种不同的构念。保留的五个来源产生了一个载荷不变的共识系数-0.239，其部分识别半宽度为点估计值的1.23%，在曲率的单侧95%上界处则为1.88%。我们将该应用解读为测量协调，而非对人工智能替代效应的因果估计。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: KRAFT: A Transaction-Level Dataset for Korean Apartment Sales Integrated with Contextual Indicators
abstract: Apartment transaction records are useful for studying housing markets, household finance, regional economics, and macro-financial transmission, but transaction data are often distributed separately from contextual socioeconomic indicators. We present KRAFT, a nationwide transaction-level dataset of South Korean apartment sales from January 2015 to December 2024. The dataset contains 5,320,379 apartment sale transactions across all 17 Sido regions and includes transaction timing, administrative location, exclusive residential area, reported transaction price, floor level, and construction year. KRAFT also provides auxiliary indicators covering macro-financial conditions, demographic structure, education infrastructure, private education expenditure, housing price indices, consumer sentiment, and economic policy uncertainty. The released files are organized as year-specific transaction files and separate auxiliary data tables to preserve the original temporal and spatial resolution of each source. KRAFT supports reproducible research on apartment price modeling, regional housing-market comparison, housing-demand analysis, and links between housing transactions and socioeconomic context.
tldr: 构建了韩国公寓销售交易级数据集KRAFT，整合交易信息与宏观金融、人口、教育等背景指标，支持住房市场分析。
abstract_cn: 公寓交易记录对于研究住房市场、家庭金融、区域经济学以及宏观金融传导机制具有重要价值，但交易数据往往与社会经济指标数据分散存储。我们构建了KRAFT数据集，这是一个覆盖韩国全国范围的交易级数据集，包含2015年1月至2024年12月期间的公寓销售记录。该数据集涵盖韩国全部17个市道（Sido）地区的5,320,379条公寓销售交易，每条记录包含交易时间、行政位置、专用居住面积、申报交易价格、楼层及建筑年份。KRAFT还提供了辅助指标，涵盖宏观金融状况、人口结构、教育基础设施、私立教育支出、房价指数、消费者信心及经济政策不确定性。发布的数据文件按年份组织为独立的交易文件及辅助数据表，以保留各数据源原始的时空分辨率。KRAFT支持关于公寓价格建模、区域住房市场比较、住房需求分析以及住房交易与社会经济背景关联性的可重复研究。

title: Modeling the Dynamic Relationship Between Brent Crude Oil Prices and the Nepal Stock Exchange: An Integrated Econometric and Explainable Machine Learning Approach
abstract: This study examines the dynamic relationship between the global oil prices and Nepal Stock Exchange (NEPSE) using an integrated approach which combines traditional econometric techniques with machine learning and explainable AI techniques. For this, Daily data of International Oil prices and NEPSE index is analyzed from approximately thirteen years (June 2013 to June 2026) using Granger causality, EGARCH(1,1), and DCC-GARCH models to examine different properties like predictive relationships, asymmetric volatility behaviour, and time-varying correlations. To further supplement the econometric analysis, Machine Learning Models like Random Forest, LightGBM, and XGBoost algorithms were used to capture nonlinear relationships, along with explainable artificial intelligence techniques like SHAP values, Partial Dependence Plots, and Individual Conditional Expectation plots to further interpret the results of the model. The results from the econometric analysis showed a statistically significant unidirectional Granger causality from Brent crude oil to NEPSE with a four-day lag, high volatility persistence in both markets, and weak yet highly time-varying conditional correlations. Among the machine learning models, XGBoost achieves the best performance, and explainability analysis reveals that NEPSE own momentum and short-term volatility mainly influence its own behaviour and oil-related information serves as a minor, method-dependent contributor. The findings demonstrate that econometric and explainable machine learning approaches provide insights into the oil and equity market relationship in a way that each approach complements the result of one another.
tldr: 该论文使用计量经济学和机器学习方法研究布伦特原油价格与尼泊尔股市的动态关系，发现原油价格单向Granger影响股市，但股市自身动量主导其行为。
abstract_cn: 本研究采用传统计量经济学技术与机器学习及可解释人工智能技术相结合的整合方法，探讨了全球油价与尼泊尔证券交易所（NEPSE）之间的动态关系。为此，我们分析了约十三年（2013年6月至2026年6月）的国际油价与NEPSE指数日度数据，运用格兰杰因果检验、EGARCH(1,1)和DCC-GARCH模型，考察了预测关系、非对称波动行为及时变相关性等不同特征。为进一步补充计量经济学分析，我们采用随机森林、LightGBM和XGBoost等机器学习算法捕捉非线性关系，并借助SHAP值、偏依赖图（Partial Dependence Plots）及个体条件期望图（Individual Conditional Expectation plots）等可解释人工智能技术，对模型结果进行深入解读。计量经济学分析结果显示，布伦特原油对NEPSE存在统计上显著的单向格兰杰因果关系，滞后四天；两个市场均表现出高波动持续性，且条件相关性虽弱但具有高度时变性。在机器学习模型中，XGBoost表现最优；可解释性分析表明，NEPSE自身动量与短期波动主要影响其自身行为，而油价相关信息仅作为次要且依赖于方法的贡献因素。研究结果表明，计量经济学方法与可解释机器学习方法能够以相互补充的方式，为理解石油与股票市场关系提供深刻洞见。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: The Limits of Price Discrimination with a Bayesian Seller
abstract: We study the limits of third-degree price discrimination when the production cost is Bayesian and private to the seller, generalizing the seminal work of Bergemann, Brooks and Morris (2015). The rough setup is the following: A monopoly seller sets different prices for buyers in different "segments" of the market so as to maximize seller surplus. Different ways in which the aggregate market is decomposed into segments lead to different welfare outcomes, i.e., (seller surplus, buyer surplus) pairs. When the production cost is Bayesian, the region of achievable welfare outcomes can exhibit complex shapes beyond the clean characterization by Bergemann, Brooks and Morris for the case with a fixed cost. We show that with a Bayesian cost, this region coincides with a proper projection of a polytope defined by a polynomial number of linear constraints, the essential ones of which correspond to flow conservation in a "discounted" flow network. As a result, we give a polynomial-time algorithm that computes optimal market segmentations in terms of any linear combination of the seller surplus and the buyer surplus. En route, we establish the following structural property: Any market can be written as a convex combination of "extremal markets" in a way preserving the seller surplus and the buyer surplus. These extremal markets are piecewise equal-surplus with respect to different possible costs, generalizing a similar notion introduced by Bergemann, Brooks and Morris when the cost is fixed.
tldr: 研究贝叶斯成本下垄断厂商三级价格歧视的福利边界，通过流网络刻画可行区域并给出多项式时间算法。
abstract_cn: 我们研究了当生产成本为贝叶斯（Bayesian）且为卖方私有时，三级价格歧视的极限，推广了Bergemann、Brooks和Morris（2015）的开创性工作。基本设定如下：一个垄断卖方为市场中不同“细分市场”的买方设定不同价格，以最大化卖方剩余。总体市场被分解为不同细分市场的方式会导致不同的福利结果，即（卖方剩余，买方剩余）组合。当生产成本为贝叶斯时，可达福利结果的区域可能呈现出复杂形状，超越了Bergemann、Brooks和Morris在固定成本情形下给出的清晰刻画。我们证明，在贝叶斯成本下，该区域恰好对应于一个由多项式数量线性约束定义的多面体（polytope）的适当投影，其中关键约束对应于一个“折扣”流网络（flow network）中的流量守恒。由此，我们给出了一个多项式时间算法，能够针对卖方剩余与买方剩余的任何线性组合计算最优市场细分。在此过程中，我们建立了以下结构性质：任何市场都可以写成“极端市场”（extremal markets）的凸组合，同时保持卖方剩余和买方剩余不变。这些极端市场针对不同可能的成本是分段等剩余（piecewise equal-surplus）的，推广了Bergemann、Brooks和Morris在成本固定时引入的类似概念。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: First They Came for the Others: A Theory of Divide-and-Conquer
abstract: Divide-and-conquer tactics often succeed not through mechanical coordination failures, but through epistemic friction regarding an aggressor's underlying intent. When an attacker strikes a first target, bystanders must infer whether the assault represents a localized grievance or a systemic campaign. If the attack is rationally interpreted as particularized, bystanders abstain, prompting the isolated victim to surrender. We demonstrate how higher attack costs and lower correlation between victims' fates facilitate this division. We then study how behavioral responses, rhetoric, treaty commitments, and downstream defense networks modify this inference.
tldr: 通过博弈论模型分析分而治之策略如何利用旁观者对攻击者意图的认知摩擦来成功瓦解对手。
abstract_cn: 分而治之策略的成功往往并非源于机械性的协调失败，而是由于攻击者潜在意图引发的认知摩擦（epistemic friction）。当攻击者打击首个目标时，旁观者必须推断该袭击是代表局部性不满还是系统性行动。若该攻击被理性解读为特定化行为，旁观者便会袖手旁观，从而迫使孤立无援的受害者投降。我们论证了更高的攻击成本与受害者命运之间更低的关联性如何促进这种分化。进而研究行为反应、修辞策略、条约承诺及下游防御网络（downstream defense networks）如何改变这一推断过程。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: Choice at Finite Capacity: The Bounded Agent as an Information Channel and the Recovery of Walrasian Demand
abstract: Standard economics assumes the consumer as a flawless calculator who always buys the best basket it can afford. This paper models the shopper instead as a limited information channel: it compresses its world to the detail its attention affords, so its choice is a probability distribution, not a single basket. The textbook consumer returns exactly as the unlimited-attention limit, while at the zero-attention end the shopper falls back on pure habit. The central result is about how this shopper's demand responds to price changes. That pattern of responses is just a rescaling of how the shopper's own choices vary and move together, so it comes out symmetric. And provided the budget really binds, because the shopper wants more than it can afford, raising a good's own price lowers demand for it once buying power is held fixed. So the downward pull comes from the budget and from compression, not from rationality. The framework also covers an artificial agent running a limited-capacity policy. A worked two-good quadratic consumer carries every quantity in closed form.
tldr: 将有限能力消费者建模为信息通道，推导出需求对价格变化的对称响应，并恢复瓦尔拉斯需求作为极限情况。
abstract_cn: 标准经济学假设消费者是一个完美的计算器，总能购买其所能负担的最佳商品组合。本文将购物者建模为一个有限信息通道：它将其世界压缩至其注意力所能关注的细节，因此其选择是一个概率分布，而非单一商品组合。教科书中的消费者恰好对应于无限注意力的极限情形，而在零注意力的一端，购物者则退化为纯粹的习惯行为。核心结论涉及此类购物者的需求如何对价格变化做出反应。这种反应模式仅仅是购物者自身选择变化及其联动关系的重新缩放，因此呈现出对称性。并且，只要预算确实具有约束力——因为购物者想要的超过其所能负担——在购买力保持不变的条件下，提高某商品自身的价格会降低对该商品的需求。因此，这种向下拉动的作用源于预算约束与信息压缩，而非源于理性。该框架同样适用于运行有限容量策略的人工智能体。一个经过求解的两商品二次型消费者，其所有数量均以闭合形式呈现。
research_field: 商业银行、财政和货币政策

title: A Unified Credit Expansion Theory on Housing Cycle: Causal Evidence for Within- and Cross-Metro Patterns in the Prior, Boom, Bust, and Recovery Periods
abstract: During the 1999-2019 U.S. housing cycle, three empirical facts present a puzzle: in the boom period, the correlation between income growth and mortgage growth is (1) negative across ZIP codes within a metropolitan area, but (2) positive across metropolitan areas, and (3) the metropolitan areas that experience the worst bust also show the strongest recovery. I develop a unified credit expansion theory that explains both within- and cross-metro patterns in the prior, boom, bust, and recovery periods (including the three facts above) and generates new testable implications of ``double differences" (cross ZIP codes and cross metros) for the four periods. Following the idea of ``Economic Base Theory", I construct local economic exposure to net export growth as the driving force of local economy and credit expansion. For the identification strategy, I use a new instrumental variable approach from the International trade literature for the following empirical results. First, I show that high-net-export-growth metros experience a stronger boom-bust-recovery housing cycle due to credit expansion in private-label mortgages (PLMs), rather than in government-sponsored enterprise mortgages (GSEMs), because only the former can legally respond to local economic conditions. Second, for the ``double differences", I define a low-minus-high (LMH) factor as the private-label mortgage (and house price) growth in low-income ZIP codes minus that in high-income ZIP codes within the same metropolitan area. I show that this low-minus-high factor (as a measure of credit expansion) in the high-net-export-growth metros is more positive during the boom period, more negative during the bust period, and slightly more positive in the recovery period than in the low-net-export-growth metros. Lastly, I employ five tests to demonstrate that ``speculation" is unlikely to play a dominant role in this housing cycle.
tldr: 论文提出统一信贷扩张理论，利用工具变量识别净出口增长对地方经济的影响，解释美国住房周期中都市区内和跨都市的抵押贷款增长模式，并强调私人标签抵押贷款的作用。
abstract_cn: 在1999-2019年美国住房周期中，三个实证事实构成了一个谜题：在繁荣期，收入增长与抵押贷款增长之间的相关性（1）在大都市区内的邮政编码层面为负，但（2）在大都市区层面为正，且（3）经历最严重萧条的大都市区也展现出最强劲的复苏。我构建了一个统一的信贷扩张理论，该理论解释了繁荣前、繁荣期、萧条期及复苏期（包括上述三个事实）的都市区内与跨都市区模式，并为这四个时期提出了可检验的“双重差异”（跨邮政编码与跨大都市区）新含义。遵循“经济基础理论”的思路，我将地方经济对净出口增长的暴露度构建为地方经济与信贷扩张的驱动力。在识别策略上，我采用国际贸易文献中的一种新工具变量方法，以获取以下实证结果。首先，我表明，高净出口增长的大都市区因私人标签抵押贷款（PLMs）而非政府赞助企业抵押贷款（GSEMs）的信贷扩张，经历了更强烈的繁荣-萧条-复苏住房周期，因为只有前者能够合法地对地方经济状况做出反应。其次，针对“双重差异”，我将低减高（LMH）因子定义为同一大都市区内低收入邮政编码区与高收入邮政编码区私人标签抵押贷款（及房价）增长率之差。我表明，与低净出口增长的大都市区相比，高净出口增长大都市区的这一低减高因子（作为信贷扩张的衡量指标）在繁荣期更为正向，在萧条期更为负向，在复苏期则略为正向。最后，我通过五项检验证明，“投机”在此住房周期中不太可能发挥主导作用。

title: Anchoring of inflation expectations and the role of monetary policy and cost‐push factors
abstract: Abstract This paper studies the anchoring of inflation expectations at the individual forecaster level. It proposes a novel measure of anchoring based on both point and density forecasts, and uses data from the European Central Bank Survey of Professional Forecasters to examine its co‐movement with expectations about monetary policy and key cost‐push factors. The anchoring measure is constructed for each forecaster and regressed on expectations regarding the European Central Bank policy rate, crude oil prices, the US dollar/euro exchange rate, and unit labor costs. Although the cross‐sectional mean of long‐term inflation expectations appears largely stable, substantial heterogeneity emerges during periods of heightened macroeconomic uncertainty, with some forecasters exhibiting signs of de‐anchoring. The results show that individual anchoring is systematically related to expectations about future policy rates and unit labor cost changes. In addition, these relationships have strengthened since 2020 and display asymmetries depending on whether inflation expectations lie above or below the target.

tldr: 本文基于欧洲央行专业预测者调查数据，构建个体层面的通胀预期锚定指标，发现锚定性与政策利率预期和单位劳动力成本变化预期系统性相关，且2020年后关系增强并存在非对称性。
abstract_cn: 本文研究个体预测者层面通胀预期的锚定情况。本文提出了一种基于点预测与密度预测的新型锚定度量方法，并利用欧洲央行专业预测者调查数据，考察其与货币政策预期及关键成本推动因素之间的联动关系。该锚定度量针对每位预测者构建，并基于其对欧洲央行政策利率、原油价格、美元/欧元汇率及单位劳动力成本的预期进行回归分析。尽管长期通胀预期的截面均值总体保持稳定，但在宏观经济不确定性加剧时期，不同预测者之间呈现出显著异质性，部分预测者表现出脱锚迹象。研究结果表明，个体锚定程度与对未来政策利率及单位劳动力成本变化的预期存在系统性关联。此外，自2020年以来，这些关联性有所增强，并呈现出非对称特征——具体取决于通胀预期高于还是低于目标水平。

analysis.chinese_title: 通胀预期的锚定与货币政策及成本推动因素的作用
analysis.summary: 本文提出一种基于个体预测者层面的通胀预期锚定程度新度量，并研究该度量与货币政策预期及不同成本推动因素预期的共同变动。利用欧洲央行专业预测者调查（ECB-SPF）数据，首先基于点预测和密度预测构建每个预测者的锚定指标，然后将该指标对预测者关于ECB政策利率、原油价格、美元/欧元汇率和单位劳动力成本的预期进行回归。主要发现：货币政策收紧预期通常能增强锚定程度，而原油价格和单位劳动力成本上升预期会降低锚定程度，后者在短期更为显著。
innovations: 首次在个体预测者层面构建通胀预期锚定程度度量，而非仅使用加总数据。
将锚定度量从三个子指标扩展至六个，纳入密度预测的方差、偏度和峰度。
系统考察了货币政策预期与多种成本推动因素预期对锚定程度的共同影响。
利用滚动窗口回归揭示锚定程度与各因素关系的时变性。
analysis.methodology: 首先，基于ECB-SPF的点预测和密度预测，计算每个预测者各预测期限的锚定子指标（偏离目标、偏离自身均值、偏离截面均值、个体标准差、偏度、峰度），标准化后取平均得到综合锚定指标。然后，构建面板固定效应模型，将锚定指标对预测者关于政策利率、原油价格变化、汇率变化和单位劳动力成本变化的预期进行回归。最后，采用20个季度的滚动窗口估计参数时变性。
key_results: 货币政策收紧预期（短期政策利率预期上升）显著增强通胀预期锚定程度。
原油价格和单位劳动力成本上升预期显著降低锚定程度，且该效应在短期（h=1,2）更明显。
欧元区通胀预期在2008-2010年、2014-2016年及2019-2023年出现脱锚，中期（h=5）锚定程度更稳定。
长期政策利率预期（1-2年）上升反而降低锚定程度，可能反映对持续通胀或衰退的担忧。
tech_stack: 滚动窗口回归（窗口20个季度）
密度预测的矩计算（均值、方差、偏度、峰度）
标准化处理（零均值单位方差）
strengths: 创新性地在个体层面度量锚定程度，捕捉预测者异质性。
综合使用点预测和密度预测信息，构建多维锚定指标。
系统分析货币政策与多种成本推动因素预期的共同影响。
使用滚动窗口方法揭示关系的时间变化。
limitations: 样本仅限于欧元区，结论可能不适用于其他经济体。
锚定指标构建中各子指标等权重，可能忽略不同维度的重要性差异。
回归模型未控制其他潜在影响因素，可能存在遗漏变量偏误。
数据频率为季度，可能无法捕捉高频动态。
analysis.relevance_to_keywords: 论文直接研究通胀预期锚定与货币政策（政策利率预期）及成本推动因素（原油价格、汇率、劳动力成本）的关系，与银行信贷、财政政策等关键词相关性较低，但与利率、通胀、中央银行政策工具、量化宽松（间接）等高度相关。
